name: Anne DeLisle
subject: How can I help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seely for Congress, 8433 East Court Street, Davison, MI 48423
body:
[image: Screen Shot 2022-05-16 at 1.50.35 PM.png]

Dear Friends,

We are only 10 days away from the Primary Election on Tuesday, August 2.
Let's help get Matthew over the finish line and secure the path to victory
for November!

How can you help?

*STEP 1: Spread the News*

- Please tell everyone you know there is a Primary Election on Tuesday,
August 2.
- Remind them that in a Primary Election you get either a Republican
ballot or a Democrat ballot.
- Tell them your friend, Matthew Seely, a Republican, is running for US
Congress.
- Share www.seelyforcongress.com and let everyone know they can check
out Matthew Seely there.

*STEP 2: Volunteer between now and August 2 for Seely for Congress*

- Go Door Knocking in precincts pre-identified by the campaign.
- Make Phone Calls or send Texts to a list provided by the campaign.
- Invite family and friends from Genesee, Bay, Saginaw, the Eastern
portion of Midland, and Arbela Twp in Tuscola to our final Meet and Greets
before the Primary.
- Make a Financial Contribution, if you feel so called.
- Volunteer to go to specific polling locations and ask voters to vote
for Matthew Seely.

*The Time Is Now!* We can flip the 8th Congressional District Seat and send
Nancy Pelosi into retirement . . . but first we must secure a Primary WIN
for Matthew Seely on August 2 so that he can face Dan Kildee on November 8.

God bless you,

Anne DeLisle
Events and Volunteer Director, Seely for Congress
(810) 516.5651
www.seelyforcongress.com
Follow us on Facebook at Seely for Congress
<https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100080020913279> or Twitter at
Seely4Congress <https://twitter.com/Seely4Congress>!
Volunteer Here!
<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf7ZU6ZXKeiErXi7dL95ACTq9tlVYGN18aOGh_9hbumsE2ISA/viewform>

Paid for by Seely for Congress, 8433 East Court Street, Davison, MI 48423.

clean_body: We’re being outraised by millions, and a new poll shows we’re slightly behind. We need your support to beat our far-Left opponent. Raphael Warnock will have enough cash to run the very best campaign money can buy. | Fellow American - There's no other way to say it ... this is an emergency. We're being outraised by Senator Raphael Warnock by millions, and it's allowed him to run a barrage of misleading attack ads against us. To make matters worse - a new poll shows Senator Warnock is now leading slightly. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs are flooding the airwaves in Georgia. The only way we can counter their attacks is by raising enough money to keep our ads on the air and set the record straight. Our team made it clear - raise $50,000 by midnight or risk falling even farther behind. We must keep our ads on the air to counter the lies that Democrats are pushing out to the voters of Georgia. We know $50,000 by midnight is a lot - but here's the deal... If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | Fellow American, this is the most closely watched Senate race this year because the Senate majority will be determined by what happens in Georgia. We're being attacked by misleading ads, being outraised by millions, and dropping slightly in a new poll. BUT WE CAN STILL WIN. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Tom Fitton
subject: New Hunter Biden Scandal Lawsuit
body: Fauci Cover-up! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH FILES LAWSUIT FOR OPENTHEBOOKS.COM FOR EMPLOYMENT/FINANCIAL RECORDS OF CHRISTINE GRADY, SPOUSE OF ANTHONY FAUCI [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27705&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL25ldy1sYXdzdWl0cy1vbi1iaWRlbi1hbmQtZmF1Y2ktY29ycnVwdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] A lot of money flows [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27706&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFpbHl3aXJlLmNvbS9uZXdzL2ZhdWNpLWNvbGxpbnMtc2hhcmVkLWluLXNlY3JldC1uaWgtcm95YWx0aWVzLXRvdGFsaW5nLTM1MG0td2F0Y2hkb2ctcmVwb3J0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] through the National Institutes of Health, including dollars that benefit its scientists, and American taxpayers should know the details because they are subject to the bureaucrats’ edicts. At the center of many controversies is Dr. Anthony Fauci, director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases, part of the NIH. Few know that his wife, Christine Grady [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27690&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9pcnAubmloLmdvdi9waS9jaHJpc3RpbmUtZ3JhZHk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=], also works for the NIH. She serves as chief of the Clinical Center’s Department of Bioethics. What is her role? How much are we paying her? The NIH won’t say, of course, so we filed a lawsuit on behalf of American Transparency (OpenTheBooks.com) against the Department of Health and Human Services. (_American Transparency, d/b/a/ OpenTheBooks.com v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27691&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL29wZW50aGVib29rcy1jb20tdi1oaHMtZ3JhZHktY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] (No. 1:22-cv-02021)). We sued after HHS failed to respond to an April 8 FOIA request from OpenTheBooks.com to the NIH asking for records regarding Grady: * All employment contracts, modifications and addendums regarding Christine Grady, MSN, PhD, since her hiring as Chief of the Department of Bioethics. * Any confidentiality agreements/documents, conflict of interest waivers or documents, ethics disclosures, and financial and/or economic interest disclosure documents. * Grady’s current job description. OpenTheBooks.com [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27692&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub3BlbnRoZWJvb2tzLmNvbS9hYm91dC11cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] is the largest private repository of records of United States public-sector spending. Its mission is to post online all publicly available government spending: “every dime, online, in real time.” Our lawsuit asks the court to require the department to search for and produce all responsive records and order the department to stop withholding non-exempt records related to the FOIA request. “Once again, NIH is using taxpayer dollars to avoid transparency, and leaving us no choice but to enter litigation that will also burden the taxpayer,” said Adam Andrzejewski, CEO and founder of OpenTheBooks.com. “It’s time for NIH to stop routinely hiding information as simple as a job description and embrace basic transparency. We thank our friend at Judicial Watch for helping us get the answers we deserve.” An October 2021 lawsuit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=26601&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1uaWgtcm95YWx0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] we have for OpenTheBooks.com against HHS asks for Anthony Fauci’s employment contracts; financial, conflict of interest, and confidentiality disclosure documents; and job description, as well as royalties paid to NIH employees by outside entities. In May 2022, the lawsuit uncovered [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27341&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmF1Y2ktY29sbGlucy1zaGFyZWQtaW4tc2VjcmV0LW5paC1yb3lhbHRpZXMtdG90YWxpbmctMzUwbS13YXRjaGRvZy1yZXBvcnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] that over a 10-year period, Fauci and others at NIH received more than $350 million in secretive “royalty” payments from drug companies and other third parties. So, you can see why we have good reason to believe that these financial disclosure records will give Americans a more complete picture of the conflicts of interest that have compromised NIH—and Dr. Fauci. That our client had to file a federal lawsuit to gain access to this basic information speaks volumes. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES SECRET SERVICE FOR HUNTER BIDEN TRAVEL AND SECURITY RECORDS The Secret Service is covering for Hunter Biden. We just filed a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for Secret Service hidden records on Hunter Biden’s travel and security costs. (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27699&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi10cmF2ZWwtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMDk3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] (No. 1:22-cv-02097)). We sued after the Secret Service (a component of DHS) failed to respond adequately to three separate FOIA requests in March and April 2022 for: * All records concerning the use of security and/or other services to Hunter Biden and any companions; and * All records concerning the use of U.S. Government funds to provide security and/or any other services to Hunter Biden and any companions. The Secret Service is violating FOIA law by slow-rolling and hiding Hunter Biden records. What are they trying to hide? We have some idea because in June 2020, we received records [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27700&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWZsaWdodHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] from the U.S. Secret Service showing that during the first five-and-a-half years of the Obama administration, Hunter Biden traveled extensively while receiving a Secret Service protective detail. During the time period of the records provided, Hunter Biden took 411 separate domestic and international flights, including to 29 different foreign countries. He visited China five times. The Secret Service records showed that countries and territories visited by Hunter Biden, between June 2009 and May 2014, included: * Ethiopia and India on June 14-22, 2009 * Argentina on September 14-17, 2009 * France and Spain on November 9-13, 2009 * Canada on February 12-15, 2010 * Dominican Republic on February 18-22, 2010 * Puerto Rico on March 20-27, 2010 * China on April 6-9, 2010 * Belgium, Spain, and the United Kingdom on May 5-8, 2010 * UK, Egypt, Kenya, South Africa, Ascension Island, U.S. Virgin Islands on June 6-13, 2010 * Denmark and South Africa on August 9-24, 2010 * Hong Kong, Taiwan and China on April 16-22, 2011 * Mexico on May 15-17, 2011 * Colombia, France, United Arab Emirates and France again on November 1-11, 2011 * UK and Russia on February 15-18, 2012 * Germany, France and UK on February 1-5, 2013 * UK and Ireland on March 20-22, 2013 * China on June 13-15, 2013 * Switzerland and Italy on July 26-August 7, 2013 * Japan, China, South Korea and the Philippines on December 2-9, 2013 * China and Qatar on May 7-14, 2014 According to reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=19415&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvcmVuZXdlZC1pbnRlcmVzdC1pbi1qb2UtYmlkZW5zLW9mZmljaWFsLXRyaXAtdG8tY2hpbmEtaW4tMjAxMy13aXRoLXNvbi1odW50ZXI/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=], then-Vice President Joe Biden and Hunter Biden flew on Air Force Two for an official trip to Beijing in December 2013. The records obtained by Judicial Watch from the Secret Service show Hunter Biden arrived in Tokyo on December 2, 2013, and departed for Beijing two days later. While it is typical for the families of the president and vice president to travel with them, questions have been raised about whether Hunter Biden used the government trip to further his business interests. I’ll report back to you if and when we get documents on Hunter’s latest activities! HHS PAYS $40K TO STUDY WHY KIDS “FAVOR WHITENESS AND MALENESS” Critical race theory is everything in the Biden administration, and showering taxpayer dollars on academics to push is exposed by our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog -- which reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27701&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaGhzLXBheXMtNDBrLXRvLXN0dWR5LXdoeS1raWRzLWZhdm9yLXdoaXRlbmVzcy1hbmQtbWFsZW5lc3Mtb3Zlci1vdGhlci1pZGVudGl0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] the latest use – and abuse -- of your money. In yet another racial equity venture funded by American taxpayers, a private university is getting tens of thousands of dollars from the U.S. government to study the “developmental trajectory of children’s beliefs that white males—more so than black males, white females, or black females—best exemplify a person.” The three-year research project, to be conducted by academics at New York University (NYU), seeks to uncover why kids “favor Whiteness and maleness over other identities,” according to the grant announcement [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27707&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNhc3BlbmRpbmcuZ292L2F3YXJkL0FTU1RfTk9OX0YzMUhEMTA3OTY1Xzc1Mjk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] issued by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), the agency doling out the cash for the study. The project is part of a broader HHS Equity Action Plan [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=27708&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGhzLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL2hocy1lcXVpdHktYWN0aW9uLXBsYW4ucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] designed to transform how the agency does business in order “to concretely advance equity.” Under the overhaul a Minority Health Social Vulnerability Index was launched to help identify racial and ethnic communities at the greatest risk for disproportionate impact and adverse outcomes due to COVID-19 and a Racial Equity in Postpartum Care Challenge was created to reduce disparities and improve outcomes for postpartum “Black or African American” women enrolled in Medicaid, the government’s insurance program for the poor. HHS has also doled out millions of dollars [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=26324&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24taW52ZXN0cy02Ni01LW1pbC10by1zdHJlbmd0aGVuLXZhY2NpbmUtY29uZmlkZW5jZS1hbW9uZy1taW5vcml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] to “minority-serving institutions” charged with strengthening COVID-19 vaccine confidence among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities. In the agency’s latest racial equity endeavor, researchers at NYU will receive more than $40,000 to study “societal assumptions regarding typical personhood and their effects on reasoning development.” The HHS grant announcement further specifies that the goal is to “uncover the development processes by which children acquire the belief that white males represent the default person—a pattern rooted in ideologies of androcentrism (centering the experiences of men) and ethnocentricism (centering the experiences of white people) prevalent in the United States.” The document goes on to state that “despite national rises in racial and gender diversity, white men remain vastly overrepresented across a host of domains within the U.S., from media, to politics, to clinical research.” That overrepresentation poses severe costs to the rest of society, the nation’s health agency writes, identifying the victims as “women of all races, men of color, and gender-nonconforming individuals.” The Biden administration is particularly concerned with embedded disparities in health, where clinical trials have historically prioritized the experiences, perspectives, and health outcomes of white men. “To address this issue, we must understand when and how the tendency to view white males as default people develops across childhood, as well as the environmental factors that underlie this phenomenon,” the HHS grant document states. Specifically, the government wants to know the developmental trajectory by which children’s default representations of people begin to favor whiteness and maleness over other identities, the domains across which children activate a white male default to guide social reasoning, and the sociocultural and ecological factors that can prevent the development of those beliefs. “Young children actively construct knowledge to make sense of their social environments,” according to the grant document. “As part of this process, children absorb complex streams of information from the sources around them, including parents, peers, and broader societal institutions (e.g., media).” HHS proceeds to explain that the beliefs children acquire tend to reflect the dominant ideologies embedded in their specific cultural contexts. In the U.S., those ideologies include the previously mentioned “androcentrism and ethnocentrism.” The taxpayer-funded researchers are expected to clarify the scope of children’s beliefs about who best exemplifies a person by testing the consistency of the belief across domains and uncovering the features of children’s sociocultural and ecological environments that underlie beliefs about who best exemplifies a person. “The diversity afforded by this platform allows us to capture a holistic picture of the phenomenon in question and the mechanisms underlying it, broadening both the empirical rigor and real-world impacts of our findings,” according to HHS. It will only cost American taxpayers $40,391, though the agency could obligate more funding at any time. Until next week, [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59475&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - clean_body: Fauci Cover-up! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH FILES LAWSUIT FOR OPENTHEBOOKS.COM FOR EMPLOYMENT/FINANCIAL RECORDS OF CHRISTINE GRADY, SPOUSE OF ANTHONY FAUCI [=] A lot of money flows [] through the National Institutes of Health, including dollars that benefit its scientists, and American taxpayers should know the details because they are subject to the bureaucrats’ edicts. At the center of many controversies is Dr. Anthony Fauci, director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases, part of the NIH. Few know that his wife, Christine Grady [=], also works for the NIH. She serves as chief of the Clinical Center’s Department of Bioethics. What is her role? How much are we paying her? The NIH won’t say, of course, so we filed a lawsuit on behalf of American Transparency (OpenTheBooks.com) against the Department of Health and Human Services. (American Transparency, d/b/a/ OpenTheBooks.com v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [==] (No. 1:22-cv-02021)). We sued after HHS failed to respond to an April 8 FOIA request from OpenTheBooks.com to the NIH asking for records regarding Grady: All employment contracts, modifications and addendums regarding Christine Grady, MSN, PhD, since her hiring as Chief of the Department of Bioethics. Any confidentiality agreements/documents, conflict of interest waivers or documents, ethics disclosures, and financial and/or economic interest disclosure documents. Grady’s current job description. OpenTheBooks.com [=] is the largest private repository of records of United States public-sector spending. Its mission is to post online all publicly available government spending: “every dime, online, in real time.” Our lawsuit asks the court to require the department to search for and produce all responsive records and order the department to stop withholding non-exempt records related to the FOIA request. “Once again, NIH is using taxpayer dollars to avoid transparency, and leaving us no choice but to enter litigation that will also burden the taxpayer,” said Adam Andrzejewski, CEO and founder of OpenTheBooks.com. “It’s time for NIH to stop routinely hiding information as simple as a job description and embrace basic transparency. We thank our friend at Judicial Watch for helping us get the answers we deserve.” An October 2021 lawsuit [==] we have for OpenTheBooks.com against HHS asks for Anthony Fauci’s employment contracts; financial, conflict of interest, and confidentiality disclosure documents; and job description, as well as royalties paid to NIH employees by outside entities. In May 2022, the lawsuit uncovered [] that over a 10-year period, Fauci and others at NIH received more than $350 million in secretive “royalty” payments from drug companies and other third parties. So, you can see why we have good reason to believe that these financial disclosure records will give Americans a more complete picture of the conflicts of interest that have compromised NIH—and Dr. Fauci. That our client had to file a federal lawsuit to gain access to this basic information speaks volumes. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES SECRET SERVICE FOR HUNTER BIDEN TRAVEL AND SECURITY RECORDS The Secret Service is covering for Hunter Biden. We just filed a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for Secret Service hidden records on Hunter Biden’s travel and security costs. (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [==] (No. 1:22-cv-02097)). We sued after the Secret Service (a component of DHS) failed to respond adequately to three separate FOIA requests in March and April 2022 for: All records concerning the use of security and/or other services to Hunter Biden and any companions; and All records concerning the use of U.S. Government funds to provide security and/or any other services to Hunter Biden and any companions. The Secret Service is violating FOIA law by slow-rolling and hiding Hunter Biden records. What are they trying to hide? We have some idea because in June 2020, we received records [] from the U.S. Secret Service showing that during the first five-and-a-half years of the Obama administration, Hunter Biden traveled extensively while receiving a Secret Service protective detail. During the time period of the records provided, Hunter Biden took 411 separate domestic and international flights, including to 29 different foreign countries. He visited China five times. The Secret Service records showed that countries and territories visited by Hunter Biden, between June 2009 and May 2014, included: Ethiopia and India on June 14-22, 2009 Argentina on September 14-17, 2009 France and Spain on November 9-13, 2009 Canada on February 12-15, 2010 Dominican Republic on February 18-22, 2010 Puerto Rico on March 20-27, 2010 China on April 6-9, 2010 Belgium, Spain, and the United Kingdom on May 5-8, 2010 UK, Egypt, Kenya, South Africa, Ascension Island, U.S. Virgin Islands on June 6-13, 2010 Denmark and South Africa on August 9-24, 2010 Hong Kong, Taiwan and China on April 16-22, 2011 Mexico on May 15-17, 2011 Colombia, France, United Arab Emirates and France again on November 1-11, 2011 UK and Russia on February 15-18, 2012 Germany, France and UK on February 1-5, 2013 UK and Ireland on March 20-22, 2013 China on June 13-15, 2013 Switzerland and Italy on July 26-August 7, 2013 Japan, China, South Korea and the Philippines on December 2-9, 2013 * China and Qatar on May 7-14, 2014 According to reports [=], then-Vice President Joe Biden and Hunter Biden flew on Air Force Two for an official trip to Beijing in December 2013. The records obtained by Judicial Watch from the Secret Service show Hunter Biden arrived in Tokyo on December 2, 2013, and departed for Beijing two days later. While it is typical for the families of the president and vice president to travel with them, questions have been raised about whether Hunter Biden used the government trip to further his business interests. I’ll report back to you if and when we get documents on Hunter’s latest activities! HHS PAYS $40K TO STUDY WHY KIDS “FAVOR WHITENESS AND MALENESS” Critical race theory is everything in the Biden administration, and showering taxpayer dollars on academics to push is exposed by our Corruption Chronicles blog -- which reports [==] the latest use – and abuse -- of your money. In yet another racial equity venture funded by American taxpayers, a private university is getting tens of thousands of dollars from the U.S. government to study the “developmental trajectory of children’s beliefs that white males—more so than black males, white females, or black females—best exemplify a person.” The three-year research project, to be conducted by academics at New York University (NYU), seeks to uncover why kids “favor Whiteness and maleness over other identities,” according to the grant announcement [=] issued by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), the agency doling out the cash for the study. The project is part of a broader HHS Equity Action Plan [] designed to transform how the agency does business in order “to concretely advance equity.” Under the overhaul a Minority Health Social Vulnerability Index was launched to help identify racial and ethnic communities at the greatest risk for disproportionate impact and adverse outcomes due to COVID-19 and a Racial Equity in Postpartum Care Challenge was created to reduce disparities and improve outcomes for postpartum “Black or African American” women enrolled in Medicaid, the government’s insurance program for the poor. HHS has also doled out millions of dollars [==] to “minority-serving institutions” charged with strengthening COVID-19 vaccine confidence among racial and ethnic minority groups as well as underserved communities. In the agency’s latest racial equity endeavor, researchers at NYU will receive more than $40,000 to study “societal assumptions regarding typical personhood and their effects on reasoning development.” The HHS grant announcement further specifies that the goal is to “uncover the development processes by which children acquire the belief that white males represent the default person—a pattern rooted in ideologies of androcentrism (centering the experiences of men) and ethnocentricism (centering the experiences of white people) prevalent in the United States.” The document goes on to state that “despite national rises in racial and gender diversity, white men remain vastly overrepresented across a host of domains within the U.S., from media, to politics, to clinical research.” That overrepresentation poses severe costs to the rest of society, the nation’s health agency writes, identifying the victims as “women of all races, men of color, and gender-nonconforming individuals.” The Biden administration is particularly concerned with embedded disparities in health, where clinical trials have historically prioritized the experiences, perspectives, and health outcomes of white men. “To address this issue, we must understand when and how the tendency to view white males as default people develops across childhood, as well as the environmental factors that underlie this phenomenon,” the HHS grant document states. Specifically, the government wants to know the developmental trajectory by which children’s default representations of people begin to favor whiteness and maleness over other identities, the domains across which children activate a white male default to guide social reasoning, and the sociocultural and ecological factors that can prevent the development of those beliefs. “Young children actively construct knowledge to make sense of their social environments,” according to the grant document. “As part of this process, children absorb complex streams of information from the sources around them, including parents, peers, and broader societal institutions (e.g., media).” HHS proceeds to explain that the beliefs children acquire tend to reflect the dominant ideologies embedded in their specific cultural contexts. In the U.S., those ideologies include the previously mentioned “androcentrism and ethnocentrism.” The taxpayer-funded researchers are expected to clarify the scope of children’s beliefs about who best exemplifies a person by testing the consistency of the belief across domains and uncovering the features of children’s sociocultural and ecological environments that underlie beliefs about who best exemplifies a person. “The diversity afforded by this platform allows us to capture a holistic picture of the phenomenon in question and the mechanisms underlying it, broadening both the empirical rigor and real-world impacts of our findings,” according to HHS. It will only cost American taxpayers $40,391, though the agency could obligate more funding at any time. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- It's been a long week, but I'm feeling energized after Thursday's January 6th Committee hearing. The ratings tell us people are watching, and the public opinion data tells us views on Trump's post-election conduct are changing. However slowly, the irrefutable evidence of Trump's dereliction of duty and violation of his oath are eroding his base of support. And while we all wish it would happen faster, its progress in the right direction. And speaking of the right direction, last month we gathered for a hugely successful Virtual Campfire, and I heard from so many of you that you loved the experience. I'd like to come together again this Sunday night via Zoom. We'll focus on the importance of the oaths our leaders swear and the duty each of them has to put our constitution and country before parties, presidents, or themselves. We will reflect on the hearings, highlight the exciting work we're doing in Michigan (the frontline in MAGA's war on democracy), and host breakout sessions for us all to meet other reasonable people of goodwill from around the country. [**RSVP: OATH & DUTY VIRTUAL CAMPFIRE**](https://www.country1st.com/oath_campfire?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=2) _Sunday, July 24th at 8pm ET / 7pm CT / 6pm MT / 5pm PT_ [](https://www.country1st.com/oath_campfire?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=3) | [](https://www.country1st.com/oath_campfire?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=4 "RSVP: Oath & Duty Virtual Campfire") [RSVP: Oath & Duty Virtual Campfire](https://www.country1st.com/oath_campfire?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=4)
---
I know it's just a couple days notice, but I hope you can make it!
Country First,
Adam
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Digest to highlight the important work of the 1/6 Committee. Our aim is to make this available to our members within 24 hours after each hearing. **MARK YOUR CALENDARS FOR THE NEXT HEARING:** **TO BE ANNOUNCED** **In Case You Missed It:**
* Rep. Kinzinger appeared on [Good Morning America](https://www.country1st.com/gma_kinzinger_discusses_1_6_committee?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=5) to break down last night’s hearing
* Rep. Kinzinger appeared on ["Face the Nation”](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2PcteaKinNaf6l7PNyCezzZS_1KaXSFyeg7D0Dd68Eywv1iHctMc3YqB4Ou3rLvAAWnr0y6_QKfKnrS3uCLZMHRWrUwWVK-X8sMpxCKZLO_ZC8&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=6) to discuss Thursday’s hearing, the subpoenaed Secret Service texts, and who else could potentially appear in subsequent depositions
* Rep. Kinzinger appeared on CNN to [discuss](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k4mhazw4P7Sy-uRL5i5Fioo&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=7) the former President’s dereliction of duty

**Who Gave Testimony:**
* **Matthew Pottinger** , former Trump White House Aide
* **Sarah Matthews** , former Trump White House Aide

* * *
Here are the major developments from the committee: **Congressman Kinzinger Calls Trump’s Inaction a "Dereliction of Duty"** In his closing statement, Congressman Adam Kinzinger (R-IL) had [strong](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=uMdfrsu_sbvlXpaGhkswPbJnAmRuy1Zuv3sbMT-tj1CiBdNqREtlh9UN3v-pPDHMK8iolZ9lBmCc8c83uUYsW237ONz-0qhwmSZ7dusWaEVtxR-dzlU9Un9jB90yX6UZfaXnfYsEYtEg5A7d3dBRFistfGOyczH8aIJKpzg78U-eon4cKFVyL8NWlHOB7JiK&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=8) words for the former President, calling his 187 minutes of inaction a "complete dereliction of his duty to our nation." Congressman Kinzinger’s response came after a 2-hour hearing focused on the former President's purposeful decision to watch TV in the dining room while the Capitol and the Constitution of the United States were attacked. The ninth and final hearing of the summer came to an explosive close as Kinzinger [laid](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=g6sofPIdZ5p5ObS5l8UuLWb6l-0YjczyIGxqFjtt2sqPtEQShGQuHoXnIq-nwi2VrT6bws8X8eEVXsoFWvU-ICbrEcxKMQDLAM0_RqEVoSZQSzsSNTGMJhoksI-87rKsOKmZShKtojYxvheWnkvHOfmR2PIm4BKPbOkHXvE_lroe68c2uhQS4d4CPFeTLlXo8XJPGjaoTpG49w3DvvNPxA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=9) into the former President and those that still refuse to acknowledge the tragedy of January 6th. He also [reminded](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OwehQGnYjrzpIc0rxaR28aVqWR_hO_uF0RFcZ1gk2B92W_9f7WAEFuL8rGbfDcQRwHobpC-WX7saXylGVfBXqA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=10) the American people of the importance of public servants dedicated to the rule of law and the Constitution saying, "laws are just words on paper. They mean nothing without public servants dedicated to the rule of law." **Steve Bannon Convicted by Jury of Contempt, Faces Up to Two Years in Prison** A Washington, D.C., jury found former White House chief strategist Steve Bannon guilty of contempt of Congress Friday over his failure to comply with a subpoena from the January 6 committee, which could result in up to a two-year prison sentence following a brief trial in which prosecutors argued that Bannon “chose allegiance to Donald Trump over compliance with the law.”

The jury deliberated for less than three hours after closing arguments Friday, and a guilty verdict was widely anticipated after Bannon’s legal team did not call any witnesses in his defense.

Bannon was found guilty on two contempt counts: one count for failing to turn over records to the committee and the other for never showing up to testify.

Each count carries a minimum prison sentence of 30 days and a maximum of a year behind bars. Bannon is expected to appeal. **Former White House Aide Resigned After January 6th** Sarah Matthews, one of the witnesses who testified, was the Deputy White House Press Secretary who worked alongside Kayleigh McEnany. She previously worked on Trump’s campaign and knew from this experience that his supporters took his words very seriously. Therefore, when Trump tweeted that Mike Pence "didn't have the courage to do what should have been done," even as rioters were storming the Capitol, she became very concerned. "It was essentially him giving the green light to these people, telling them that what they were doing at the steps of the Capitol and entering the Capitol was okay," she testified. A few minutes later, Trump tweeted, "support our Capitol Police and Law Enforcement" as well as the phrase "Stay peaceful!" Matthews, however, [felt](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=gSbgO3_D9AKUnDBIius4vpbQmDt5LhC2hcgmyOT5JMX49DiLjx9iX2NMurJyUVmuOexAp-wMyMms748NQw0gVif_0UERqWkNKCVSu0unLcmhPPRr8QuTWrHRIt0jaOfYyZHDwA9JsqK_6oTPX0eQu88aI2uR_3__Uf42or93RNoxgjlQPmysRGIy87Mu0KTe4_fVhiXZ22tUnuXxSJmLbv0q_iV5GS72G56CbO7nzkk&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=11) it wasn’t strong enough. McEnany then told her that Trump did not want to communicate to his supporters to be peaceful and stop the rioting in any way; Ivanka Trump was the one who suggested that he insert the phrase "stay peaceful," which he accepted after much back and forth discussion. Things came to a head when Trump released a video saying "we love you" to the rioters, and calling them "very special." Matthews said it was at that point that she made her decision to resign. "As a spokesperson for him, I knew that I would be asked to defend that. I knew that I would be resigning that evening," she said. "January 6th, 2021, was one of the darkest days in our nation's history," she reflected. **Donald Trump Did Not Want to Say the Election Was Over or Condemn the Violence** The Committee played raw [video](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLgQvms-MLHSM333B6myrrxdk6RGsSE9k7Av6TQp46F-4kSSckjgYyGC06h5oKiX_bTotorMXu8zoK4GOlnvLT7TGVO-yYK8kUf4aEO7Lf65L&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=12) showing Trump’s refusal to say that the election was over. The script prepared for him by staff originally said, "But this election is now over..." And as he read the script, he wanted this line taken out. "I don't want to say the election is over," he said, showing his unwillingness to communicate his acceptance of the results. Not only was he unwilling to say the election was over, he had a difficult time condemning the mob. He was visibly frustrated, when the script read, "You broke the law," in reference to the rioters. "You can’t say that," he insisted. "I’m not gonna — I already said 'you will pay.'" **Trump Felt “Let Down” by Former Vice President** "Mike Pence let me down." That’s what former President Trump [uttered](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr9Z8uII50Zj0Z9YGiH2-hnFk1anCn1wmC3r2KjyLZdwVsfF9i1LUnJvAQTMrbSrq_EegOljWhhPWaUCYSK06NQM&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=13) to one of former Vice President Pence’s staffers on the evening of January 6th. Those were the only words the former President had for his Vice President after a coup attempt, chants of “Hang Mike Pence,” and mob violence. Instead of condemning the attempted insurrection or offering support to his second-in-command, the former President of the United States said nothing. After watching the violence unfold from the dining room of the West Wing, Trump refused to tell the rioters, many of which were threatening the life of the former Vice President and other Members of Congress, to go home. Instead, despite the pleas of many of his own family and staff, the former President sat in the dining room for 187 minutes, or more than 3 hours. **Josh Hawley Seen Running From Same Mob He Encouraged** In new video released by the 1/6 Committee, Senator Josh Hawley can be seen running from the violent mob that descended on the United States Capitol. Earlier, Hawley (R-MO), had been photographed raising a fist in support of the crowd that had already started to gather outside the Capitol. Hawley has since used the infamous picture to [fundraise](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv9_4qA2E_C9PNBp2MtJu8o99cgo9bF7jtpHIGlVwRJJZdHQIE_MqoxGNO6VKyQhso-UBuvHYqfiP05HQv0MFZiO5iEGcwZuNQZnvVTE_Jtjd_18IVkPQbg2Ci98X9JlG6A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=14) for his re-election campaign. As the violence increased and the rioters [breached](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_PA_nNH0Da_jCJ3Safw4xOtqv4I6RATN7Jx0clFoC8fJ5OduHgnxLPjhHcGrhFXLPrllKJArHTsGSY2x4LmrZHUXHLa5zIfAKIa6xZWPKbeWTKuBK8XW4hbMvB8cl5Y7UQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=15) the Capitol building, Members of Congress were evacuated from the chambers. In two new videos released, Hawley can be seen running away from the mob to safety with his other colleagues. Instead of supporting the rioters, like he had when they were still behind the security barriers, Hawley felt the need to run. An audible laugh could be heard in the hearing room on Thursday night. **Pence Secret Service Agents Heard Telling Their Loved Ones Goodbye in New Audio** The 1/6 Committee played new audio of members of former Vice President Pence’s security detail making calls to their loved ones. In the [harrowing](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2Pcj7qgqQZsm0_uILgu3aDgAn6VfxKVw1pjD_3LLoqabIvh5lBYBzs3qnN-KNsz77iOggXtLllJL4JbEeXjWyVkX0&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=16) account given by an unidentified national security professional, members of Pence’s own Secret Service detail were calling their family members, telling them goodbye, as the Capitol was breached. After being evacuated, members of Pence’s security detail were concerned about being able to safely remove the Vice President, even worrying a lethal battle to exit the Capitol could be necessary. "It was disturbing. I don't like talking about it," the unidentified witness recalled, "but there were calls to say goodbye to family members and so forth. It was getting – for whatever the reason was on the ground, the VP detail thought that this was about to get very ugly." **Former President Made No Calls to Law Enforcement or Pentagon to Quell the Violence** Early reporting following the attack on the United States Capitol questioned why the National Guard was not called into the Capitol following the attack. Later, the former President and his allies spread a lie that he did call in the National Guard, but it was refused by Speaker Pelosi. In last night’s testimony, General Mark Milley, the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, [refuted](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=PiInCVHjZg_Lhb0RQ-dhd65x-kgtE5mgPY_mhiw2_irFY-40oYvWIbLmO_-JQYc9sjXCtOrlmgFv-u3l2C8o0iRrEL93pFauGomcwYLuS8M&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=17) that claim: "You’re the commander in chief — you’ve got an assault going on at the Capitol of the United States of America and there’s nothing? No call? Nothing? Zero?" Poking holes in former President Trump’s claims that he did call in the National Guard, General Milley was dismayed at the Commander in Chief’s refusal to command the United States military to stop the violence at the Capitol. Instead, the former President sat in a dining room and just watched. **Other News that May Be of Interest**
* More [hearings](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=_iXnL0bCffDuT3k_fuMSrAxQP2mNVEEdVtSFtRVqVfnLJ5myiXe5Txe7GO1hvorbHl-ltEjgVcJ4mcjtHv2dejVn98jQW-s1nKVJQ2cqZJqHObWhM7nxFARe7zULfJoPmI6ZF4MJLhT_GBdEQM1PTA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=18) to come in the fall, committee says
* Vice Chairwoman Cheney [reminds](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr9Z8uII50Zj0Z9YGiH2-hnFupgNMsV1YePRyTvbr4yiwvF7qP624Kwt-_529p8umx5hpH6TfcQBRZUcVSBwMcdw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=19) Americans of the history made in the hearing room
* House GOP [slammed](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAvxK1YdO8rp3odFoyWLSL900w-Fq9LR76E-MOb07bnIiPM9MQD6hMSkf9eTKe1nsIPwLb5SYwogcU2lInR8NrINe8Hhtm5WjxJsXbhzdNFpkq0vXBUfc3a35iNOsiUSJlZi523hjSdx4_xCZuSZyUL1KaHUbiL1-p1BLcefA-GBnj&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oath_campfire_digest_nd&n=20) for Tweet calling their own staffer a “liar and pawn”President.

* * *

clean_body: | Friend -- It's been a long week, but I'm feeling energized after Thursday's January 6th Committee hearing. The ratings tell us people are watching, and the public opinion data tells us views on Trump's post-election conduct are changing. However slowly, the irrefutable evidence of Trump's dereliction of duty and violation of his oath are eroding his base of support. And while we all wish it would happen faster, its progress in the right direction. And speaking of the right direction, last month we gathered for a hugely successful Virtual Campfire, and I heard from so many of you that you loved the experience. I'd like to come together again this Sunday night via Zoom. We'll focus on the importance of the oaths our leaders swear and the duty each of them has to put our constitution and country before parties, presidents, or themselves. We will reflect on the hearings, highlight the exciting work we're doing in Michigan (the frontline in MAGA's war on democracy), and host breakout sessions for us all to meet other reasonable people of goodwill from around the country. Sunday, July 24th at 8pm ET / 7pm CT / 6pm MT / 5pm PT | "RSVP: Oath & Duty Virtual Campfire" I know it's just a couple days notice, but I hope you can make it! Country First, Adam 1/6 Committee Digest Country First presents the next edition of The Digest to highlight the important work of the 1/6 Committee. Our aim is to make this available to our members within 24 hours after each hearing. MARK YOUR CALENDARS FOR THE NEXT HEARING: TO BE ANNOUNCED In Case You Missed It: Rep. Kinzinger appeared on to break down last night’s hearing Rep. Kinzinger appeared on to discuss Thursday’s hearing, the subpoenaed Secret Service texts, and who else could potentially appear in subsequent depositions Rep. Kinzinger appeared on CNN to the former President’s dereliction of duty Who Gave Testimony: Matthew Pottinger , former Trump White House Aide Sarah Matthews , former Trump White House Aide Here are the major developments from the committee: Congressman Kinzinger Calls Trump’s Inaction a "Dereliction of Duty" In his closing statement, Congressman Adam Kinzinger (R-IL) had words for the former President, calling his 187 minutes of inaction a "complete dereliction of his duty to our nation." Congressman Kinzinger’s response came after a 2-hour hearing focused on the former President's purposeful decision to watch TV in the dining room while the Capitol and the Constitution of the United States were attacked. The ninth and final hearing of the summer came to an explosive close as Kinzinger into the former President and those that still refuse to acknowledge the tragedy of January 6th. He also the American people of the importance of public servants dedicated to the rule of law and the Constitution saying, "laws are just words on paper. They mean nothing without public servants dedicated to the rule of law." Steve Bannon Convicted by Jury of Contempt, Faces Up to Two Years in Prison A Washington, D.C., jury found former White House chief strategist Steve Bannon guilty of contempt of Congress Friday over his failure to comply with a subpoena from the January 6 committee, which could result in up to a two-year prison sentence following a brief trial in which prosecutors argued that Bannon “chose allegiance to Donald Trump over compliance with the law.” The jury deliberated for less than three hours after closing arguments Friday, and a guilty verdict was widely anticipated after Bannon’s legal team did not call any witnesses in his defense. Bannon was found guilty on two contempt counts: one count for failing to turn over records to the committee and the other for never showing up to testify. Each count carries a minimum prison sentence of 30 days and a maximum of a year behind bars. Bannon is expected to appeal. Former White House Aide Resigned After January 6th Sarah Matthews, one of the witnesses who testified, was the Deputy White House Press Secretary who worked alongside Kayleigh McEnany. She previously worked on Trump’s campaign and knew from this experience that his supporters took his words very seriously. Therefore, when Trump tweeted that Mike Pence "didn't have the courage to do what should have been done," even as rioters were storming the Capitol, she became very concerned. "It was essentially him giving the green light to these people, telling them that what they were doing at the steps of the Capitol and entering the Capitol was okay," she testified. A few minutes later, Trump tweeted, "support our Capitol Police and Law Enforcement" as well as the phrase "Stay peaceful!" Matthews, however, it wasn’t strong enough. McEnany then told her that Trump did not want to communicate to his supporters to be peaceful and stop the rioting in any way; Ivanka Trump was the one who suggested that he insert the phrase "stay peaceful," which he accepted after much back and forth discussion. Things came to a head when Trump released a video saying "we love you" to the rioters, and calling them "very special." Matthews said it was at that point that she made her decision to resign. "As a spokesperson for him, I knew that I would be asked to defend that. I knew that I would be resigning that evening," she said. "January 6th, 2021, was one of the darkest days in our nation's history," she reflected. Donald Trump Did Not Want to Say the Election Was Over or Condemn the Violence The Committee played raw showing Trump’s refusal to say that the election was over. The script prepared for him by staff originally said, "But this election is now over..." And as he read the script, he wanted this line taken out. "I don't want to say the election is over," he said, showing his unwillingness to communicate his acceptance of the results. Not only was he unwilling to say the election was over, he had a difficult time condemning the mob. He was visibly frustrated, when the script read, "You broke the law," in reference to the rioters. "You can’t say that," he insisted. "I’m not gonna — I already said 'you will pay.'" Trump Felt “Let Down” by Former Vice President "Mike Pence let me down." That’s what former President Trump to one of former Vice President Pence’s staffers on the evening of January 6th. Those were the only words the former President had for his Vice President after a coup attempt, chants of “Hang Mike Pence,” and mob violence. Instead of condemning the attempted insurrection or offering support to his second-in-command, the former President of the United States said nothing. After watching the violence unfold from the dining room of the West Wing, Trump refused to tell the rioters, many of which were threatening the life of the former Vice President and other Members of Congress, to go home. Instead, despite the pleas of many of his own family and staff, the former President sat in the dining room for 187 minutes, or more than 3 hours. Josh Hawley Seen Running From Same Mob He Encouraged In new video released by the 1/6 Committee, Senator Josh Hawley can be seen running from the violent mob that descended on the United States Capitol. Earlier, Hawley (R-MO), had been photographed raising a fist in support of the crowd that had already started to gather outside the Capitol. Hawley has since used the infamous picture to for his re-election campaign. As the violence increased and the rioters the Capitol building, Members of Congress were evacuated from the chambers. In two new videos released, Hawley can be seen running away from the mob to safety with his other colleagues. Instead of supporting the rioters, like he had when they were still behind the security barriers, Hawley felt the need to run. An audible laugh could be heard in the hearing room on Thursday night. Pence Secret Service Agents Heard Telling Their Loved Ones Goodbye in New Audio The 1/6 Committee played new audio of members of former Vice President Pence’s security detail making calls to their loved ones. In the account given by an unidentified national security professional, members of Pence’s own Secret Service detail were calling their family members, telling them goodbye, as the Capitol was breached. After being evacuated, members of Pence’s security detail were concerned about being able to safely remove the Vice President, even worrying a lethal battle to exit the Capitol could be necessary. "It was disturbing. I don't like talking about it," the unidentified witness recalled, "but there were calls to say goodbye to family members and so forth. It was getting – for whatever the reason was on the ground, the VP detail thought that this was about to get very ugly." Former President Made No Calls to Law Enforcement or Pentagon to Quell the Violence Early reporting following the attack on the United States Capitol questioned why the National Guard was not called into the Capitol following the attack. Later, the former President and his allies spread a lie that he did call in the National Guard, but it was refused by Speaker Pelosi. In last night’s testimony, General Mark Milley, the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, that claim: "You’re the commander in chief — you’ve got an assault going on at the Capitol of the United States of America and there’s nothing? No call? Nothing? Zero?" Poking holes in former President Trump’s claims that he did call in the National Guard, General Milley was dismayed at the Commander in Chief’s refusal to command the United States military to stop the violence at the Capitol. Instead, the former President sat in a dining room and just watched. subject: Trump is about to take the stage

body:
| | | We’re sending a message that AZ is not for Trump | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xMmzB9JeK8RItuKbbOk_P9lCqTEhNBzIsKbJE8E7BsxBeA1LdnDMyhJ2eFCwKxaxEJ7y8h2UhqO8_iaymXs0YKYvS03seJrz6D7pYD5POShpvOyBo7NAJykL-o5abTlW3ELPWSvrdoGbGPJhJcILJuLnX-7CPzwUTv8jdqjzwE7J439rpC66OQzx6sFc9BNAPZjgf71CgHPuBAfvFwqOPfJwXGKE7CqNume8aHjsJ3ggRUFgiNK5GK-gn9xa6lukvZ9iM4jyb1p9GC012qO2M11LFkNVIKa-qTRL2sJYKo1-Lyjuj2jOYpuDAIY9eqVpBzpOMAc4PvVb00l9JEdkmS1NLF165kIKNHmwMkJ6AbMRajnAM_x8jd-PcCqaoDWL4Ay2GdhJbCFUI0wiRCdXudCrN5HhIX-zS7LMdlrrbQcg/3nz/8lH3WxK0Qn-bsnSfgDvc1Q/h0/uqs2d9tiqXDe8YxwIFVNdYbxEQ8aIm8GrgzgtFVyNhw)

---
| Team, for the last few hours, Trump’s hand-picked Arizona candidates have been up on stage telling lies and spouting off extreme theories.

But the warm-up acts are almost done, and the biggest threat to our democracy is about to take the stage. We’re still a few hundred dollars short of our $10,000 No More Trump Fund goal.

It would be amazing if we hit our goal right before Trump takes the stage to be able to counter-program his rally while he speaks.

But the warm-up acts are almost done, and the biggest threat to our democracy is about to take the stage. We’re still a few hundred dollars short of our $10,000 No More Trump Fund goal. It would be amazing if we hit our goal right before Trump takes the stage to be able to counter-program his rally while he speaks. name: Marco Lopez
subject: re: Trump in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
Friend, Donald Trump just stepped off the stage at his rally right here in battleground Arizona.
| | |
---
**Friend, Donald Trump just stepped off the stage at his rally right here in battleground Arizona.** With national Republicans all in to elect one of our extremist opponents, Kari Lake (R), and keep our state red, we cannot let Trump's attacks and lies go unanswered.

**[So please, if you're all in to defeat Trumpism and flip Arizona blue, will you give $5 or more now to power our movement to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48197900/357319978/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk797-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRjNDYwOS0zMDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCu86_2T7UD0izP-BpSKWd0MN8ZFC4iKJsjHUC_4aIg=)**
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirmed that we can defeat Lake and flip the governorship blue. We're the state that delivered the White House and the Senate for Democrats – but we still have a Republican governor.
**I know we can change that – but not without grassroots supporters chipping in whatever they can during moments like this. So please, friend, with the first votes in this race already being cast, I'm counting on you now:**
**[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more – anything you can give before midnight – to defeat Trumpism for good and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48197901/357319979/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk797-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRjNDYwOS0zMDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCu86_2T7UD0izP-BpSKWd0MN8ZFC4iKJsjHUC_4aIg=)**
Thank you as always.

– Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48197902/357319980/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk797-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRjNDYwOS0zMDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SCu86_2T7UD0izP-BpSKWd0MN8ZFC4iKJsjHUC_4aIg=) Thank you so much.

name: Shuwaski Young
subject: My heart is still heavy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91271/images/Young%20Email%20Header.png]
Friend,
My heart sank when I saw this tweet from Congressman Michael Guest.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91271/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-21%20at%209.57.03%20AM.png]
Yes, it’s saddening Guest remains laser-focused on maintaining his A+ rating from the NRA rather than proposing or supporting sensible gun control reforms .
But the timing of this tweet angers me. Guest had the gumption to tweet this while new information was announced about the Robb Elementary School shooting in Uvalde, Texas. Teachers who recounted the harrowing attacks in their hallways. Video footage showing a failed response on many levels. Children pleading and fighting for their lives.
Guest isn’t just anti-gun; he’s anti-safety, too. Mississippi has the nation’s highest gun death rate and the shortest life expectancy. These statistics aren’t coincidental. They are harsh realities on the violence in our communities from a lack of common-sense gun control — unnecessary losses that Guest chooses to ignore.
Bring gun control champions to Washington D.C. Rush $10 now to keep our campaign ahead of Michael Guest. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?refcode=em_07212022_heavyheart]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
RUSH $10 NOW TO KEEP US IN THIS RACE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_%20em_07212022_heavyheart_10]
Guest has done everything to keep guns on our streets.
Last week, he voted down H.R. 6538, establishing coordinated alerts for active shooters.
He has refused to renew the assault weapons ban. Since the ban expired in 2004, we’ve seen increased gun violence in schools.
He’s voted against background checks, which could keep guns out of the hands of dangerous individuals.
I’m a proud National Guard veteran and father. Gun control is common sense . If we don’t relieve Guest of his duties, any one of our communities could be next.
Can you please rush $100, $50, $25, or $10 to our campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?refcode=em_07212022_heavyheart]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_%20em_07212022_heavyheart_100] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_%20em_07212022_heavyheart_50] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_%20em_07212022_heavyheart_25] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_%20em_07212022_heavyheart_10]
Thank you!
Shuwaski Young
Democrat for Congress, MS-03
P.S be sure to check out our website and social media pages to stay up to date with the campaign!
WEBSITE [https://www.shuwaskiyoung.com] FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/shuwaskiyoungMS] TWITTER [https://www.twitter.com/shuwaskiyoung] INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/shuwaskiyoung]
Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress
Shuwaski Young for Congress

Jackson, MS 39205-0151
United States

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=1)
---
### July 22, 2022
Friend -- We hope you are enjoying your summer. We are just 17 days away from the primary election on August 9th and 108 days from the November election! If you haven’t already, make sure to find your polling place at [**myvote.wi.gov**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=NuzoZ2n1207BlUl6yQ2Ei2ExezP-3nmxsJViPmfe8Lo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=2) and plan to cast your ballot for your favorite conservative candidates. We want to be full steam ahead following the August 9 primary, and we need your help! If you haven’t already, sign up to volunteer [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=3) , or find your county party [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=4) and reach out directly. \- Team WisGOP |
On July 15, the Republican National Committee’s site selection committee voted to recommend Milwaukee as the host city for the 2024 Republican National Convention – the culmination of months of hard work from the Milwaukee Host Committee, local elected officials, and VISIT Milwaukee. This effort was led by WisGOP First Vice Chairman Gerard Randall and former RNC Chairman and White House Chief of Staff Reince Priebus, who deserve tremendous thanks for their hard work on behalf of the WisGOP. A Milwaukee convention would bring up to 50,000 visitors to the city and add $200 million to the local economy. Read our press release with statements from Reince Priebus and WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAWctXXnihqMmU5CKfNNYyX9Bz9FFiCM2N6EqYvcl15MUbLClL05lKhfF3gZ2TrLwKg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=5). | | Two years ago on July 23, 2020, Milwaukee community activist Bernell Trammell was [**killed**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7Eys0UyceutfcVQO9CN1tpr32RV0mrDM6T2V3CkW1p3njXCa324vaYIxzdccFJqOLKkbjG8YtefFZ9y0kQPnCWngoVODPdCHYcH9QmNuUvHk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=6) after he stood on a street corner with regalia supporting President Trump. The WisGOP remembers Trammell for his courage and passionate advocacy for the values he believed in. His murder, which took place in front of his own Milwaukee business in the middle of the day, shortly after he was seen holding a Trump sign, remains unsolved. On this second anniversary of his death, we hope you will join us in praying for Trammell’s family and appreciating the courage it took to stand up for his beliefs.
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=7) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=8)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**Wisconsin Dems in Disarray Over U.S. Senate Candidates, State of Party**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0TvjWvhNWJpFj67YCW1-p0NPy6qU0ZQLgni56hqvIzWCH-h5Pp_W8RQb1B1QebTaTMA0RiDvvf4Hv5Bl3rdPbOyjrsq4CEmI1JYgsnmq6pub&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=9)_
While liberal pundits acknowledge that “Biden’s shortcomings and progressives’ tone deafness — is part of what makes many Democrats so uneasy about this fall’s elections,” everyday Democrats say that the Democrat U.S. Senate candidates are “pretty hollow candidates, routine, tepid, measured and paid consultant driven.”
### _[**Tony Evers Lies About Working With Republicans...Again**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0f1ho99eRCepgssyFaXX2dpJyFwdHR-a871np6xNkDva8tIyUfyGzosB9Du1IX4yTAdxDxeb8xyVlc_1hsBwhoo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=10)_
Tony Evers is continuing his dishonest campaign that misrepresents his failed record. In a new ad, Tony Evers once again says that he’s working with Republicans – but history proves otherwise. Evers wants voters to believe that he works across the aisle, but he notoriously doesn’t speak to Republican leaders in the Capitol, took credit for their historic tax cut after he tried to raise taxes by $1 billion, and even secretly recorded their conversations.
### _[**Democrats Shift Blame While Inflation Reaches 40-Year High**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0TorCD7BfHyXwHCS7pKMhEyJ0-DtJKOJzPwDttPmKqWsXh2RoyIPK7eBv-np6f4EWlNws9VMOM_XPTAcmPynwWo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=11)_
The Bureau of Labor Statistics released June’s Consumer Price Index (CPI), showing that Joe Biden’s inflation dumpster fire has gotten even worse. Prices have risen by 9.1% over the past year and by 1.3% over the past month – the worst inflation numbers in four decades.
### **Worth the Read**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6foHSlNuuHcIBHmmSOSvOjf8NZyOD3-dikKF6PcK1OBQ1pUpLM0QweOauoi6OD1ptRr0PPSpHs71nIqmiVH0aL63WsjYeJe2Jh-OEd9zyX4KvGOltoqIbMcRmBCdZk652hNXyaT2y0Ph8RuN3zPWyg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=12) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=FZeaJrGkqb-JdJpt5MxOBEpI_jqKs28I8aFVnXsxusdZ1LXia0YVDJc3XWvol_Vn5GVdhyQwlFBKbQSq4Xmmnws-_ZHbYvxUV1e9P0tXirU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=13) | | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ENuISk7CLqWgWnFM3iaFqs-WlT79VGDBe9ppktlIcM6RkvOumQAaC8uGU2Hn_nUTFath2krBm6UO0sIZhY1DNnz5tYCb7WbKroBijEXc8-XjsxDHXBq24NN0JThd0xL_24UBPBz_cDaSpObIrz3pAL-6PvH6RoIqydHOrrLExNYELMGIKm7Pz_rGtlsgBiBOC7eixW6dk_p_wg4p0IyQPA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=14) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouMY56iXwJLM5qB_PC47au0bzS22xofmAtPCgceoJVQ2S-vwRWHfaVc2TZnIbYiC9jPq8TyDT4GEp5wHrfv6bP_VX_DJpHXuhBmX8Xgce_g_a2gomAdqunGZhmU4-VKtbQ3mTIIoKzzWKbyQDCCbSo-bXBimPHQ0FH5b90kuTci3nw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22_22_v1&n=15)

clean_body: The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin | | July 22, 2022 Friend -- We hope you are enjoying your summer. We are just 17 days away from the primary election on August 9th and 108 days from the November election! If you haven’t already, make sure to find your polling place at and plan to cast your ballot for your favorite conservative candidates. We want to be full steam ahead following the August 9 primary, and we need your help! If you haven’t already, sign up to volunteer , or find your county party and reach out directly. \- Team WisGOP | On July 15, the Republican National Committee’s site selection committee voted to recommend Milwaukee as the host city for the 2024 Republican National Convention – the culmination of months of hard work from the Milwaukee Host Committee, local elected officials, and VISIT Milwaukee. This effort was led by WisGOP First Vice Chairman Gerard Randall and former RNC Chairman and White House Chief of Staff Reince Priebus, who deserve tremendous thanks for their hard work on behalf of the WisGOP. A Milwaukee convention would bring up to 50,000 visitors to the city and add $200 million to the local economy. Read our press release with statements from Reince Priebus and WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow . | | Two years ago on July 23, 2020, Milwaukee community activist Bernell Trammell was after he stood on a street corner with regalia supporting President Trump. The WisGOP remembers Trammell for his courage and passionate advocacy for the values he believed in. His murder, which took place in front of his own Milwaukee business in the middle of the day, shortly after he was seen holding a Trump sign, remains unsolved. On this second anniversary of his death, we hope you will join us in praying for Trammell’s family and appreciating the courage it took to stand up for his beliefs. ---|---|--- | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our . ---|---|--- In Case You Missed It... While liberal pundits acknowledge that “Biden’s shortcomings and progressives’ tone deafness — is part of what makes many Democrats so uneasy about this fall’s elections,” everyday Democrats say that the Democrat U.S. Senate candidates are “pretty hollow candidates, routine, tepid, measured and paid consultant driven.” Tony Evers is continuing his dishonest campaign that misrepresents his failed record. In a new ad, Tony Evers once again says that he’s working with Republicans – but history proves otherwise. Evers wants voters to believe that he works across the aisle, but he notoriously doesn’t speak to Republican leaders in the Capitol, took credit for their historic tax cut after he tried to raise taxes by $1 billion, and even secretly recorded their conversations. The Bureau of Labor Statistics released June’s Consumer Price Index (CPI), showing that Joe Biden’s inflation dumpster fire has gotten even worse. Prices have risen by 9.1% over the past year and by 1.3% over the past month – the worst inflation numbers in four decades. Worth the Read | | ---|---|--- Top Sharable Content******

name: Freedom First Project
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator – a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out – __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too – no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._5uKYOw)**
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjA0LTM3Yzc1OGMzNTU4MzQ3OWZiOWY5M2M3ZjhmOGI2ZmE4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/S2v8XJYkdE6Xn2N5m5eVKw) to unsubscribe.
