name: All On The Line
subject: Climate Change and Redistricting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
You may very well be in a state where a heat wave is happening.
|
---

While you’re reading this email, you may very well be in a state where a heat wave is happening. Parts of the West Coast, Midwest, and East Coast are in conditions of oppressive heat. The Washington Post reports that 100 million people in 28 states are under a heat wave.
By now, we all know that climate change is an existential threat to humanity:
* 70% of Americans say climate change is affecting where they live a great deal
* 65% of Americans think the government should do more to mitigate climate change
* 97% of left-leaning voters are concerned about climate change

So, naturally, you would expect state legislatures to take sweeping action to combat one of the world’s most pressing problems. If the American public is fully in agreement, there must be incredible legislation being passed. Right?
Well, this couldn’t be further from the truth. You see, Republican controlled state legislatures have gerrymandered state legislative districts so that voters who recognize the importance of climate change have their voices diluted.
[**There is a direct link between combating climate change and redistricting. As districts become less fair and more gerrymandered, we move towards an anti-majoritarian system. The special interests who profit off of neglecting climate change will have all the power to obstruct environmental policy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48198508/357322023/1079915267?refcode=20220725_AOTL_F__climatechange1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ODIxMzM0LTZlMGEtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X0qnI612zMZ6SfLNSuVK5XFfrfdEWXaxUYbfc54DMng=) [**And this is why we fight for fair maps.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48198509/357322024/1079915267?refcode=20220725_AOTL_F__climatechange1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ODIxMzM0LTZlMGEtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X0qnI612zMZ6SfLNSuVK5XFfrfdEWXaxUYbfc54DMng=)

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48198514/357322029/1079915267?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20220725_AOTL_F__climatechange1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ODIxMzM0LTZlMGEtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X0qnI612zMZ6SfLNSuVK5XFfrfdEWXaxUYbfc54DMng=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48198515/357322030/1079915267?refcode=20220725_AOTL_F__climatechange1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ODIxMzM0LTZlMGEtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X0qnI612zMZ6SfLNSuVK5XFfrfdEWXaxUYbfc54DMng=)

In this undemocratic system where the public has less input, politicians will follow the money to oil and gas giants who will do everything in their power to continue to pollute this planet, destroy the environment, and expedite climate change.
As we continue to push for fair maps, inclusive maps, and a transparent map making process, we support a majority system where the American public will determine environmental policy. Think of how amazing this world could be: with excesses of clean energy, the preservation of green areas, and fewer extreme weather events.
[**Do you want climate change denialists making environmental policy? We sure don’t.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48198516/357322031/1079915267?refcode=20220725_AOTL_F__climatechange1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ODIxMzM0LTZlMGEtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X0qnI612zMZ6SfLNSuVK5XFfrfdEWXaxUYbfc54DMng=)
\-- All On The Line

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

You see, Republican controlled state legislatures have gerrymandered state legislative districts so that voters who recognize the importance of climate change have their voices diluted. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = In this undemocratic system where the public has less input, politicians will follow the money to oil and gas giants who will do everything in their power to continue to pollute this planet, destroy the environment, and expedite climate change. As we continue to push for fair maps, inclusive maps, and a transparent map making process, we support a majority system where the American public will determine environmental policy. Think of how amazing this world could be: with excesses of clean energy, the preservation of green areas, and fewer extreme weather events. = \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228** to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. name: American Update
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.

However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry a world-renowned heart surgeon many so called “health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.

“This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.” Says Dr. Gundry.

This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.

Dr. Gundry explains, “These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.”

The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home.

“It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain.

By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)

Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public free and uninterrupted showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.

“Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.”

The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.

So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.

Click here to watch the presentation: https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38450%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E7MlzlUUfLJHEpNtuMLgQA&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38450%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E7MlzlUUfLJHEpNtuMLgQA&sysid=1 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38451%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fCwLdXRhrPzxjQwx%2bOvJTw&sysid=1
https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38451%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fCwLdXRhrPzxjQwx%2bOvJTw&sysid=1
Watch The Video https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38450%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E7MlzlUUfLJHEpNtuMLgQA&sysid=1

Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.

Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: “If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints,” Dr. Gundry says... “Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible.”

Click here to watch the presentation https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38450%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E7MlzlUUfLJHEpNtuMLgQA&sysid=1

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z81fqmrc106kuu3mnoa7v7acln3ntvqhg5edpqc0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr3c71mspmdctk6tij6plgcprbddhie3jr2d316pqj9c31mph66c36m4rm9p70cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i61j73cllm1jr4d3662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgeapr0c5gm8oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z974ln5tul4qufkf4kgli9m3c6hg8drfsedjq1oo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob1chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsmvjbm0ollubesssj9c7tu8uid624r0qh4l1pvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob1chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z37t8iiejhergpvf0viigid5kkbvefn4cc2ijoc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob1chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Team Oz
subject: Still losing.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z29fqot0ajkqnoaqfntakj8n61ufk7fr0smiog5o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjcpj76d35mjjjao3ksiq78clke8rr4p1nm6pbctjlm3g7ec9gsiprcojl6lh7fduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74c36e6pbbc37m8qmcdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob5c3h2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfhddhs7nlkk15m547hnm9ttdme569j32fqnhl48_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob5c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm7lltvilt0g4ui9kgf5rkth0nceimu3u433p6e8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob5c3h2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbqacl18b870ncjftgqusor2cqdaear0q5ujikj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob5c3h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrhaebh1jg8h2el5vopektuc8nlk2p1f182ibpm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sljm0ob5c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Great America Update
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6274%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kXjuH41MPoUXcf6D4F2AvQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64780%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=veBvJ3u2xF3xB%2bp0WUeKBQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64781%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ydg90GSFFA8UwG%2bm7uo0mg&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64781%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ydg90GSFFA8UwG%2bm7uo0mg&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWd3qfbh_N

Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you
from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent,
conservative college located
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWd3qfbh_N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope you are having a fine day so far.
Thanks for opening my email.

Today, I'm writing to let you know about a
special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely
independent, conservative college located in south-central
Michigan where I work.

You may have heard of us on talk radio,
social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of
our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our
free online courses.

And though we're best known for educating
Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through
these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been
about a famous British author-C.S. Lewis.

In fact, our free online course, "An
Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance," has more
than 500,000 people enrolled.

C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light
during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my
absolute favorite authors because...

…While you may know him for his
landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant
philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we
decided to develop this online course.

Since launching "An Introduction to C.S.
Lewis: Writings and Significance," we've received an outpouring
of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope
of Lewis' writings.

We've also heard from many of our friends
that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to
announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your
home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small
group, such as a Bible study or book club.

We only made a few of these special sets, so
get this premium edition of "An Introduction to C.S. Lewis:
Writings and Significance" on DVD today. Given how popular this
course is, the DVD box set won't last long.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure
link, while they last:

https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor
Outreach
Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Fair Fight
subject: The hard work is paying off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
This progress is incredible and you are too.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48199906/357326114/1793776944?refcode=em_20220721_f_f_wins_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmQ1NzFmYS03ZTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RgnRWHtHBidkA6gkW3i_OXloAx272964Y44zEgnPpeo=&emci=5a63d59a-3509-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=c2d571fa-7e0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | You're incredible. Thanks to you and others in the Fair Fight community, we’ve had big wins in the first half of 2022, and we wanted to share our progress — and our gratitude — with you. This year, we have...
* **Mobilized a winning multi-racial, multi-ethnic Democratic coalition.** This led to record turnouts in the 2022 Georgia primary, with a 31% increase in Democratic voters and a 47% increase in Black Democratic voters since 2018. With tens of thousands of calls, 10 million texts, and the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline, Fair Fight volunteers reached out and supported voters in every corner of the state.
* **Endorsed and supported pro-voter Democrats for Georgia.** From statewide candidates like Stacey Abrams and Senator Raphael Warnock to seats in the state legislature and races at the municipal level, 84% of Fair Fight endorsed candidates won their primaries.
* **Combatted anti-voter efforts.** When anti-voter advocates tried to take over County Boards of Election or when Governor Kemp tried to force bills that made it harder to administer local elections, Fair Fight responded with a strong mobilization effort. More than 17,000 volunteers have been trained through our Democracy Watch and Democracy Warriors programs.
* **Fought back for human rights.** With the release of the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ decision, we mobilized and raised more than $82,000 for reproductive justice organizations.

And that’s just the first half of 2022! With midterms steadily approaching, we’ve got a lot more to do, but your support has made all of this possible — and will make all of our future voting rights accomplishments possible. We couldn’t be more proud and hope you feel the same. clean_body: This progress is incredible and you are too. Fair Fight | | | You're incredible. Thanks to you and others in the Fair Fight community, we’ve had big wins in the first half of 2022, and we wanted to share our progress — and our gratitude — with you. This year, we have... Mobilized a winning multi-racial, multi-ethnic Democratic coalition. This led to record turnouts in the 2022 Georgia primary, with a 31% increase in Democratic voters and a 47% increase in Black Democratic voters since 2018. With tens of thousands of calls, 10 million texts, and the Georgia Voter Protection Hotline, Fair Fight volunteers reached out and supported voters in every corner of the state. Endorsed and supported pro-voter Democrats for Georgia. From statewide candidates like Stacey Abrams and Senator Raphael Warnock to seats in the state legislature and races at the municipal level, 84% of Fair Fight endorsed candidates won their primaries. Combatted anti-voter efforts. When anti-voter advocates tried to take over County Boards of Election or when Governor Kemp tried to force bills that made it harder to administer local elections, Fair Fight responded with a strong mobilization effort. More than 17,000 volunteers have been trained through our Democracy Watch and Democracy Warriors programs. Fought back for human rights. With the release of the Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization decision, we mobilized and raised more than $82,000 for reproductive justice organizations. And that’s just the first half of 2022! With midterms steadily approaching, we’ve got a lot more to do, but your support has made all of this possible — and will make all of our future voting rights accomplishments possible. We couldn’t be more proud and hope you feel the same. = Thank you, The Fair Fight Team | = | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight PAC - All rights reserved. name: Ron Johnson
subject: Peter, Our future is counting on our actions today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $5 makes a difference. $5 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860075:6UHwGsVNI:m:1:3253819041:D2C9F3F5D37856D63C360E065E16E8A2:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.**As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860076:6UHwGsVNI:m:1:3253819041:D2C9F3F5D37856D63C360E065E16E8A2:r "Can I personally ask
you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?")**_

name: John Fetterman
subject: Hannity
body:
Hi, it's John Fetterman.
It brings me *no* pleasure to ask, but are you familiar with the host of a little show on Fox News named Sean Hannity??? 🤡
I’m just asking because my Republican opponent, Dr. Oz, recently made an appearance on Hannity’s radio show.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman]
And if you couldn’t guess already... My dudes Dr. Oz + Sean Hannity spent the entire time spreading BS lies + ATTACKING me and our campaign.
Another day, another MAGA Republican coming after Democrats like me + CommonGood. 🙄
Can you please rush a donation of $25 right now to help me + CommonGood fight back against future Fox News attacks? We gotta counter Sean Hannity with as much grassroots support as possible. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman]
During the interview, Dr. Oz said *yours truly* is a “radical,” then he said I’m “crazier than you think.”
Then he said the filibuster would “destroy the governance structure of our country.”
Yeah... Ok, dude.
Look, I’m not gonna stand for Hannity + Oz dragging my name through the mud. That’s just unacceptable.
That’s why I’m humbly asking for you to help me + CommonGood fight back against Hannity’s future attacks on Democrats (which, uh, happens kind of a lot).
Can you please rush a donation of any amount right now to help me + CommonGood fight back against Fox News attacks like this one? I’m counting on yinz + youse to have our backs on this one. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220723_CGVA_Fetterman]
Thank you so *very* much for your support,
John
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania

Arlington, VA 22215

The fight to protect our freedoms and our democracy will be fought right here at home. Politico named Oakland County, Michigan as one of the 20 counties nationwide that will decide the midterm election. I’m doing everything in my power to keep Oakland County and MI-11 blue, so = | | | = Here’s the problem: Republicans know Oakland County is important too, so we are expecting the GOP to dump loads of cash to mislead voters about Michigan Democrats and what we’re fighting for. This midterm election is unlike any other I can remember. Whether it's reproductive care, a fair economy, or strong public schools – so much is on the line in November. I can’t emphasize this enough: These midterms – and control of the House – could come down to Oakland County. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for doing everything you can to protect our Democratic majority. name: North Carolina Polling (via Team Cooper)
subject: Are you concerned about the future of our planet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
What we’re facing by 2050: |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48201018/357330683/823540626?refcode=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IyNWE1OS04NzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zy6_X3a_7kM5jg6tR87IB3a0Jny39L2T-RPsLxqwXak=&emci=d03c5dc9-d409-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
_Flooded cities. Massive storms. Unlivable heatwaves. Droughts that cause crops to fail._ If we continue on our present course, this is what we’re heading toward, Peter — and not in some far-off future. These are events we can expect by 2050, just over a quarter century from now. **Combating the climate crisis is among Roy’s top priorities as governor, and he wants to know if it’s a goal you share. Do you want our government to immediately act to protect our planet?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48201030/357330698/1869195072?refcode=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IyNWE1OS04NzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zy6_X3a_7kM5jg6tR87IB3a0Jny39L2T-RPsLxqwXak=&emci=d03c5dc9-d409-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48201041/357330718/1869195072?refcode=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IyNWE1OS04NzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zy6_X3a_7kM5jg6tR87IB3a0Jny39L2T-RPsLxqwXak=&emci=d03c5dc9-d409-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---|---
Climate change and warming temperatures will make our planet uninhabitable for future generations if we refuse to act. We’re already seeing the devastating impacts: raging wildfires and deadly heat waves in parts of the world that aren’t used to them.
Think about where you or your family — your children and grandchildren — might be in 2050. You probably want them to have the best possible future. And our elected leaders should too.
Roy is working hard to create a greener North Carolina, but it’s not enough. Our federal government (not to mention the governments of every other country in the world) must do more to stop climate change.
**Please let Roy know if you agree: Do you believe our government should take decisive action to protect our planet?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48201049/357330735/1869195072?refcode=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IyNWE1OS04NzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zy6_X3a_7kM5jg6tR87IB3a0Jny39L2T-RPsLxqwXak=&emci=d03c5dc9-d409-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48201052/357330746/1869195072?refcode=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IyNWE1OS04NzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zy6_X3a_7kM5jg6tR87IB3a0Jny39L2T-RPsLxqwXak=&emci=d03c5dc9-d409-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=43b25a59-870a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---|---

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64784%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tW1m24cLKwgof301IzUCRg&sysid=1)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64795%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bdWJ8cpRNaQrVvo5Uz%2f9FQ&sysid=1)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64796%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5ml6XiBgVpPvdXLaLiFrsA&sysid=1)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64797%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y3aRyhKUO%2bIoKpmsrUpJ4Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64798%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QpLRw5P%2fiNNvEAFpIYpVOQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64799%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FCy4SYp5%2fRyXxRDcfU%2fSLg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64790%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jk7j4yth434TGn882rr2lg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64791%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=krHXqJ5z57hvYqyS%2fRKvRA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64792%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LTvlKq60p2vE0gUgpnXDaw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64793%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j9plG8iWiS07jgm6GIh6ig&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64794%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6n1Ja%2bSJybpwdtcAV4kuyQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64705%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gczMzUNs5i932QHBqojnpw&sysid=1)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c64797%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y3aRyhKUO%2bIoKpmsrUpJ4Q&sysid=1)

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you’re thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, “what about them is influential?!” This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren’t, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here’s how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zimh4jl4sojlhelutd7bvv1tlu3jnalu493pt90g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb0tj7m8qe6clk6hr7aoj6mapn9c5hchqr3d1jc9rj6tbj63gjcsdj6mpn7cr76v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rjad1nmtgmcd74mmqefc5lclp238h1e8he4933clgeao74c9im9oh5u)
We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
"It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
"Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help."
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.
[**Click here to watch the presentation:**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbij0mihr9oou8fm8fsjccooh7f7167i33c86hg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge8oj5cjh2bs)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4bpde4636kj26pva5jmoru9kn7tcfeqhlcep9q0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge8oj5cjh2bs)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh3i4veloauc2kvbi2ta46co5i8o93l28hogdiqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge8oj5cjh2bs)

[**Watch The Video**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmfqdd24hihmo9vje647a2agds302fkk3v41j3lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge8oj5cjh2bs)
Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.
Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.
Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."
[**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvkig5v616b5n5lkd6sp84ardf31ev3forl23ig_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge8oj5cjh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z1f0grfah2c17d8hivol8hjtase0uubs6m5tttr0).

These amazingly efficient bacteria work by reconstructing your enamel (the outer layer of your teeth)...
Making them 20x stronger than a normal tooth...
Like a titanium shield against cavities, root infection and enamel erosion.
Some say their teeth are now stronger than a dental implant...

We have a big problem, friend: **Experts say that our race in Nevada could decide Senate control – and right now, polling shows me ****1 point behind my Trump-endorsed opponent, Adam Laxalt.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48205811/357349721/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1896-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzFjNGRmMC04YzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xu3FmiCwpPaVDd-xO4uoJnAryXh-Wo6EVcmE5hDLsxw=)
Republicans need to flip just one __ seat to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. With everyone from CNN to Roll Call ranking me as the **most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection** , the GOP is targeting me as their top pickup opportunity.
McConnell and his allies are already pouring more than $22 MILLION into attack ads against me, and Donald Trump just came to Nevada _– again –_ to prop up my opponent.
Friend, I’ve gone up against huge odds before to become the first and only Latina to serve in the Senate. I know we can turn this around and win – but not without your immediate grassroots support.

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: Leading the Charge to Protect Our Guns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r)
---
| [Stop Lefties and RINOs from Grabbing our Guns >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r "Stop Lefties and
RINOs from Grabbing our Guns >>")
---
| | | Hi Peter, Everyone who knows me knows I am a stalwart defender of the Second Amendment. I see through all the rhetorical games and political hoops leftists and so-called "moderates" go through to excuse their attacks on our Constitutional rights.

That's why I'm not just calling out their anti-gun B.S., I am actively leading the charge in Congress to overturn the new law infringing on our Second Amendment right to bear arms.

**My new bill, the "Shall Not Be Infringed Act," overturns the so-called "Bipartisan Safer Communities Act," passed last month. And WHEN we [take back Congress](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r) in November, I will make sure my legislation becomes law!**

---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r)
---
| But [I need your support](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r) to make this happen. Please chip into my campaign, as I fight the Biden/Pelosi agenda in Congress and build a strong movement of Fearless Conservatives. [Donate $10 >>
Donate $22 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r)
**I will NEVER betray the wisdom of our Founding Fathers and my oath of office to support politically expedient, anti-gun legislation. **

Red Flag laws are an abuse of power waiting to happen. They will enable gun confiscation without due process and can be easily used by begrudged people to target others they don't like.

This is immoral and illegal on its face, but particularly dastardly in our current "cancel culture" climate.

**I will continue to fight in Congress with every ounce of my being to defend our God-given rights.[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r)**

Supporting fearless conservatives is the only hope we have left to stop the Biden agenda and save our country.

Help me fight off the lies and smears being thrown at me by big-money Democrat donors, by making a [quick online donation to my re-election campaign](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r) today!

For Freedom,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860092:JwNDIsVNb:m:1:3317145305:2026B946056461C04816B5CFD04821B1:r)
Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Dan Goldman (personal)
subject: One month to go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
body:
Peter, I’m running between campaign events, but I wanted to take a second to extend my gratitude.
It’s no secret that our primary is competitive, but your support of this campaign has put us in a great position to win.

Our primary is in just one month, on August 23rd. It’s up to the voters of NY-10 to choose the best Democrat to defend our democracy and stand up for our rights in Washington. I know I’m that candidate.

I’ve fought for our democracy before, and I’m ready to do so again. I’ll bring bold, aggressive tactics to our fight against the GOP because the same old playbook just isn’t working. I will take a strong stand for reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, voting rights, commonsense gun violence prevention, and climate legislation. New Yorkers deserve nothing less than actual results, and that’s what I will deliver.

First, though, we need to bring home a victory in this election. I’m personally asking if you could give $31 to propel us through the next 31 days. Here’s a link where you can contribute:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goldman-em-q32022?refcode=em_GLD_FR_23rd1month_072322_cl_L1&amount=25]

Thanks very much.

- Dan

Paid for by DAN GOLDMAN FOR NY
Dan Goldman for NY
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.

|
---
| | | Friend,

I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I’ve been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I’d take a second to walk you through why I’m running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLD5KxhbBxeLSggomsJZ1OV6hgtHcULwWJgiyOPZ82BfSORKPWFOtjuF6-PaIEZq91JhmAMmcL7sw-poHcqaNXhIAMtnUrJwVCoSS6iymQdWl1XG-X6LNj4gEZj5zcrwWibRiYL8wxDoONVRrfbpIlWFAapTvSOLxzGISPaLuXMPuqkk6GbtfUjrpED81n3TuEoSZ2ejgB2q4Q0uf2OatHRsxmtrGslnBgm6yh7EioIjpqgZ-wB64eWp_D5qtc3YTSAQzeaZyHWEEAA4jeiCJeVgtVOCBQOb2DinnV4NVvFAN-kcdNvs3wVfuX7mdSV3iw0ammn1qex4T1u9H9N5JjOR1Cy6jCzNIX0nxgYl-pWIyuccutJLhEunS9VjV8uYAi)
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLD5KxhbBxeLSggomsJZ1OV6hgtHcULwWJgiyOPZ82BfSORKPWFOtjuF6-PaIEZq91JhmAMmcL7sw-poHcqaNXhIAMtnUrJwVCoSS6iymQdWl1XG-X6LNj4gEZj5zcrwWibRiYL8wxDoONVRrfbpIlWFAapTvSOLxzGISPaLuXMPsH07-1xjYNP7iHv_yF-i_JK4uSjq4SqBDL9YP0yKza_hss5Jrkv51W40sk4VDQiOv-CX2VX2GfqyKyYCIY16fP6wa6fo3O7YY9xOcEuxiYWDmumgFYxjQ_ujSfV6wX5S4GwBokOi_AQMfat2bEraR3jI04671JznxeCUh9IwD5VSTwu90oKNRLkNpKRBSvT-9Xu3dE8hizcTpArPxuxkrR)
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLD5KxhbBxeLSggomsJZ1OV6hgtHcULwWJgiyOPZ82BfSORKPWFOtjuF6-PaIEZq91JhmAMmcL7sw-poHcqaNXhIAMtnUrJwVCoSS6iymQdWl1XG-X6LNj4gEZj5zcrwWibRiYL8wxDoONVRrfbpIlWFAapTvSOLxzGISPaLuXMPuBUbt0r_16HwX8mIKGQVXxX5e1GuquesMayYQH1sLcwu9TJRIG_AAXYObyzUBGlpoA16dmz9LHsgdgyXm585SV9q-j1PofljAN912JZrQc-g3hbW71IXWoeBj-4Wzt_KrW8h3Qg8kf58xEwRDpgyS2QDxGWtGHChdQ7z0zJrzVB3g9MKBChv8GDJtpjdOI4cPYA97Ekswkgm1-qp0FM3DN)
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden’s policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that’s exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I’m teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLD5KxhbBxeLSggomsJZ1OV6hgtHcULwWJgiyOPZ82BfSORKPWFOtjuF6-PaIEZq91JhmAMmcL7sw-poHcqaNXhIAMtnUrJwVCoSS6iymQdWl1XG-X6LNj4gEZj5zcrwWibRiYL8wxDoONVRrfbpIlWFAapTvSOLxzGISPaLuXMPvh7paICRnasl0whGqFYexHm6GHKg-3mjKN8VkAtZvLZf1hQp42wkIbApwqwQ8-BAdOnYcmlhNb0K7zmRSFtvd6X63IwzW6K2G6l5RKaiRjMYQJsx9-V8ppESCsab7I5oSOgXQn4Qak__cs9MGAhVmpqvpDu78uh2ta_0-FM183WJbtQrLq4AfhKNkWZYc801WtAawfM8Gjbvon1eScET9T)
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn’t have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLD5KxhbBxeLSggomsJZ1OV6hgtHcULwWJgiyOPZ82BfSORKPWFOtjuF6-PaIEZq91JhmAMmcL7sw-poHcqaNXhIAMtnUrJwVCoSS6iymQdWl1XG-X6LNj4gEZj5zcrwWibRiYL8wxDoONVRrfbpIlWFAapTvSOLxzGISPaLuXMPuwFrnfpC_jjEW3sesxqQsAgO3VZaQhaXq1M_kJ57nddFEqvi2IXaStGNJwvxfFqJYEVNYxoMkoDkZjFV2RJojc1Fk9FNS-i4QieTP9Y4_e48p5cwI6htk-Ket5GLI96DSoDduBTRg94vlnK_LnAd1RDlgcZeS54WmgxmgJVDorhpCfs7yOZNb2sK8A6UaD8qlwOU396Csru-ZeOYxk8-P9)
---

This brings me to my main point: I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we’re outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLD5KxhbBxeLSggomsJZ1OV6hgtHcULwWJgiyOPZ82BfSORKPWFOtjuF6-PaIEZq91JhmAMmcL7sw-poHcqaNXhIAMtnUrJwVCoSS6iymQdWl1XG-X6LNj4gEZj5zcrwWibRiYL8wxDoONVRrfbpIlWFAapTvSOLxzGISPaLuXMPurKm0pQeVI3EmxMxtk4PN1zaA82-7cAGLGokZfSUJYIBfMzLZ32MNMpOAp6rvYfAh5WVVoQhxnrGQNPxcyVIA_A69s_5qteoYljopKShflAR5i1NSB_aE3x4OufAZMZZTBrsxAxaFNyJkdWpKleVikVC41_OR5Q9CIvu5FGI-N7UaPcTbxb0VbFZSSkOJ4jJsmHTQgO2CJOe0aGNgj6h9b)**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLD5KxhbBxeLSggomsJZ1OV6hgtHcULwWJgiyOPZ82BfSORKPWFOtjuF6-PaIEZq91JhmAMmcL7sw-poHcqaNXhIAMtnUrJwVCoSS6iymQdWl1XG-X6LNj4gEZj5zcrwWibRiYL8wxDoONVRrfbpIlWFAapTvSOLxzGISPaLuXMPs0qSuTEYYmyANLaIO1TG3tGauXZFoSJ3msFEysvdUEKSr0nDX_sVRHv5D99HBZaLGfO7rlDQWSlDDKLshIv5JGPV8sTWgwOW7LlDKucBltVQs7U_47uWyd-SdTMm3anXLZiPGovN1sRge-gdUzrRcMQfCtQ1hzdXC4_Rl6JvXcbmHox0eu6vDibqwH4ZS4-T5-YGiNuO79qN-Crz1tJmjP)
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3607a2507464a8c9bc36a2616e60dac&_e=pueVXPMiGJzqH_C4hEmG1rPhsm96wd010hVczZ0tdKrUJfSOJMHNx2LmUPgw-ciLjmyrHljPWeJVj38OchE4TLa2FGVLodGDgTTDksvswx7_OKsC2zXyc1BcUGUaFgSq5arVTGALhHURigf-thCrXVtM_wxhHZskot-jo6JF0YM3e3xzNkA5fqXNkplwkJIGxI-h7Z3OyIp_tOeVJsOeFbVwwe6PGx8ywj6mHk_ngUgzsz7E8K6seo3pUtW2SnT7Y0P2yxE7qDp6smhb5t3S5yJrG0hgQ9ypHaiwrhCH2g8kW_lkC6wPy0Ag-bi-8zrmMxR3lyUReAODzyD70rUFOTvt9wW2MS03GUxkHfTzZ7CXUVR11LW4j2iEp7Pk5JgZCeo_WJM3Rp1WQHCLEEGF1nel0sO8EmvFMASBL1mxqUBJ-Y7rO9pavGj1ixE5vwsDC7rswIPVtJjuORAjOi7HxQ%3D%3D)

I talk to folks every day who say they haven’t donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn’t close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we’re only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d96721874bd48b0831af307c5b52fb8&_e=MoKinELnfYQcMbKqMfwThuemHKIumQCKgdQvyr5aMGKaPqoqx1K4fs1HLeLiPALLzy9MiQ-esoXi1VJDuS5_dhkiJc28rcD-1lfHeeyvRYV-W6F3hznNRuwLk4T-iPCtL6mFMwlk2R3gQikNajiNGLmeM3q7mtqNnLl427J1geyi-5jQnvEvaPSjVul-wB3ctywREGNXY4W0Dv_xqRoduL6vSjf68ZTI4GjPiVu6itcLuXqxtIBJUAE7boXPtkGw96BjpXiXujkv2KFsDgpc9-ph0lFj5z1iYHY_di9GIXRb84ZXjB8GGvngx4hrtPsrSnS3vseY6ygSpQ4QqO9rDn3lqHBS9GO-KznU5oOvdrEWgdNG-YlWi6B2ijI5Wh15Ftximdab9qJniU4pYbaVNvkfwjL8BLuC3QdY0XFmx8spU5dOJxWAkOngHulHDIWrkRxOJRDk15O7vx3k4FM7636YR8W5CXdKj9FzBx_kY6c%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d96721874bd48b0831af307c5b52fb8&_e=MoKinELnfYQcMbKqMfwThuemHKIumQCKgdQvyr5aMGKaPqoqx1K4fs1HLeLiPALLzy9MiQ-esoXi1VJDuS5_dhkiJc28rcD-1lfHeeyvRYV-W6F3hznNRuwLk4T-iPCtL6mFMwlk2R3gQikNajiNGLmeM3q7mtqNnLl427J1geyi-5jQnvEvaPSjVul-wB3ctywREGNXY4W0Dv_xqRoduL6vSjf68ZTI4GjPiVu6itcLuXqxtIBJUAE7boXPtkGw99SfpC9GHtjWdLzE2VU4pryxL-8nsIiGJgkM3INmZ9DuBiCliYRo2F3VwHh6yNyKsIxlOWOs46OihvdnAAq69uh-_x6gFd2Gx-lNtEK5qrY19QpDQa_zp7_bmL0WCRjFBuOytf8Ul1XRkHhlaf1zzQprnYw4XNFcJdQfopLRAmsaPFoCa8kRJUO03XqcppQDWMiUHld6dqtfkLOaSH9I5uG2HlmF9KDftgYcKhTy5qo%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d96721874bd48b0831af307c5b52fb8&_e=MoKinELnfYQcMbKqMfwThuemHKIumQCKgdQvyr5aMGKaPqoqx1K4fs1HLeLiPALLzy9MiQ-esoXi1VJDuS5_dhkiJc28rcD-1lfHeeyvRYV-W6F3hznNRuwLk4T-iPCtL6mFMwlk2R3gQikNajiNGLmeM3q7mtqNnLl427J1geyi-5jQnvEvaPSjVul-wB3ctywREGNXY4W0Dv_xqRoduL6vSjf68ZTI4GjPiVu6itcLuXqxtIBJUAE7boXPtkGwVtoC10FaF-1LL5rAolNjlM_Mn8lf45mxTrNl4UbqIINR6WbVstaf4IaWlmdMv4iz_e9MxyRY8AoE859YrTlrupgDovQdxtOENo3t_0dHDTIo75Z5BQombgC6gGY5uOK_CLyirUJrFwF8oWpVEu5cOROb27aByVPutXPDTqRGVhR78USrFff-0k8ol78ru5pMigNE5E50-Geo8O3517QZkIe90Yj7xXwylxQTd6sT-CE%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=097c7ccee7e043a885c258b08e474b6c&_e=I8WxVSK5k3P0b6tIDwWIlxzXSidUi1rmZY5_AHuwHEBlzAJe_tmhXBRTGW7-_mSWWw9eyy535PC4ACpDEfTH5ZGapr75HhvaX2ENJuYybvThSDuOL_-NZGt-QDEZ75sCjJ77Bm3_Vu7aBcZo_Zss6FZjQcQ0qg9ByrMZVJ0DdlC5jeR7Ar5eEaZBjpAno1flD_oTyYqwOsAoWhfYn8rRXcmiN5P5TsvOwfaljwLl1g68zTdXqs7YWyHEAIptY-YfhSPGa61rdZho0P2F5g4__z14CVlpXjo0EgqDGSNe7Zm8p-ZGGvVb1pGmZsyduklQXyMvvkQ1K8OKIy2B5Pv_bPyNluChOWLTCYb-FnID0y7QcyXCO7LG-N4AJyF0DS5sJqmbcnrT5wY2deQKKscOUm1F6bSl4JolzH206OZ5zPR4QuJCRVxXEBtYCnT2VFkr)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=097c7ccee7e043a885c258b08e474b6c&_e=I8WxVSK5k3P0b6tIDwWIlxzXSidUi1rmZY5_AHuwHEBlzAJe_tmhXBRTGW7-_mSWWw9eyy535PC4ACpDEfTH5ZGapr75HhvaX2ENJuYybvThSDuOL_-NZGt-QDEZ75sCjJ77Bm3_Vu7aBcZo_Zss6FZjQcQ0qg9ByrMZVJ0DdlC5jeR7Ar5eEaZBjpAno1flD_oTyYqwOsAoWhfYn8rRXcmiN5P5TsvOwfaljwLl1g5_3LGzGVRvgvioxdpdfDoAgYqvVVM5ERwRqBIfYx8dg7fO9ebpmkG5zyK-6Onn_0v4fHrgZkDXnPlCFcTDxApfqkkHu8VrKxGwHZYsh4tlqu2AteJw9mcc438gCf3k2gG1SU_K7ioNL73F1IewQhiPpMvmWsa4rGowEHhNRRth0onZiyWjhumRVKnstEvPgNvlfCwt9YpkMzjnGuudV73b) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=097c7ccee7e043a885c258b08e474b6c&_e=I8WxVSK5k3P0b6tIDwWIlxzXSidUi1rmZY5_AHuwHEBlzAJe_tmhXBRTGW7-_mSWWw9eyy535PC4ACpDEfTH5ZGapr75HhvaX2ENJuYybvThSDuOL_-NZGt-QDEZ75sCjJ77Bm3_Vu7aBcZo_Zss6FZjQcQ0qg9ByrMZVJ0DdlC5jeR7Ar5eEaZBjpAno1flD_oTyYqwOsAoWhfYn8rRXcmiN5P5TsvOwfaljwLl1g61DIiOXK2DzG_thrydqLVndhmptjooTYxcOz8JHeSvToJzR9_cIQvK5WMSXd9S4DVqDJlKxSXiB6qMKLGn4GzpLyE8d5xItOla7FD_utK58AkAMvI0t3EwfatWKymyv0QMbpvFRnzxqbfzRGtz-OGLiVxGO3pcN27qlJUt4nS91qxbjdwvec2cH7Y5njAdzJ89RIMKzrJ_7VwpOPqIYKNH)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
