clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48210861/357369076/371725260?refcode=E17130-20220723-Dogs4Becca-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBkMjRlZi05MzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMT7tr41UO2lOI5YzxkAY0cs0wOFpYUy_Wm0GTe435Q=) If there’s one thing we know for sure, it’s that dogs can always sniff out a good human. And when it comes to Becca, they know she isn’t one of those all-bark-no-bite types. She does what she says she’ll do – and she won’t roll over for anyone. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48210862/357369077/371725260?refcode=E17130-20220723-Dogs4Becca-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBkMjRlZi05MzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMT7tr41UO2lOI5YzxkAY0cs0wOFpYUy_Wm0GTe435Q=)** Also, Becca keeps dog bones on her at most campaign events – which seems to be winning over the hearts of dogs and votes of their owners. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48210863/357369078/371725260?refcode=E17130-20220723-Dogs4Becca-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBkMjRlZi05MzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMT7tr41UO2lOI5YzxkAY0cs0wOFpYUy_Wm0GTe435Q=) Over the past year, we’ve built the most robust grassroots campaign of any candidate in this race. And because corporate PACs don’t keep Becca on a short leash, you know where her loyalty lies: With the people (and PUPPIES!) of Vermont. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48210864/357369079/371725260?refcode=E17130-20220723-Dogs4Becca-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBkMjRlZi05MzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMT7tr41UO2lOI5YzxkAY0cs0wOFpYUy_Wm0GTe435Q=) **We trust Becca to fight for ALL Vermonters as our next Member of Congress – and dogs do too. Let’s bring home a win for the people and puppies of Vermont on August 9th.[Throw us a bone here: Pitch in $5 or more to help us send Becca to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48210865/357369080/371725260?refcode=E17130-20220723-Dogs4Becca-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBkMjRlZi05MzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMT7tr41UO2lOI5YzxkAY0cs0wOFpYUy_Wm0GTe435Q=)** | **[THROW US A BONE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48210866/357369081/371725260?refcode=E17130-20220723-Dogs4Becca-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBkMjRlZi05MzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MMT7tr41UO2lOI5YzxkAY0cs0wOFpYUy_Wm0GTe435Q=)**

**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. name: Kristi Noem
subject: Patriot, this is your last chance to get your signed copy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | 🚨🚨 **LAST AND FINAL CALL TO CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY** 🚨🚨

Hi there Patriot,

This is your _**LAST AND FINAL CALL**_ to secure your signed copy of my new memoir, _Not My First Rodeo_! Because fewer than 50 signed copies remain!

Copies have been flying off the shelves, and we are down to our last box. I wish I could sign a copy for every conservative supporter, but sadly this exclusive offer must come to a close.

_**[So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860608:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860608:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "Kristi Noem Book")
---

**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860608:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

This memoir is incredibly important for every Conservative to read because America must return to the values my ranch upbringing instilled in me like: grit, hard work, and rugged individualism.
**_Not My First Rodeo_ by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860608:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

_**[So get your signed copy today before we must end this offer for good.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860608:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "So get your
signed copy today before we must end this offer for good. ")**_

Thanks,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860608:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "Kristi Noem Book")

Kristi Noem
Governor of South Dakota
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860609:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860609:JSonwsVON:m:1:3299561967:88C20B5BE30478EF6CB8F419482B6B8C:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: He wants a 1901 abortion ban to go into effect. 1901. You can stop him from torturing women and girls with these throwback policies by helping the Democratic Attorneys General Association put good AGs in every state.
body:
Our frontline against creeping fascism
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **They're our last line of defense against creeping fascism.** Right Wing Arizona AG Mark Brnovich---Republican, of course--is petitioning an Arizona court to allow an abortion ban from 1901 to go into effect, banning abortion for every woman in Arizona, except when her life is at risk. Women who will suffer bodily trauma from pregnancies with severe complications, 10 yr old rape victims, 12 yr olds molested by a member of the family, **_this soulless cretin wants to force every one of them to give control of their bodies, mental health, economic well-being--THEIR LIVES, to the state. _** Luckily, we have just the answer for Brnovich's evil, electing Kris Mayes the next Arizona Attorney General, a dedicated public servant who has won statewide office in Arizona in the past and, most importantly, an abortion rights fighter who will ensure that office is occupied by someone who will _always_ protect the right to choose. Sadly, the story in Arizona is not unique. **_In Ohio, Attorney General David Yost called the 10 yr old girl who was raped and, in a what became a national story, had to flee to Indiana to get an abortion, a "liar." _**This craven zealot said a 10 yr old girl just made it up...until the rapist was arrested in Columbus and Yost had to retreat to the safety of (for once) shutting up.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta36d3961-4bc6-4b72-b139-f1ece74e1e50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_The Democratic Attorneys General Association takes on the Yosts and Brnovichs in every state across the country, electing Democrats like Kris Mays who will protect our control over our bodies, our right to vote, our right to breathe air that doesn't give us cancer and many other things we don't even think about._** **_We must help them prevent Republicans from rigging our elections, taking over women's bodies and handing out AR-15s to criminals and terrorists wihtout so much as a background check._** **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Attorneys General Association?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e4e8805-2374-44f6-8a14-fdb4a73dcda4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** Thank you so much for protecting our democracy and our bodily autonomy. Cliff

clean_body: Our frontline against creeping fascism | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, They're our last line of defense against creeping fascism. Right Wing Arizona AG Mark Brnovich---Republican, of course--is petitioning an Arizona court to allow an abortion ban from 1901 to go into effect, banning abortion for every woman in Arizona, except when her life is at risk. Women who will suffer bodily trauma from pregnancies with severe complications, 10 yr old rape victims, 12 yr olds molested by a member of the family, this soulless cretin wants to force every one of them to give control of their bodies, mental health, economic well-being--THEIR LIVES, to the state. Luckily, we have just the answer for Brnovich's evil, electing Kris Mayes the next Arizona Attorney General, a dedicated public servant who has won statewide office in Arizona in the past and, most importantly, an abortion rights fighter who will ensure that office is occupied by someone who will always protect the right to choose. Sadly, the story in Arizona is not unique. In Ohio, Attorney General David Yost called the 10 yr old girl who was raped and, in a what became a national story, had to flee to Indiana to get an abortion, a "liar." This craven zealot said a 10 yr old girl just made it up...until the rapist was arrested in Columbus and Yost had to retreat to the safety of (for once) shutting up. | | | | | | The Democratic Attorneys General Association takes on the Yosts and Brnovichs in every state across the country, electing Democrats like Kris Mays who will protect our control over our bodies, our right to vote, our right to breathe air that doesn't give us cancer and many other things we don't even think about. We must help them prevent Republicans from rigging our elections, taking over women's bodies and handing out AR-15s to criminals and terrorists wihtout so much as a background check. Thank you so much for protecting our democracy and our bodily autonomy. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211364/357370763/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODZmMGE5Zi05NDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rCz1n39GZJmva7OThxmVQFmpuZY7nbyA-95y5P9ybY=)
---
Peter,

Our grassroots campaign has earned over a dozen more endorsements from incredible leaders and organizations all across our state. From elected officials to labor unions to local Democratic clubs, it's an honor to have these folks on my team.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211365/357370764/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODZmMGE5Zi05NDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rCz1n39GZJmva7OThxmVQFmpuZY7nbyA-95y5P9ybY=)
**When I set out to become your next U.S. senator, I knew that building these coalitions across the state would be integral not just to winning, but to really understanding the needs of my community.** I'm running for Senate to serve families like yours and work for solutions to the biggest problems you face – and that starts with listening.
So, since entering this race, I have zig-zagged all over Missouri, meeting with local advocacy groups, with seasoned legislators, with town councils, with local leaders, and with countless Missourians. It's been the experience of a lifetime and an immeasurable honor.
Every time I meet with folks on the campaign trail, I come to know my state even more deeply, and I'm reinvigorated by the importance of this race and what winning it will mean for American families.
**I am so proud to have the endorsements of these folks, but more than that, I am grateful to be able to learn from them, build community with them, and make change alongside them.**
But at the end of the day, everything that we've accomplished comes back to grassroots supporters like you, Peter. You're the lifeblood and backbone of this campaign. **When we win on Election Day, it'll be because folks like you stood with me every step of the way.[So please, if you have anything extra to spare tonight, can you make a grassroots donation to power our campaign to victory and bring compassion back to Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211366/357370765/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODZmMGE5Zi05NDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rCz1n39GZJmva7OThxmVQFmpuZY7nbyA-95y5P9ybY=)**

body:

| | | | Here's the TRUTH about the January 6th committee & their ridiculous show trials:

IT'S ILLEGITIMATE!

The only rule setting up this committee was that Nancy Pelosi is OFF LIMITS....
-> We CAN'T know what Nancy Pelosi's texts were.
-> We CAN'T know what she said to the Sergeant of Arms
-> We CAN'T know what she said to the Capitol Police officers

**They don't want this to be fair.**

They don't want Republicans asking questions.

They want a predetermined, POLITICAL outcome because they have NOTHING else to run on for the 2022 midterms!
**DO YOU AGREE THIS IS A SHAM COMMITTEE?**

name: Jen Jordan
subject: PETITION: Tell the Senate to protect access to contraception
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jen Jordan, Inc
body:
We must act now.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211759/357372176/1460579386?refcode=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWMwODIwNy05NjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sj1xW6v_CTu89L-DhVk2KKo5v3jkjSNdvay1zOMHVZk=)
---
The House just passed a bill that would federally protect the right to contraception.

We must act now to preserve our progress from right-wing attacks. [**Tell the Senate to protect the constitutional right to contraception today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211760/357372177/-1419914419?ms=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWMwODIwNy05NjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sj1xW6v_CTu89L-DhVk2KKo5v3jkjSNdvay1zOMHVZk=&emci=6408ea67-f209-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=65c08207-960a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168) ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211761/357372178/-1419914419?ms=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWMwODIwNy05NjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sj1xW6v_CTu89L-DhVk2KKo5v3jkjSNdvay1zOMHVZk=&emci=6408ea67-f209-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=65c08207-960a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168)**** When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last month, we saw that the extremist majority is willing to overlook decades of judicial precedent. That’s why it is more important than ever that Congress protect the rights we have fought for over the past several decades.

Far-right Republicans are on a mission to undo social progress across the country, and the decision to overturn _Roe_ was only the beginning. In his concurring opinion for the case that overturned _Roe_ , Justice Clarence Thomas wrote that the Supreme Court ought to revisit landmark cases that protected fundamental rights — including access to contraception.

The GOP has moved aggressively to pass their agenda at the state level and within the judicial branch. **We have every reason to fear more restrictive legislation here in Georgia should future court rulings further erode our rights.**

So we need federal action now, and we need to put pressure on the Senate to do its part. [**Click here to sign our petition and call on the Senate to enshrine the right to contraception into federal law →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211762/357372179/-1419914419?ms=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWMwODIwNy05NjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sj1xW6v_CTu89L-DhVk2KKo5v3jkjSNdvay1zOMHVZk=&emci=6408ea67-f209-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=65c08207-960a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168)

Thank you,

Jen Jordan | | | **Democratic State Senator Jen Jordan (pronounced Jer-Dun) has spent her legal career fighting for Georgians. Because of her real-life experience in the courtroom and out of it, Jen knows that now, more than ever, we need an Attorney General who will take a stand and fight for the rights of each and every Georgian.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211763/357372180/1460579386?refcode=EM_PET_220723BC_N_JJ_FULL_6_NG_N_BioBox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWMwODIwNy05NjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sj1xW6v_CTu89L-DhVk2KKo5v3jkjSNdvay1zOMHVZk=)****

clean_body: We must act now. = The House just passed a bill that would federally protect the right to contraception. We must act now to preserve our progress from right-wing attacks. ** When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last month, we saw that the extremist majority is willing to overlook decades of judicial precedent. That’s why it is more important than ever that Congress protect the rights we have fought for over the past several decades. Far-right Republicans are on a mission to undo social progress across the country, and the decision to overturn Roe was only the beginning. In his concurring opinion for the case that overturned Roe , Justice Clarence Thomas wrote that the Supreme Court ought to revisit landmark cases that protected fundamental rights — including access to contraception. The GOP has moved aggressively to pass their agenda at the state level and within the judicial branch. We have every reason to fear more restrictive legislation here in Georgia should future court rulings further erode our rights. So we need federal action now, and we need to put pressure on the Senate to do its part. Thank you, Jen Jordan | | | Democratic State Senator Jen Jordan (pronounced Jer-Dun) has spent her legal career fighting for Georgians. Because of her real-life experience in the courtroom and out of it, Jen knows that now, more than ever, we need an Attorney General who will take a stand and fight for the rights of each and every Georgian. =** Paid for by Friends of Jen Jordan, Inc. | **_Ken Paxton is ready to criminalize same-sex relationships in Texas._** | **“Texas AG says he’d defend sodomy law if Supreme Court revisits ruling”** \- _The Washington Post_
---

He’s dead-set on turning our state into a haven for far-right extremism where people who don’t fit in his warped conception of who belongs are targeted by the state.
He sued to prevent doctors from providing lifesaving abortion care. He wants to JAIL gay people. I’m sure there’s even worse to come.
**Friend, the government has no place in Texans’ bedrooms.**
Under my leadership, LGBTQ+ Texans will be safe from persecution in our state. NO ONE should be attacked for who they are or who they love. But until then, I won’t let Paxton or his GOP cronies get away with their abhorrent, homophobic radicalism.

body:
With the Supreme Court poised to overturn the right to marriage equality, all GOP congressmen in Virginia voted against protecting it.

|
---
Derek, Recently, the U.S. House passed the Respect for Marriage Act, the first step in codifying the right to marriage equality for all Americans. But we’re disappointed to share that EVERY Republican Congressman from Virginia voted against the bill. **[That’s why we’re asking you to contribute to the Virginia Democrats: to help make sure we keep Control of Congress in Democratic hands and away from these congressmen who refuse to support the right of Virginians to marry who they love.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48212714/357376875/-118115906?refcode=dpva-em-220722-cruz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I0MjAxYy05ODBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtqMS2cTkUBO7202sYr-mrVGCga88VKVSLP6z8cXnJ8=)** Reps. name: GOP Presidential
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpoqvbs3j634u6tuqr2c9leh7bqcp0g5qbtjsci8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge1ob6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongelo6bd5gcpjm7dlkcli7as36edor9chm64pnecjgs4qe1d3mepqj8sr1e6p3fduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74c36e6rjad37m8pmcd30m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
"It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
"Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help."
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.
[**Click here to watch the presentation:**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7u03f6jvgeie98qkv2uigo5icibocgqu575dn9g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge1ob6c1h2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrcupfudl2p21iatlqtokdhg2kfhsbhelfmecchg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge1ob6c1h2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z80iimue6uhb6r0oi607r29s69jevkc6l5u1leoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge1ob6c1h2bs)

[**Watch The Video**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7pb07fvfsjtc0prftuauspjhim134qajgq75818_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge1ob6c1h2bs)
Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.
Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.
Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."
[**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp2gonl55ve0mltr5i52jfmusa9o3666rn7v0cg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slge1ob6c1h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb9jk4dlk1ljsluur5cojfd76bq7p9i8avm35ed8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c3im1o71cpg649fg)

I’ll be blunt – our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48213657/357380456/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRmNGJjZi05ODBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bG39xYB6fnSnk_7gSNk5-uRqeYtaWTnSk-tAft1UzR8=)

Folks, I’ll be blunt – our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be.
**[(If that’s all you need to hear, you can rush a donation to our team now, right here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48213659/357380458/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRmNGJjZi05ODBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bG39xYB6fnSnk_7gSNk5-uRqeYtaWTnSk-tAft1UzR8=)**
With control of the Senate in the balance, we knew that Republicans would use every trick in the book to try to flip this seat. But thanks to people like you we’ve been able to stay in this fight and push back at every turn.
But now, just a week away from the end of the month, we are falling short. To make up some ground, I’m setting a one-day $40,000 fundraising goal.
I know $40,000 in 24 hours seems tough, but with the GOP spending over $21 million attacking my record, we can’t afford not to fight back. Falling behind this close to the election would mean cutting back in places where we need to ramp up. **[That’s why I’m asking if you can rush $3 or more to help us reach our 24-hour goal and keep our campaign on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48213661/357380460/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRmNGJjZi05ODBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bG39xYB6fnSnk_7gSNk5-uRqeYtaWTnSk-tAft1UzR8=)**
| | [RUSH $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48213663/357380462/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRmNGJjZi05ODBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bG39xYB6fnSnk_7gSNk5-uRqeYtaWTnSk-tAft1UzR8=)
---
The outcome of this race will rest on our ability to fight back against GOP smears and deliver our message to Granite Staters. We can’t do either if we don’t make up some ground, so I hope that I can count on you to help me close the gap.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Falling behind this close to the election would mean cutting back in places where we need to ramp up. = | | = The outcome of this race will rest on our ability to fight back against GOP smears and deliver our message to Granite Staters. We can’t do either if we don’t make up some ground, so I hope that I can count on you to help me close the gap. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

Chris’s life has been dedicated to defending our democracy, as a voting rights lawyer and as a veteran. In Congress, Chris will support legislation like the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ and the _Freedom to Vote Act_ , and he knows we need to overturn the Supreme Court’s disastrous ruling in _Citizens United_ that opened the door to unlimited corporate money in politics.

**And Chris doesn’t just talk the talk. He’s pledged that his campaign won’t take a penny from corporate PACs, and is committed to running a fully people-powered campaign._That’s where you come in, Derek._**

**[In Congress, Chris will work to take on corporate power and protect our elections, but to do that, we need your help. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: BREAKING: Pandemic 2.0 Is HERE!
body:
Pandemic 2.0 Is HERE BREAKING: Today, July 23, 2022, the World Health Organization just declared that Monkeypox is now officially a world health emer
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7345.1.263b3dc02012ef2e18ae601f2c00d3cc)
---
## Pandemic 2.0 Is HERE
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7346.1.512843878619f4721256be9531a8a6a1)
---
BREAKING: Today, July 23, 2022, the World Health Organization just declared that **Monkeypox** is now officially a world health emergency.
Over a month ago, I preached a sermon at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7347.1.2a349e5486f567530b54ad4856dc584a) in Tulsa, OK about the coming Pandemic.
It's not because I'm _a prophet nor the son of a prophet_ but I'm also not dumb. **When evil people in power tell us what they plan on doing, I believe we should listen**.
I encourage you to listen to the sermon I preached and how to prepare for what we are getting ready to engage in.
You can listen to [Pandemic 2.0](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7348.1.8d5271fdfd46e0d32804da66e9d09a53) here: [https://youtu.be/hyuI0oPMX-s](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7349.1.3a9212eedefbab0eb1b83eb7745375a1)
Be sure to plant yourself in the House of God during this time.
You are invited to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7350.1.cc9fbdc36f74fb5bf593f51d68acef10) in Tulsa, OK tomorrow at 9 or 11 am CT. I will be preaching on the _Promises of God in a Pandemic_.
Two Ways To Join The [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7351.1.a1e3c460757ba390305bf20a55b7fd0b) Family:
In-Person - 4121 Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK 74145
Online - [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7352.1.daa8985e7f15ae0caaef40cc7d20585b) or [Youtube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7353.1.800cacd484546bbc840a38a6f00b7eba)
Thank you,
[Jackson Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7354.1.87ace315abd3079c685f9ae07257423b)
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7355.1.eb00c0249de82450226ace20503e472a), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7356.1.0a1ab9b9621b0a4b16a02db11cbc8af9), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7357.1.6382d8f8323c19c65c1c50d124d661d9), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7358.1.be84aeba1b93270ec8147505b7e85704), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7359.1.3558cbf81e8c32cab30332885194c8f4), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7360.1.1bc6a6e4c2b64adcd4edc9429bf55339)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7361.1.366c22db1951641222e4c60b8695708f)
| | [ Learn More About Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7362.1.4356a527cba34ffc9c43bc2ebfc9b0ab)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7363.1.59e9f02a4aefae6262c6999cfe19b106)
---
## The Church Needs Strong Leaders Now More Than Ever
---
America is in **TROUBLE** because for the most part, the American Church has failed to keep _the main thing, the main thing_. I believe the Church in America is in desperate need of a spiritual revival and at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7364.1.20205ffb4b818ed376328078be78e331) we want to do our part. This Fall, we are launching [Sheridan Bible Institute](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7365.1.3503c6d0b574b628fda206b26bd72366)! This will be a _one-year program_ designed to **educate** , **equip** and **empower** believers to bring about **real transformation** to our nation. Each semester will consist of six courses. The classes will take place on Tuesday and Thursday evenings starting at 6 pm CT. There will be three classes on Tuesday evening and three classes on Thursday evening with each class being fifty minutes. For the Fall semester, I will be teaching **Old Testament Survey** and **History of Christianity Pt.1**. The other courses will be taught by Instructors that I know have _studied to show themselves approved_. If you would like to **dive deeper into the Word of God** then I want to encourage you to checkout [Sheridan Bible Institute](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7366.1.906efe460e69f72a52b3c6aaba9f8551). If you are unable to make the classes in-person at [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7367.1.8c9a82f3fd9dd1a718c6a1445ab4c69a) in Tulsa, OK that is not an issue. Each class will be streamed live online as well as uploaded with a link for our online students. The pricing is **TOTALLY** affordable. Tuition is only $300 per semester (around $100/month). This is an investment that I guarantee will bring about a great return in your life. To learn more and to apply visit: [www.sheridan.church/bibleinstitute](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7368.1.e4ea300ffcc8cad949589bab7e3f7234)
Classes begin September 6, 2022.
---
| | [ Learn More About Sheridan Bible Institute ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7369.1.f1601af2f80daeed0044fd4e9f4f3f7c)
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7370.1.5e3a00501e4b4f48da98e814f49590d1)
---
---
## VBS @Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7371.1.ec247f8e881fa51b08ca5fb765d82d50)
---
[Vacation Bible School](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7372.1.b7f8c81b4d83f9a28dd72ac3ad2b3c34) is taking place at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7373.1.b45f192cf67ef0ad240640f0187e2058) in Tulsa, OK on July 25-27.
If you have child or know of a child in the Tulsa area (Pre-K through 5th Grade) that would like to attend [Camp Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7374.1.d3db45a640910e771fd977479fc44150) this year register for **FREE** [here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7375.1.a8dffd8cb0e3c1f9d80b8f8c6b9c7a70): [www.sheridan.church/vbs](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=13427900.7376.1.be9ede4ff6a51de2ac73a3b038555020)
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zks9o25nbfs9kf4okpfasuqfsoflcrpflfg45nv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tjh66pb4c36m3hm8pr46lrj9dlk6kpj9p3ncopn8o5j6jh62slksdjb0sb4mdgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpl6go7eo366jib6phnm2qmash5u)

|
---
| | | Friend,

I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4us98i0n84p11s93s7gmo8bng1nim4v7i29tc18_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ipeisg64h137j2enkevtkq2fosc20887mlo9mg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zre5tukrurjn67sbg6tb9oiejbisd3j3qscugbn0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi72e9cs5sr5stuvj1j3ede60kd0u5h8mselr018_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6qcc9ld3l33bgubm6322uhe0ji924kln1h3r2v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---

This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**
**[I hope you'll make a donation today and join this fight before my deadline:](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdtsku1e1rfm7m1gfv1riht9b0hvoch3o7rkugt0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)**
---
| | | [I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2kihveto0dekq9ia4kj9o0hc7fq622dhiuv1li0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1dh5o1p4fiv0dumu4fto0fqubcr6igm9c7n3hc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc93jmhk7478t8ugcu59am8gjgeavekmdfmm6sdo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp16ssgs8s16s8islkmb3igq77ikaec9q3vpb34o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)
---
| | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

PO Box 530650
Miami, FL 33153

[Privacy Policy](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp5d3a23u1md97lvrjt3d2h37tl0d4mvaq9iuqro_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie0oj4cph2bs)

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zs8mpimctarvd87k66261be80fcr2ei31hrkgo4o).

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me. | After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support. I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream. | This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream. I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from. Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. If we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream. | | | Thank you so much for taking the time to read this, Marco Rubio | | | | | | I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close. Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads. With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference. ** | | | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate PO Box 530650 Miami, FL 33153 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I need 3,584 Democrats to chip in $15 before midnight tonight. Can I count on you to step up, Derek? I cannot overstate how catastrophic the consequences would be if Democrats lost our Majorities in this pivotal election. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48219117/357388315/91184225?refcode=20220723_em_fr_b1_spm_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTE3YTliNi05ZDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqxJTaVI5U7B2inXYRgRdG8ey0oDueec5P3Lw09ghzU=) We are at a crossroads, Derek. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Humbly asking you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.

|
---
| | | Friend,

I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I’ve been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to reach my goal by midnight and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I’d take a second to walk you through why I’m running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6940238171804eb7af83638046213ad4&_e=dOKnitCvc1P5jrYnWfKJuRPHOQCKVbKtx8php0DWa946lKNJqoxSup74XB45nMEYgzGlMdhtCM3renrygouNLEHuT0tzuj-aUPIh4j-iAQI5HYabGndM0j6oWSGoO-g_TDgITGYVExZ9hBjXkBDp28aLSSzZ7yepYc21EW6uLLGobHm_Y9PCLvmarsUQ46XXPjPyE94A6neTvaUyzN52sqk__lccdOSdetbIVlEGaJTVC0ycSv8ArfqdSLAbYwQkSc_TyLzylHfd0LNC0JQ9vVSWsw_mk37Z_KebbVNgvm81wkqTb8L3StSU2SJ56eLETWPH3basaXRd1WsNIcQstp23FYGPz4GDudy0XNe4xBruw2d47MY9FfHVY-JM5AOIRYnOTaHq4xcrqObfkLMvOzRuEkolOgjbi05_DoroMYCEwBVuj59JGPhR5Bj9JFjS "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6940238171804eb7af83638046213ad4&_e=dOKnitCvc1P5jrYnWfKJuRPHOQCKVbKtx8php0DWa946lKNJqoxSup74XB45nMEYgzGlMdhtCM3renrygouNLEHuT0tzuj-aUPIh4j-iAQI5HYabGndM0j6oWSGoO-g_TDgITGYVExZ9hBjXkBDp28aLSSzZ7yepYc21EW6uLLGobHm_Y9PCLvmarsUQ46XXPjPyE94A6neTvaUyzN52sqk__lccdOSdetbIVlEGaJQR6solo4v6JiUmeZUuTYrFj1rIW3cgMAWn4kK72MtFxaqSRI7WOGYQxxzy9j_IW-7S1yQxKq_Z3l4lNICyhk9wJDvfM1_zWc3Z5UZOCtcPz12tLHedonFtE-KDYGAue0m20H-zqYNhC8cVzMGe0uexVJVRg6UkgKaVIAJ5ZFeY1DXcGgqCEUftvVGnf8_G0A-7Cq7_DeSfCHgvH1h5VZrs "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette through mutual friends and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6940238171804eb7af83638046213ad4&_e=dOKnitCvc1P5jrYnWfKJuRPHOQCKVbKtx8php0DWa946lKNJqoxSup74XB45nMEYgzGlMdhtCM3renrygouNLEHuT0tzuj-aUPIh4j-iAQI5HYabGndM0j6oWSGoO-g_TDgITGYVExZ9hBjXkBDp28aLSSzZ7yepYc21EW6uLLGobHm_Y9PCLvmarsUQ46XXPjPyE94A6neTvaUyzN52sqk__lccdOSdetbIVlEGaJS-SVnTMqiX1uco5Fv6tQWN39O63uYxjg5XhKIFc0Qqa5rj2tuhVOLaegnLBsWwaUcFBn_oSNxuXXohrjENvF9JA12KhffnEHTQx9f863IHRkvIl91gJzh1Hk3HHc_RssqjnzjMK369D_9Y-ckijaLYoWL4PhNs3R1TZ0fyOr3gKrWRsYY56z1kflCsmts077HpbJkULmbyCthfq7DbmveE "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden’s policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that’s exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I’m teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6940238171804eb7af83638046213ad4&_e=dOKnitCvc1P5jrYnWfKJuRPHOQCKVbKtx8php0DWa946lKNJqoxSup74XB45nMEYgzGlMdhtCM3renrygouNLEHuT0tzuj-aUPIh4j-iAQI5HYabGndM0j6oWSGoO-g_TDgITGYVExZ9hBjXkBDp28aLSSzZ7yepYc21EW6uLLGobHm_Y9PCLvmarsUQ46XXPjPyE94A6neTvaUyzN52sqk__lccdOSdetbIVlEGaJRyRUAwFn1DLFABEUibh0yrfmCg70lPskqLLhXwV7omVeQ3n4lnxV52MWScAOyn5G8xqOudLiXQvJCZrBPsQduoEpRU2sM_6EtYx84h_TtE7eLPpEMYYrRcOdNhPHwezoh8RHsHQvMwryM-YH4dtsNBgXd-lDp5sF-GHIG6zsBkN7ZlGyWta4kKC7Cl-S2TrDOZ5L4oqhkchy3tBU8rEfNS "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn’t have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6940238171804eb7af83638046213ad4&_e=dOKnitCvc1P5jrYnWfKJuRPHOQCKVbKtx8php0DWa946lKNJqoxSup74XB45nMEYgzGlMdhtCM3renrygouNLEHuT0tzuj-aUPIh4j-iAQI5HYabGndM0j6oWSGoO-g_TDgITGYVExZ9hBjXkBDp28aLSSzZ7yepYc21EW6uLLGobHm_Y9PCLvmarsUQ46XXPjPyE94A6neTvaUyzN52sqk__lccdOSdetbIVlEGaJTn0siN7FIXEeZ76evFA8J3i9wkafe9ze1y6BwS8AAsnmO4FFM6ZW1QFZ_nYtwg-_oh9RfyyIepMiaEJum3dTyMUS-1ayggouuor7jKnU49x7ihSee4lDBiRrpi1u9u9CS1yMQYUCQVx_tf7M0bWK9M679dm9iFHRy2vEyJnuumsFEOzyC462Xf9nYO0rdrMmIMyCD-BwMWs5z4HHsofAM0 "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I’m running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **If we’re outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream.**

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Election reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Team, The 2020 election revealed gaps in our election security, including laws and procedures that could be manipulated by those seeking to overturn a free and fair election. That’s why I’ve been working on meaningful election reform legislation ever since. A bipartisan group of senators recently joined me in introducing a pair of bills to enhance, reform, modernize, and safeguard our election procedures to ensure the continued integrity of America’s elections. **The _Electoral Count Reform and Presidential Transition Improvement Act_ and the _Enhanced Election Security and Protection Act_ will safeguard our democracy, ensure the peaceful transition of power, and prevent another violent insurrection.** These bills will:
* Modernize the _Electoral Count Act_
* Increase penalties for election interference
* Improve mail-in voting
* Reauthorize the Election Assistance Commission to help states improve federal election security
* Boost protections for election machines and records
* Increase cybersecurity protections

Both the _Electoral Count Reform and Presidential Transition Improvement Act_ and the _Enhanced Election Security and Protection Act_ show how my colleagues on both sides of the aisle can come together to get important work done for Americans and our democracy. [**I need your help as we work to pass this critical legislation to safeguard our elections. clean_body: | Team, The 2020 election revealed gaps in our election security, including laws and procedures that could be manipulated by those seeking to overturn a free and fair election. That’s why I’ve been working on meaningful election reform legislation ever since. A bipartisan group of senators recently joined me in introducing a pair of bills to enhance, reform, modernize, and safeguard our election procedures to ensure the continued integrity of America’s elections. The Electoral Count Reform and Presidential Transition Improvement Act and the Enhanced Election Security and Protection Act will safeguard our democracy, ensure the peaceful transition of power, and prevent another violent insurrection. These bills will: Modernize the Electoral Count Act Increase penalties for election interference Improve mail-in voting Reauthorize the Election Assistance Commission to help states improve federal election security Boost protections for election machines and records Increase cybersecurity protections Both the Electoral Count Reform and Presidential Transition Improvement Act and the Enhanced Election Security and Protection Act show how my colleagues on both sides of the aisle can come together to get important work done for Americans and our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Grateful for your support, Kyrsten Sinema for Arizona P.O. Box 7586 Phoenix, AZ 85011-7586 United States | mailto:info@kyrstensinema.com | | Paid for by Sinema for Arizona

name: American Action News
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2lceqb3pn66ninui08ma5arjj3kf946nstd8lco_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie4o34cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0opk69oj8c34s5om1cth6prj4c776grr8tbmcpj72o9m6hoeed9hmur36d9hm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8o6csdkmkomfdj1copb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmvefutske2abf31arcfabt28vj80c9sip05a61g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie4o34cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zipvggt7mdvcnho5lnn40hivfbqqfffcre5smjlo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie4o34cjh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z12uo7i30ufcg594qi3ug9t09ak3e2at02dpbomg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie4o34cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z5i2u174j58pu011jt5e2sc2vjuvpsk2u8bo8umo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn5qldk5bjj6lf25h1f3n9qnpi27saen9utik7so_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c3im9oj0chie49fg)

body:
I'm asking you to hang on to hope with me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48222375/357397761/292184910?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTgxOGE5YS1hMjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6-ZIkIT43P07Z-E9RQYckjMkM6zWX-weWSlMamsQ2s=)
---
Along the campaign trail, I've had the chance to put together the three main parts of our pitch to voters, so I'll share those with you quickly: 1\. [I’m a Democrat running for one of the only "open seats" in the country](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48222376/357397762/161715659?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220723_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTgxOGE5YS1hMjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6-ZIkIT43P07Z-E9RQYckjMkM6zWX-weWSlMamsQ2s=) — it was held by a Republican, but he's retiring. It's a massive opportunity for us to win. Now election experts are saying this race will be an ultra-competitive toss-up.

2\. [Republicans know that we can win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48222377/357397763/161715659?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220723_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTgxOGE5YS1hMjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6-ZIkIT43P07Z-E9RQYckjMkM6zWX-weWSlMamsQ2s=) In past elections, they spent millions of dollars to hold this seat. They know that if we win here, it’ll be much harder for them to win the House.

3\. [I'm running a campaign based on issues, not on fear and division.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48222378/357397764/161715659?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220723_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTgxOGE5YS1hMjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6-ZIkIT43P07Z-E9RQYckjMkM6zWX-weWSlMamsQ2s=) I spent my career successfully advocating to expand labor rights and raise the minimum wage for workers. I hope this all resonates with you and that you believe I'm in this race for the right reasons, unlike politicians who do and say outrageous things just to get attention.

So here's where I ask for your help:

[It's so easy to get cynical with politics, but I'm asking you to hang on to hope with me. So that’s why I’m asking one last time: Will you chip in $3 before midnight to help my team win this competitive race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48222379/357397765/161715659?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220723_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTgxOGE5YS1hMjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6-ZIkIT43P07Z-E9RQYckjMkM6zWX-weWSlMamsQ2s=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48222385/357397771/161715659?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=NBFC_20220723_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTgxOGE5YS1hMjBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n6-ZIkIT43P07Z-E9RQYckjMkM6zWX-weWSlMamsQ2s=)

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: I'm asking you to hang on to hope with me. | = Along the campaign trail, I've had the chance to put together the three main parts of our pitch to voters, so I'll share those with you quickly: 1\. = — it was held by a Republican, but he's retiring. It's a massive opportunity for us to win. Now election experts are saying this race will be an ultra-competitive toss-up. 2\. = In past elections, they spent millions of dollars to hold this seat. They know that if we win here, it’ll be much harder for them to win the House. 3\. = I spent my career successfully advocating to expand labor rights and raise the minimum wage for workers. I hope this all resonates with you and that you believe I'm in this race for the right reasons, unlike politicians who do and say outrageous things just to get attention. So here's where I ask for your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Nikki | | Paid for by Nikki For Congress P.O. Box 5171, Springfield, IL 62705 www.nikkiforcongress.com Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country. Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c587b31ad8c047b797c37cf3c2bba305&_e=5wAFQ9terfX6vfz2rMsBtCffeC7gi-p0YNIObcPnBFTvFqbi6W0qFB0DmYx-e2VXSS54hJGcT7A_MC_r3-gGkf9RVW9iKtC-6av81DI-Zc9mnITBBZHJ4ml3rV0WhOug1d_K7JwM3DRp2QUMnZU6jho8pd2KE-V3_YuzfRAPCv8-8J-U4JFofYUWsaVWQGogG6NjPFucRXtoxXvL0965YjWXTPVVeZdCKiyFGJFQScof1ln5zSrm2jIvXKQ4Ev9SyA19sfwKiqrhT1OSMRpQn_5Fmt1Fx03clp7zjNweIOwiBtQ0QkURTEG9er1TB2-1vj02Ij_W7F0zS9gZQoaL_sU8mWXpIMuYJQCKJ8k7UP41kRbhX5YwC29LxHwjhi2HxzPzJDu7CakmZ8ooEG4jFcHUJzJVF1V653ntdp453JuJftfEkHAMjLpDfuL06kJW)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c587b31ad8c047b797c37cf3c2bba305&_e=5wAFQ9terfX6vfz2rMsBtCffeC7gi-p0YNIObcPnBFTvFqbi6W0qFB0DmYx-e2VXSS54hJGcT7A_MC_r3-gGkf9RVW9iKtC-6av81DI-Zc9mnITBBZHJ4ml3rV0WhOug1d_K7JwM3DRp2QUMnZU6jho8pd2KE-V3_YuzfRAPCv8-8J-U4JFofYUWsaVWQGogG6NjPFucRXtoxXvL0965YjWXTPVVeZdCKiyFGJFQScri2-0--Me2HSWK_yJNDBnz0qn_eXP55TL4RBVtHH2II_eQLVroiLNqHYqv1qcefwbkeJkcSGnDwt3piZyI8oCdtZ8ZWzf4t2ZZlFf1NGURyQXHCm1bXJFYediuPQO7B5TjfP4TJPeYtUzgS6Wo5cIE1dTE6UvkA1QZhoFwTZHN40n5rEXxSNDqtFlRIWrPnL3VRu9gfEb0YC-x6ZHHdkmg)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c587b31ad8c047b797c37cf3c2bba305&_e=5wAFQ9terfX6vfz2rMsBtCffeC7gi-p0YNIObcPnBFTvFqbi6W0qFB0DmYx-e2VXSS54hJGcT7A_MC_r3-gGkf9RVW9iKtC-6av81DI-Zc9mnITBBZHJ4ml3rV0WhOug1d_K7JwM3DRp2QUMnZU6jho8pd2KE-V3_YuzfRAPCv8-8J-U4JFofYUWsaVWQGogG6NjPFucRXtoxXvL0965YjWXTPVVeZdCKiyFGJFQScr6mMakfOnC-YZBd434bU8iGTZ9jKBMJJUQqHniPAZRz9fts40eNwLcV3bH-L9L_p0trkV3jxFznluHSFWqYseGTneMz-APrLf_WRTS2xh6eOq6j1MtRjw8icqb5A4ihdZlt3dJzv5qFE3111i1hXeIT7bmp3x1aCFl4hWDrFtjq6oGE0pZek9-9TPR0YC4sRr34K1-B_PFCX5w7UrOOTzd) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c587b31ad8c047b797c37cf3c2bba305&_e=5wAFQ9terfX6vfz2rMsBtCffeC7gi-p0YNIObcPnBFTvFqbi6W0qFB0DmYx-e2VXSS54hJGcT7A_MC_r3-gGkf9RVW9iKtC-6av81DI-Zc9mnITBBZHJ4ml3rV0WhOug1d_K7JwM3DRp2QUMnZU6jho8pd2KE-V3_YuzfRAPCv8-8J-U4JFofYUWsaVWQGogG6NjPFucRXtoxXvL0965YjWXTPVVeZdCKiyFGJFQScqdyzrZVjflzIyBV76t5te30MP48P2rwjNqdxD_vTxpVExch9HzYWs3pD9U7Br5G21bXNi3lAx7T4t9srFX0mJTwGWlsq8obavhrUCOPviVr8qLjpDrWa3aD2vJAIknoGY7NUQrH48gALimWuVr8XOkuFhq5ip-PDC3btZUO0jQz9sPoV8DKo6vCw2Nxw3_0CjcV5tY9A3vksRBF3yUgY13)** Thank you so much for your time. name: Tom Cotton
subject: I've seen it with my own eyes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Patriot, I wanted to share a memory with you.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862019:6tJ4-sV5N:m:1:3299561967:18EFDA8AF734B0FA61648DB933039889:r)
---
(^that's me with Senators John Thune and Ron Johnson)
I visited Wisconsin in 2016 during Ron's last campaign. I saw firsthand there -- and in the U.S. Senate -- that Ron is a tough conservative who puts Americans first. He beat the odds in that campaign and won handily.

Now, Ron is facing another tough battle to keep Wisconsin **RED**. He's been named the most vulnerable Republican this election cycle and Democrats have already dumped _$40 MILLION_ into Wisconsin to defeat him.

Just as I didn't sit on the sidelines in 2016, I'm not going to do so now. We cannot afford to lose Ron Johnson in the U.S. Senate, but Ron can't win without YOU standing with him in this fight.
** **
**_[So, can I ask you to chip in now to help Ron beat the odds and win again?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862019:6tJ4-sV5N:m:1:3299561967:18EFDA8AF734B0FA61648DB933039889:r "So, Patriot, can I ask you to chip in
now to help Ron beat the odds and win again?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH RON >> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862019:6tJ4-sV5N:m:1:3299561967:18EFDA8AF734B0FA61648DB933039889:r "STAND WITH RON >> ")
---

I'm not giving up on Ron, and you shouldn't either, friend. Stand with us now.

---
| | | [STAND WITH RON >> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862019:6tJ4-sV5N:m:1:3299561967:18EFDA8AF734B0FA61648DB933039889:r "STAND WITH RON >> ")
---

In service,

Tom Cotton
---
| |
* * *
---
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.** ****As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

Peter,
_**My story of the American Dream is a special one**_._**I escaped communism and was born in a refugee camp. I was brought to America by my family when I was 8 years old for a better life.**_
_****_
I've spent the last 20 years as a teacher in Saint Paul and am a proud military mom. I'm so grateful to have had the freedoms and opportunity that only America can provide.

[**But the same communism my family escaped from is now appearing in America with the radical Socialist Democrats in Washington, D.C. who want to ruin everything our nation stands for. >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860091:6h_rKsVNv:m:1:3253819041:A016E02A70B500C117B4C731E0FA2D34:r)

_**I 'm no career politician**_. _**But I AM running to get rid of one.**_

**_I 'm May Xiong_**. I'm running for Congress because it's time that we hold the D.C. Elites accountable for the destruction they've caused on hard working families and our local communities.
**The next chapter of MY AMERICAN DREAM is taking a stand and protecting the country and freedom that welcomed me with open arms as a refugee.**

**I need your help to defeat Radical Leftist Betty McCollum - who has spent over 20 years in Congress with nothing to show for it.** It's time to send a message to D.C. that we've had enough of Radical Socialism and that in America, our Freedoms are not up for debate - _**and I 'm ready to deliver it by winning this election.**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: I need your help!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/borisbenandms-8132516?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear #VALUE!,

Great news!

The Mississippi Center for Public Policy has just been nominated for a couple of national awards –**but I need your help to ensure we win!**

The State Policy Network has shortlisted us for an award that recognizes our role in helping secure the largest tax cut in our state’s history, and the Mississippi Tax Freedom Act 2022.

Separately, we have also been shortlisted for a Communications Excellence Award in recognition of our success in creating a mass movement that made the win possible.

Now the public will decide who wins – **please take a few seconds to vote and make sure that it is a WIN FOR MISSISSIPPI!**
---
| [VOTE FOR MISSISSIPPI!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=83304898b8&e=5703353baa "VOTE FOR MISSISSIPPI!")
---
| Click on the button above, fill in your details – and don’t forget to select the **Mississippi Center for Public Policy!** We face tough competition from larger states, so your support is vital.

If you would like to learn more about us and the other nominees, [you can read about them all here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0b3ed709a4&e=5703353baa)

Thank you for your support. We are only able to achieve wins because of the support we get from you!

Thank you!

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c95540d67b&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---

Warm regards - and have a great weekend

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

**_Ps. Voting for us to win this award helps show that Mississippi is leading the way with conservative wins!_**
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=4cd9389ef2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=4cd9389ef2).

_Copyright © 2022 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:

| I'm continuing to propose real solutions to get at the root causes of the illegal immigration crisis on our southern border.
This week, I introduced legislation to fix problems with the Flores settlement.
Here's the problem: Children are being exploited to take advantage of our immigration system because of the perverse incentives that exist in current law. It's cruel to our children and it's fueling the border crisis, and it needs to change. That's why my bill will modify the Flores settlement, which currently requires family units who cross the border illegally to be released after just 72 hours. That has incentivized migrants to bring kids with them (even if they have no relation to the child) on their trip to the border because they know they will be released shortly after being detained.
My bill would extend the allowed time for detainment to deter migrants from bringing children on the dangerous journey to the border. It would also require DNA testing for any family units crossing the border, and prohibit those who have broken our laws from becoming custodians of these children.
These are the serious, detailed policy solutions we need to turn the tide of this border crisis. But these bills mean nothing if we don't have a majority in the House next November.
That's why I'm working tirelessly to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi, so we can finally start passing bills to deal with the many problems created under Democrat control of government, including the border crisis.
If you want to get involved in the fight to take back the House and secure the border, [DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aVTDl_BVOvJcrYuxC_SHeTLYzSPBPf4Yp4M2INMvDcdJRJsHOwPRmrlxAQRBlpc0w6YHvmb_MR-ZrmXnS9usbzLoX7gl_3H5ZeHDACU-Qn3Cd_XUIppJljESRgZuibTwp2mIlzSwGlTy3mllCp9J5W5L8w2-a8_qpfN3BxFAR-RP0XiTTxPl1QptZxW2DdTvnA6qstIrzaHhmTu6J48bEv580zyRRqQ6v4DhhxptHjFCWJU7FdMJ3OvJ4ccfJHKJpgE_akFfL79rUiI7umbkon9mH7sxs82oslgDeBOnmeYpeJzsJxMwrVC4bZb9HR5-M_HBwXTqq70Um6jShuPqbzyRNbpMZVlK2c0mQZBmjNA=&c=MIqJlrc3ml2WgDXSHKnqvW-yt0TM1BB6_UwgU_NuM9Gr-3vReLFYsw==&ch=bFes0-YOo-4Pe_fqu4qw7VWm732KPw4ahbWxee17ggQrq57gXsrALA==).
