subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **“health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**“This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.”** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, “**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.”**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
“It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
“Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.”
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.

clean_body: We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called “health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline. “This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.” Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems. Dr. Gundry explains, “These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.” The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home. “It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. “Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.” The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: “If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints,” Dr. Gundry says... “Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible.” Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Laurie Teper
subject: A MUST SEE MOVIE!
body:
Hello Team Geels,
Courtney is passionate about what is happening in our schools. She wants you to be informed so she rented the theater to show this movie. Every American should be concerned!

Please join her at this showing and get the word out.

Place: Palace Pointe Theater
Address: 5050 Durham Rd., Roxboro
Date: Saturday, July 30

Time: 6:45pm - Movie starts at 7:00pm
Running Time: 2 hours
Cost; $6.00 per ticket
Concession items are available for purchase.

Consider inviting your friends, family, neighbors, co-workers, parents, grandparents and your church community. Sadly, not everyone is aware of what is happening in schools across our country. Be informed and share the knowledge! Parents need to know!

Check out the trailer here: <https://m.imdb.com/title/tt18559276/>

Any donations to Courtney Geels for Congress is appreciated!

<https://secure.winred.com/courtney-geels-for-congress/donate-today>

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Director
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

clean_body: [ ]NBC News: Democrat Tim Ryan chases after Fox News viewers in Ohio Senate race I know what you’re thinking, folks. “Wait a second, why on EARTH would Tim’s campaign want to run a TV ad on Fox News?!” Well, the truth is—Tim’s message of raising wages and putting workers first is resonationing with more than just Democrats and independents. Believe it or not, Republicans are learning about Tim and liking what they’re hearing too. It’s why we’re surging ahead of millionaire extremist JD Vance in the polls, and why Tim is on track to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority in the fall. This movie presents the structure and politics surrounding public schools in today's America. It also goes into the content that is being shown to children from many different perspectives. I have watched it, and it is truly shocking. I hope to see you there, and please invite a friend!! Palace Pointe (5050 Durham Road, Roxboro, NC 27574) Saturday, July 30th at 6:45pm To preview the movie, click here: | | | Don't Forget! We have a great opportunity for you to support the Courtney Geels for Congress campaign while also having the potential to win a weekend at a 4 bedroom/2 bath Oceanfront cottage on Emerald Isle August 27-30!! We are raffling tickets for $50 each or 5 raffle tickets for $200. We will draw for the winner on August 5th for you to get ready to get your family or friends packed for the beach! Get your tickets now!! Click on the button below to sign up! Please share this email with friends and family (maybe they will invite you if they win)! | "Ocean Front Beach Vacation Raffle!" | | | Running a campaign costs money. name: May Xiong
subject: Help me defeat Socialism
body:
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860102:6D9bdsVQN:m:1:3317145305:1CDCAB046DDD941307BF94C77958E6DB:r)
---
Peter,
_**My story of the American Dream is a special one**_._**I escaped communism and was born in a refugee camp. I was brought to America by my family when I was 8 years old for a better life.**_
_****_
I've spent the last 20 years as a teacher in Saint Paul and am a proud military mom. I'm so grateful to have had the freedoms and opportunity that only America can provide.

[**But the same communism my family escaped from is now appearing in America with the radical Socialist Democrats in Washington, D.C. who want to ruin everything our nation stands for. >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860102:6D9bdsVQN:m:1:3317145305:1CDCAB046DDD941307BF94C77958E6DB:r)

_**I 'm no career politician**_. _**But I AM running to get rid of one.**_

**_I 'm May Xiong_**. I'm running for Congress because it's time that we hold the D.C. Elites accountable for the destruction they've caused on hard working families and our local communities.
**The next chapter of MY AMERICAN DREAM is taking a stand and protecting the country and freedom that welcomed me with open arms as a refugee.**

**I need your help to defeat Radical Leftist Betty McCollum - who has spent over 20 years in Congress with nothing to show for it.** It's time to send a message to D.C. that we've had enough of Radical Socialism and that in America, our Freedoms are not up for debate - _**and I 'm ready to deliver it by winning this election.**_
---
[ _**RUSH $25 | DEFEAT SOCIALIST DEMOCRATS** _ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860102:6D9bdsVQN:m:1:3317145305:1CDCAB046DDD941307BF94C77958E6DB:r)
---
Our communities are less safe. Gas prices are reaching record highs. Our Constitutional Rights are being threatened. I'm doing my part to take a stand. _**Are you?**_

[**Please donate just $25 today and join me in my fight to protect the America we know and love - the beacon of freedom, limitless opportunity and exceptional across the world.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860102:6D9bdsVQN:m:1:3317145305:1CDCAB046DDD941307BF94C77958E6DB:r)
---
[ _**RUSH $25 | DEFEAT SOCIALIST DEMOCRATS**_ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860102:6D9bdsVQN:m:1:3317145305:1CDCAB046DDD941307BF94C77958E6DB:r)
---
Thank you, | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60860102:6D9bdsVQN:m:1:3317145305:1CDCAB046DDD941307BF94C77958E6DB:r)
---

May Lor Xiong

In 2020 and 2021, we built the biggest grassroots volunteer team that Georgia had ever seen.

We contacted voters across the entire state, and we WON.

**_[We need to do that again this year, Peter, and that means building a field team that organizes EVERYWHERE. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.
However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **“health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.**
**“This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.”** Says Dr. Gundry.
This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.**
Dr. Gundry explains, “**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.”**
The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.**
“It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain.
By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)
Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid.
“Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.”
The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.
So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades.

[**Watch The Video** ](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2f29dc7c22742e1a72e7c5c5fde0fb8&_e=uCm2YhS_8cfJcDNYdarclZPQSp1UUj8z0wZ6MF4MUk6Z78__hKvUECA5TnQyekrTYV9HkEHQoT7Q3H5LniUBUfyHUANpci541MrlAdMyXtpoQSaj9VrJ1V25C3ED54qGr7Zm3Ku68B5C9Av_YOIfEzpq8GHQLLrR3_n2s429nG05Q0x11RZ43sajP--uouN3lsIKS0_qt7UY6yqXorsqQU30SZPwMhwU7wPEKA4ehtVudRnSva5YyWzFUvlY1Q7IqVrhUFKQKGLF89rruVUGRrUMGWqO1pyPRhHHyAEHtA8st0_XxmyHEI2R9KQ7gM1v)
Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.
Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.
Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: “If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints,” Dr. Gundry says... “Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible.”

name: Democracy Watch | NDRC
subject: “What happens in 2022 could determine whether democratic government endures in US”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Eric Holder, Chair
body:
we wish we could say this is an exaggeration – but with...
|
---

---
| **“What Happens in 2022 Could Determine Whether Democratic Government Endures in US”**
– _TruthOut_
---
Team, we wish we could say this is an exaggeration. But with:
* Proponents of Trump’s Big Lie running for positions that would give them control of state elections
* Republicans attempting to stack state courts with judges who they believe will enable their anti-democratic schemes
* And, to top it all off, the Trump Supreme Court taking up a case that could _literally_ give GOP state lawmakers the power to overturn elections results

It’s clear that Republicans are hell-bent on seizing unearned majority power by _any means necessary_ so they can implement their deeply unpopular policies.

**But we’re not giving up – instead, we’re getting _fired up_.** We’ve identified dozens of key races in 17 target states where our investment can make a huge difference. If we win in these races, we can help elevate Democracy Defenders to positions of power and thwart the GOP’s plans for minority rule.

**Grassroots supporters make all our work possible, so that’s why we’re asking: Will you pitch in whatever you can today to help the NDRC defend democracy across the country?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjv0u7078b4390pa8j5jn6sfj4sl007536ff3dro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbprcppjchob8p35c9ieec5h6dhrcd3gcsq60srn6po79c5ksarj0sr1elqe8p9n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i61j73d5l6jjr5cj661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgeap74s9h6coh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4at3mgk68vnmn8mne9m5q4255m2r8mlo0kh1j4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie9oj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdem34k9v895g7rfssptq27trs8sev6302m4v54g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie9oj2cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcj2nstf9cbj0v052ul78f688h43gh96jc23723g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0slie9oj2cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Today marks ONE MONTH until the primary election on August 23rd. We have just 31 days to connect with every single Democratic voter in NY-19 and let them know Josh’s message. | = | Peter: It’s officially crunch time. Today marks ONE MONTH until the primary election on August 23rd. We have just 31 days to connect with every single Democratic voter in NY-19 and let them know Josh’s message. So, we are starting an Election Day Countdown Fund, and we’re setting a goal to raise $8,000 by the end of the weekend to stay on track with our pre-Election Day fundraising goals. = | | | = | = | = There’s a lot of hard work that goes into turning out voters. In the next month, we’ll be recruiting volunteers to make a lot of dials and knock on a ton of doors, texting targeted voters, running ads on TV, online, and in the mailboxes - all to get voters to the polls in support of Josh. | | | Patriot, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one - so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump 's successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That's the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862051:JN82HsVcN:m:1:3299561967:6B3958A9794413787B5D5D64C8B6C168:r "By ordering your
copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi's targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I've signed won't last long, so order yours immediately.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862051:JN82HsVcN:m:1:3299561967:6B3958A9794413787B5D5D64C8B6C168:r "So please don't
pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of
my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862051:JN82HsVcN:m:1:3299561967:6B3958A9794413787B5D5D64C8B6C168:r "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862052:JN82HsVcN:m:1:3299561967:6B3958A9794413787B5D5D64C8B6C168:r "Can we count on

## Michigan Public Radio Interview
Friend, Ralph was recently interviewed by Michigan Public Radio, NPR's Michigan station. You can read and listen to the interview by clicking the link below. | [](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=FaGOOce8PlmGm5ATWSbw5Z6VHPhIXrBbXL7bAWZ5kT2lX4WiiBYVzRNjpikiL7XcKDlkZt5xPj6ff13M_fZLwfnpUlNOVVtUxtVMHYDAjwkZ79uUQq5nNRSWK1RqkeSVbhmGKhYuJfQyPUKY--_mbGpdndufKiyJCl0knnAp8P8&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=2 "LISTEN TO INTERVIEW") [LISTEN TO INTERVIEW](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=FaGOOce8PlmGm5ATWSbw5Z6VHPhIXrBbXL7bAWZ5kT2lX4WiiBYVzRNjpikiL7XcKDlkZt5xPj6ff13M_fZLwfnpUlNOVVtUxtVMHYDAjwkZ79uUQq5nNRSWK1RqkeSVbhmGKhYuJfQyPUKY--_mbGpdndufKiyJCl0knnAp8P8&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=2)
---
**Reminder - Oakland GOP Debate**
****
The last major Gubernatorial debate will take place next Wednesday, July 27. The event will begin at 7 pm at the UWM Sports Complex Auditorium. The address is 867 S. Blvd. E. Pontiac, MI 48341. You must reserve your spot by purchasing tickets at the Oakland GOP website.
[](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=LjGNMRh0tVVRAdsOhIG2XWv4jgQG-Xx67PwiTzxHfiP-TdkVneG-SG0ounUFTt6u&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=3 "GET TICKETS") [GET TICKETS](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=LjGNMRh0tVVRAdsOhIG2XWv4jgQG-Xx67PwiTzxHfiP-TdkVneG-SG0ounUFTt6u&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=3)
---
This is the last major event before the Primary on August 2nd. It is vitally important that many supporters attend to show the growing movement behind Ralph. Ticket sales end tomorrow so purchase your tickets as soon as possible.
### **10 Days Until August 2nd!**
We are in the final stretch before the Primary and many exciting things are in motion. The other candidates have begun attacking one another instead of focusing on the main goal of this race: to defeat Gretchen Whitmer. We need someone like Ralph who can unite the party and those on the other side of the isle to heal our state.
Please Consider donating or volunteering to help us make **Michigan a Lighthouse to The Nation.**
[](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/donate?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=4 "DONATE ANY AMOUNT") [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/donate?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=4)
---
Thank you for your continued support.
Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=5)[](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=6)[](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=7)[](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=8)[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=npr_interview&n=9)

body:
help to sound the alarm on Marco Rubio's extremist, anti-choice views
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226173/357414388/596838240?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3814-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTdiMmU3NS1iNTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VrXNWUShLtf7O00irfEBYkI6EIyoRW2drsin_48DUyM=)

Friend – Marco Rubio doesn't want voters to know this truth.

He's been working to federally ban abortion for decades, despite the fact that most Americans support _Roe v. Wade._
**That's why I need your help to sound the alarm on Marco Rubio's extremist, anti-choice views.**
**[I'm running ads against Marco Rubio that target his record on abortion, putting the truth out there for the voters to see, but I need to raise $50,000 before midnight to keep the ads on the air. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226266/357414821/-895462045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGFlMzkwYS1iNzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHYqmfZyBHzMeB8VASHeA6ltLajb_cpBowzyTRbKxKg=&emci=cc0ee53b-ac0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=64ae390a-b70a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5460736)
Hi friend,

With our August 9th Special Election just around the corner, more and more journalists, donors, and voters from across the state and the nation are tuning in!

To help spread the word about this critical election, we revamped our website to ensure it fully captures the spirit of our campaign and the issues we’re fighting for. We also spoke with supporters from every corner of the district to get input on changes and ideas for the website.

**[After weeks of hard work, our new website is officially live! Visit ettingerforcongress.com to check it out, and let us know what you think.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226267/357414822/-895462045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGFlMzkwYS1iNzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHYqmfZyBHzMeB8VASHeA6ltLajb_cpBowzyTRbKxKg=&emci=cc0ee53b-ac0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=64ae390a-b70a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5460736)**

In the digital age, voters increasingly learn about candidates by researching them on the internet. We’ve even heard stories of voters looking up candidates on their smartphones while in the voting booth. Talk about last minute!

Whether voters are researching Jeff now or waiting until Election Day, it’s crucial our website clearly communicates why Jeff is the best choice to represent Southern Minnesota and take on the issues that matter most. That’s why we focused on telling Jeff’s story to highlight the policies he’ll fight for to move our nation forward.

We’re proud of the new site and have already been getting a great response from voters. **Can you help us get voters from throughout Southern Minnesota to visit[ettingerforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226268/357414823/-895462045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGFlMzkwYS1iNzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHYqmfZyBHzMeB8VASHeA6ltLajb_cpBowzyTRbKxKg=&emci=cc0ee53b-ac0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=64ae390a-b70a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=5460736) and learn about Jeff by sharing the link on social media and encouraging folks to check it out? **

Thank you!
Team Ettinger

body:
Take our poll >>
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211640/357371687/1699041511?refcode=em_eng_2022.07.23_b1_tt_all-nd&refcode2=1052f5bc-950a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDUyZjViYy05NTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prmOXIiaAOJti6BHSXtYNQgjFpsIGipI0EgrcTTKHXE=)** |
**In the face of rising costs, María Elvira Salazar voted AGAINST capping the cost of insulin to save lives.

Do you agree with Annette that life-saving prescription drugs like insulin should be affordable for those who need it?** | [YES! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211641/357371688/1349755645?refcode=em_eng_2022.07.23_b1_tt_all_yes&amount=5&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDUyZjViYy05NTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prmOXIiaAOJti6BHSXtYNQgjFpsIGipI0EgrcTTKHXE=) | [NO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48211642/357371689/1349755645?refcode=em_eng_2022.07.23_b1_tt_all_no&amount=5&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDUyZjViYy05NTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=prmOXIiaAOJti6BHSXtYNQgjFpsIGipI0EgrcTTKHXE=)
---|---

Team,

Did you know that 1 in every 4 diabetes patients is forced to ration or skip doses of their life-saving insulin due to the skyrocketing prices?

To address this issue and ensure that every American diagnosed with diabetes can afford their life-saving medication, the House of Representatives passed legislation that would cap the out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35.

But despite the fact that some of her constituents are forced to forgo their insulin doses due to the rising costs, **María Elvira Salazar voted AGAINST capping the cost of insulin.**

Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and still is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma and the NRA, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing a huge fundraising deadline at midnight, and right now we’re still very short of our $100,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**

name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: ICYMI: Biden’s Record-Breaking Failures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-84-162-344-6fa2fa9e61-s29dd92cb7 )

Friends,

This weeks’ polls show the Biden Administration
accomplished a new feat — his approval rating dropped to an
embarrassing 29%, with nearly twice as many people thinking he’s
incompetent to do the job Democrats elected him to do!

Historical Low Ratings
==============================
These are the lowest approval ratings of any president at this
point in their presidency — ever. It’s not that hard to believe,
though...the world is falling apart around us.

* The Biden Administration is inviting illegal
immigrants to flood across our border, as more of our young
people are dying of fentanyl connected to the drug cartels;

* Gas prices and inflation are stretching Americans’ budgets
tighter than ever;

* Outrageous housing and energy costs are pushing seniors and
families closer and closer to homelessness;

* Crime is on the rise, while Biden and Democrats in Congress are
still working to defund our police.

Failure of Leadership - Disastrous Policies
================================================
Biden’s record-breaking failures and his
record-low approval ratings beg the question: how does one mess
up this badly, if not on purpose? Americans overwhelmingly think
the country is heading in the wrong direction, and yet Biden is
doubling down on his disastrous policies:

* A recently uncovered voicemail cast doubt on
the President’s original assertion that he had no involvement in
his son’s business dealings.

* He drained our emergency strategic oil reserves to sell it to
China, but he’s refusing to greenlight the Keystone Pipeline and
ramp up domestic energy production.

* Biden is coordinating a massive effort to mobilize Congress to
pass sweeping abortion legislation that would undermine the Supreme
Court’s landmark decision this month.

The list goes on and on.

This Is Our Opportunity
=================================
November is coming! We don’t just need to best vulnerable
Democrats, we need to win every election possible to build the
most powerful conservative majority in 30 years and take the
Speaker’s gavel away from Nancy Pelosi.

Now is the time for Republicans all over the country to link arms
and join together. If you are able, please consider getting
involved ( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-84-162-345-012587d738-s29dd92cb7 )
to help us build a strong conservative majority to
hold President Biden accountable and reverse the damage done by
Biden’s dangerous policies.

Sincerely,

Bill Posey

Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey

P.O. Box 411486, Melbourne, FL 32941-1486

Don't like these emails? Unsubscribe (
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-163077-5-84-162-b6bb9428e2e6387-s29dd92cb7 )

name: Team Fetterman
subject: BACK IN STOCK: Yard Signs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Get excited — yard signs are still available!
#
Derek, official Team Fetterman yard signs are BACK IN STOCK!!!**
For just $18, you can have your very own yard sign to proudly display in your yard, window, car, or wherever you want to show that you’re on Team Fetterman.
**All you have to do is contribute $18 or more today and our team will send you a yard sign straight to your door.[Use this link to claim your yard sign now! ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48433?refcode=ema20220723-6611&first_name=Derek&t=1&akid=6611%2E434096%2EMs89TW)** 🙏
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48433?refcode=ema20220723-6611&first_name=Derek&t=2&akid=6611%2E434096%2EMs89TW)
**[Get A Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/48433?refcode=em20220723-6611&t=3&akid=6611%2E434096%2EMs89TW)**
A yard sign may seem trivial, but all these small actions add up. Every time someone chooses to donate, put up a yard sign, or even Tweet a message in support, it shows that our campaign is supported by everyday people.
Thank you for your support!
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220723-6611-footer&t=7&refcode2=6611_434096_Ms89TW&akid=6611%2E434096%2EMs89TW)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

National Democrats know Arizona will likely decide the balance of power in the Senate, and they are gearing up for an all-out assault against me. We must be ready to FIGHT BACK. Friend, I don't plan on ceding our country to globalist Democrats like Chuck Schumer and extremists like Mark Kelly. I 'm ready to go on the offensive and spread our message across Arizona, and I need YOUR support to do it. Thank you, Blake Masters U.S. Senate Candidate from Arizona | | Contributions to Blake Masters for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. |

[ ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFKDjRzCcDvsq2qX15wrZwR0CNoTaCMkqTZftozyyXUhvkGycQMbLVvG7xpE-rAMhlGnE-osn6EwnqfSIfXRlHvQZTmMYPfg-fkaFeLH3GnXx1b-OqzUGyVt-B2xxTGcwjxREMwktmU8VLVLLj0ugM1MGHioq9rasAxO4pBEDydIcyiwTaeN_fWCrPL0Z_mDeIpg63UZUNUeUFqMymksD7eQ%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American,

When I dropped out of high school at the age of 17, my parents said, “If you're going to stop going to school, you got to start going to work.”

_I immediately got a job and started waitressing at Waffle House._

In my years since then, I've worked a lot of jobs and worn a lot of different hats – author, business-owner, waitress, marketer, commercial real-estate agent, mother, and now I serve as the Congresswoman for South Carolina's first district. **But I'll never forget the lessons I learned at my first job: work hard, do right by others, listen more than you talk, and never stop fighting for what you believe in.**

If we haven't met yet, [**I'm Nancy Mace**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFu3HbyzaoS-1wQfTv6-dOeaQHx5VyANFMt2wUyQZiU1PVhc8ebKbLWQRWB1FLSuwg-TJEeTwrJcQdaYyRbQmjsDt8S_lMc1hWEF159o4yODdMKuqPELOPWu4Rr4YjBzqWEshG_ZkfLDRrgblutuhy3U0-4anYhSqpGROKDOKEBbifd0HYdEFnswaY0fJAXvL9hrUYZs54oUWP8WUmkcLabQ%3D%3D). I'm a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America!

I don't have your typical run of the mill story because I'm not your typical Congresswoman. I ran for Congress because someone had to stand up and fight to protect the freedoms we have in our country and to serve the people of South Carolina.

In 2020, we took this seat back from the Democrats and now, we are fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red.

**I'm extremely proud of the work we've accomplished, but there's still so much to do. So, I want to make sure you are still on my team as[we continue on the path to re-election](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFwytHDZa45K2jNYmzhpbC8MKRItNTwhJdeVRB6XZ_Y7x_wbzglCzAZvkI7lXFB_aCa5PMdl6IpHxGS5pYW6CjrSawPbiKdD-FKu4ngq9NhxMYYhxe1XH8bELRBuKaqWmz3N1GpjKY2dP2_jiabhm8M4X_M6GoFQSC26JDUJxU-_Jpzw3LvWTf_kjE3wleExHb-g2qp4IG8nvMwc8JQ-yAxA%3D%3D).**

[**Will you chip in whatever you can – whether it's $75, $50, or $10, so that I can win this race and restore our country.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFf0uoNhxsmfKJSMBOfeY4AAh14Z1ciDdYZ0HCo7FhScaBZ_jzlInA7o1akxkBW8MMzW73eYHHvN3ASFOUjpTfRoLjMNyYEwkNloGlSLJr7lIfMjgBgLNrMPoXHMJAEUKzqmIED3lxXbYcwAN2bsmfYYeFZ8MUN5LMEINk5b5aXIGRNoKA1K_XPu1IYxfTZCpnz76v7bmejsFdBILNW7DBpg%3D%3D)

[ ** Chip In ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFg86XLu03PJh8zgJ7Uyp9hjR0W_cyd6Nrwyn5VSogS_SpM5-mwUud65DQvYJRphnLSfJu2EwbzTsBF-zZ9eL-89Uwj2CBebyVpWQSCpGy3IRLnhLX9Lhp3rTV2IuCsJnIoQhVgJHWZlbWcDWmD71dhR8MCltnCJ1rUlPj9s1cR46afqxujtY9uW3_iWb9txpah89gmw8Rd9IDPQJSMDvXxQ%3D%3D)

There was a time in my life when I never thought I'd get a high school diploma, _let alone graduate from The Citadel, one day start a company, and now serve in Congress._

I made a promise to myself when I won two years ago that I would be fiscally conservative; I would be an independent voice and I wouldn't toe the party line especially when Republicans spent too much and taxed too much.

I'm proud of my conservative record and I'm proud of delivering results day in and day out for the Lowcountry. I'm proud I've never voted to raise your taxes. And as the daughter of a veteran, I'm proud of the work I've done to help our veterans throughout South Carolina. **Serving the Lowcountry is the honor of my lifetime.**

[**_Which is why I'm asking for your help to continue doing my job and serving you._** ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFRV6r4l3VHuYmzTNRwALeXbA1N31x-K52feH89Z_-8PzvuoC52JgXyaEh8Q2Ll8CrHGghamF9WfN2p1_IbguySK8XQCGVu_uwMycXuPi0OpqhvtlHoTYKZNtL4RGDjXIdmHz-ye41cqJRfUtBzTWTlEFlbPOIFKT3wBSde0LoF6mjmZ7MdBt9QsGK2Qu48tf0PFV2XbhofyyqsbSNRCktIg%3D%3D) [ ** KEEP THE FIRST ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFdY-JfFW0AZOkiA_3m8OQEoTeb1nHA02OkfsH1aQ5S02alGCcGBgTccUIDteWeL_3eDRaTCkV1KWc3se8XxdNDG28MUmVpiWN4MtIspMRBkNyeysvyLzCTzea_4wi53_WGmXfpaaM7p5RPVYHmVclqhuaBn0PbPhIYXFgdIw-QJ_xNOGY0f037i8u0O_mCkUa1L7VA7WfeLLenJBT-BdNFA%3D%3D)

What's happening in America right now is _horrifying_. Kids are being used as political pawns, radical liberal ideas are becoming mainstream, the woke media is prioritizing clicks and view over the truth, and our so-called ‘leaders' have sold themselves out for fame and fortune.

As Americans, we deserve __so much better than this__. It's time to restore our economy, secure the southern border, put parents back in charge, support our military, and reestablish pride in our country.

[**It's time to stand up and say enough is enough! I'm running for re-election because I believe I'm the woman who can help save our country.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFoycpu58tz9L3rmRI_jk9TZEuFM4EbML1YbS7ZRdo1LcEy7kIr_6ASNvyJHa_WuGpvkXuhLn-YUX-tYXNRdOfuLB744OLrQQds28gYnNVsh0uDnwMV15MPnCo6QRse0LzK0RHGjmX-C_CFAKAtB8TztpYJtX4jR87gLBxBpuYtxe2KZB2V_Sce6H584wLcad-WPw7OdzYZCpswWfi6P1Tzg%3D%3D) I'm in Washington week in and week out, fighting for you and your family – I have a 100% record of voting to lower taxes and a 100% lifetime rating with Conservation Voters of South Carolina!

[ ** SEND NANCY TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkF65P80sD0jaU-ZLmWgsB0dIK1I3nwrbLYj_2MxCpJTVst39yzHaML_U3k6bO0reKtuIdSnDTHEcu14G3dk-6jfPIKrJRBbwbGLkHqNZx0A7Ksa1uF1LvSZjBLLQfbQ-a2cbpZKUExZPH8isig6p4N3ssrpJXTAFVSAyuo0BXlo0g1WiHbjCMGMSvsDQssy04E5JeKKQpfxqQWK5ID0n7JSw%3D%3D)

I'll leave you with this thought: I believe you can do anything you set your mind to. That's how a high-school drop-out like myself became a Congresswoman. _I believe we can fix our country and leave a stronger nation to the next generation._

Maybe it's how I was raised, or maybe it's just the fighting spirit in me, but I know we can fix the broken system in Washington. [**Join me today: let's take our country back, and keep the first!**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFV9Ij1JUHqHPqqo2ELUI_xNvX6Mza3qYwm5qG3QKhzXvWKp4Wvl8EJTZQaShSDWBdU-mcDmCGBAgdmeX9B2Qdly4PluVJNpFWELEKm88_EkqMpc4KgOKWJWy-EdTg02uxrSBRMn3unc9bOBxx-g14UGlkiddi7TfzOHaZHauLke5PcAYVmfJFldB5D0rlLAptWomAzTUpA2NTnNec_V1Trg%3D%3D)

Thank you and God bless,
---

---
Nancy Mace
---
| | |
# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c879f88913974721807786e9261a469a&_e=vsa7RVKsYpSEbh4AOq8_-kaLkGGDkW0zbB0GrlKfJXJ15SRXzo7dUqRTLaCvbOU1ujzMpxlNK4uAPXuTM-X9plhsE7Ej3zrsZoFlwzkdBiOO-tbIC_yGcCnK74aQZLSmThjVRtxKXfJs69uVT1Zu-ecHJvqCEx4Ca8O-lKF0xSWRk5ogHuv_WDHg-vvdYs9-ex6bHI6eokPCPDa-rMZREssMN9HqvkjGmrNuuCyDp_UbDq6assjN-kUUTSJMJvkFhvnzRn_J7972tHSM5DLOFr0-ECshebZiE-k1bC65x-nxtfC-KTcy8BM-70gA4YDZXIM5UHgA_V_Iz7kUjKLI7BhWifacuA0WycIZkr8-G3cBrjC1bS_DMG5NccnVm-yLY_Kb3vZ5jvkDl4mn_eD6iBMEhd87hNWbZwBp21pL_oxJE2khU5104SH_yKjKn10DxL4LtTuGob1sixRHyGCUIg%3D%3D)

I don't have your typical run of the mill story because I'm not your typical Congresswoman. I ran for Congress because someone had to stand up and fight to protect the freedoms we have in our country and to serve the people of South Carolina. In 2020, we took this seat back from the Democrats and now, we are fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. I'm extremely proud of the work we've accomplished, but there's still so much to do. So, I want to make sure you are still on my team as. There was a time in my life when I never thought I'd get a high school diploma, let alone graduate from The Citadel, one day start a company, and now serve in Congress. I made a promise to myself when I won two years ago that I would be fiscally conservative; I would be an independent voice and I wouldn't toe the party line especially when Republicans spent too much and taxed too much. I'm proud of my conservative record and I'm proud of delivering results day in and day out for the Lowcountry. I'm proud I've never voted to raise your taxes. And as the daughter of a veteran, I'm proud of the work I've done to help our veterans throughout South Carolina. Serving the Lowcountry is the honor of my lifetime. What's happening in America right now is horrifying. Kids are being used as political pawns, radical liberal ideas are becoming mainstream, the woke media is prioritizing clicks and view over the truth, and our so-called ‘leaders' have sold themselves out for fame and fortune. As Americans, we deserve so much better than this. It's time to restore our economy, secure the southern border, put parents back in charge, support our military, and reestablish pride in our country. I'm in Washington week in and week out, fighting for you and your family – I have a 100% record of voting to lower taxes and a 100% lifetime rating with Conservation Voters of South Carolina! I'll leave you with this thought: I believe you can do anything you set your mind to. That's how a high-school drop-out like myself became a Congresswoman. I believe we can fix our country and leave a stronger nation to the next generation. Maybe it's how I was raised, or maybe it's just the fighting spirit in me, but I know we can fix the broken system in Washington. Thank you and God bless, Nancy Mace | | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel’s Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nancy Macefor Congress | | Nancy Mace for Congress | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186, Charleston, SC 29492

Florida is in a better place now than it was before the pandemic - and that 's not something liberal governors can say today. I'm also leading the fight for parents and students against the poisonous, WOKE elitists to ensure our education system is NOT an indoctrination camp. It's simple: we 're not going to tell kindergarteners they are racist or they are oppressed. And we're not going to force-feed our children progressive ideologies that are confusing and wildly inappropriate for their age. We will prepare the next generation for greatness by teaching real history instead of perverting our past to serve the ideological goals of far-left activists who would like our children to hate America and each other. Every student should feel empowered to succeed - and together, we can make sure that they do. If all this is "RADICAL," then Peter, I think you and I have something in common: we're both RADICAL. I could use your help continuing what we started here in Florida. Will you chip in now to become an official supporter of my campaign? Make no mistake: this race won't be easy. We know liberals will do anything to win when they're afraid of the opposition. And they're VERY afraid of me. They've already proven they'll try anything to keep me out of the Governor's mansion. Since I became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida's election laws are free and fair. We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks." I have no doubt they'll try harder to make sure we don't outsmart and outfight them in 2022. That's why I need the support of patriots like you, to make sure we're prepared to win whatever battles we face next. Peter, I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time. I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes. But I also know that this is just the beginning. That's why I am asking you for your help now. It's time for patriots like you and me to come together and ensure this "radical" freedom we're fighting for continues for another four years. In an election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch. We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy everything we've worked so hard for. Are you with me? Please donate to my campaign today using this secure I appreciate you reading my whole letter, Peter. Thank you for your time Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "DONATE NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Biden's failure isn't something we made up
body:
Over 3 million people have illegally crossed the border since he took office. 3,000,000 people. And Joe Biden has done nothing but facilitate it.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=51882faa4f894096b31e06930425251a&_e=6Y0FTHmCI7GLOtHCsY2pemXCbrzyVoNRMbCSxaQ7uTGvPkFmsjTkZS12lfadDm_BtPcuw1OHv7DtOdXiJZo9c9o0V8JADWRwGI-tmuhY7BmKVyBSlwBtvbLVT6tBOSJWetkONkx5q4czW7rXRxRvLhMCuR4wbX-zprJuKQZYPRN-MfRY7Sc9QrA6jwl8g8dwpX1xOLzMPHP8SZo7q2FhSowcv9JMRFRIrPji-vLcsD2T_2kLFy7Sum3tS2Ro6SxXBgH51wm1975SamhQDs0tieJzrUZbc78MH-r0JBrL5Heyjf4mJ9egAeosrzDy3kKPJ5MxBtO8z5IS6KtcuFjc_Qauu_iWyWh60rEwU685gcStyWUgZTr-U4XZlLogpcuBRzHfgRBQ6WSX8XkXyYL25cQ_EiO4a89YjahQEJEx7Ok59UqqGctRsAchZwE1hkpl)
---
Peter, The media's lens for viewing the government is broken.

It's broken in a way that makes it easy for the legacy media to call real, rational concern hyperbole. It's broken in a way that makes it easy for the media to normalize failure.

When I tell you Joe Biden is a failed president, the media line up to attack me. But make no mistake, he is a failure.

**He has failed the American people.

_He has failed you._**

He, with help from the corporate media, has gone a step further and normalized that failure. It's so normal they look at you sideways for even noticing it.

I need you to pause here for a second. Think about the messages you get on a daily basis from the Biden administration and from their allies in the media. If you boil them down, you'll hear two steady notes. A drum beat:
1. Everything is going fine.

2. Anything that isn't fine isn't Joe Biden's fault.

One. Two. One. Two.

And they're going to keep beating that drum faster and faster and faster to try and misdirect the American people into supporting Biden apologists for office in 2022.

**That's not a tune I will listen to. That's not a tune you're going to hear in Florida.**

Biden's failure isn't something we made up. It's not a set of talking points. The choices he's made are real, their consequences have been devastating, and the pain felt by Americans across the country is real.

This legacy of failure he's cementing is seeping its way into every crevice of our country.

He presided over out-of-control spending that drove up the price of EVERYTHING and inflated away your purchasing power...

He's bowed to climate extremists and embraced an energy policy that you're paying for every day in higher costs at the pump...

Perhaps his greatest failure has been his total negligence regarding our southern border.

**Over 3 million people have illegally crossed the border since he took office. 3,000,000 people. And Joe Biden has done nothing but facilitate it.**

His failure at the border is killing people. It's creating enormous levels of drug trafficking. For the first time ever, the leading cause of death for people 18-45 in the U.S. is fentanyl overdose. 95% of which is coming from the U.S.-Mexico border.

Those deaths are a direct result of Biden's failure. I refuse to ignore that failure. I refuse to accept it. You should not accept it, either.

The 2022 elections are a line in the sand. **In states like Florida, where we have a slate of Biden apologists running for office, _we cannot give one single inch._**

**Not one.**

That's why I wrote to you today. You know Biden has failed. You see it every time you fill up your car. You see it every time you read the news and see crime spilling onto our streets. You hear it every time your kids or grandkids echo some woke nonsense they heard from some Leftist talking points.

But I need you to do more than just know it. I need you to take action. **_[I need you to make a donation right now.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=51882faa4f894096b31e06930425251a&_e=6Y0FTHmCI7GLOtHCsY2pemXCbrzyVoNRMbCSxaQ7uTGvPkFmsjTkZS12lfadDm_BtPcuw1OHv7DtOdXiJZo9c9o0V8JADWRwGI-tmuhY7BmKVyBSlwBtvbLVT6tBOSJWetkONkx5q4czW7rXRxRvLhMCuR4wbX-zprJuKQZYPRN-MfRY7Sc9QrA6jwl8g8dwpX1xOLzMPHP8SZo7q2FhSk8GtY8viiL3lhG3bY-DFPhtkGM5BeO27fXaU7zJP4Lpwk_4C8ngDm3cfHZ40bZtYU5ysjQl757FTWg_2oT8tvrVZvAWH1M6K_Nat_c3V8tY0Pket2ai7cacwrC6yPAJmGoPu2JpLG5lqSxr40IZf6X7Lfh6IswNEOHPZm3ERx64aowMSsbb4F_oc2eEh_uqBnY14LdyMW8S6Ko4PZPkMIqcuo8_HHVDob4XTyPzDXbL "I need you to make a donation right now.")_**

We're going to work for every single vote, every single mind, every single choice. We’re going to ensure that the message that Joe hears on Election Night is crystal-clear:

**Florida isn't Biden Country. America isn't Biden Country.

Failure will not be our legacy.**

**[Please, make a donation right now. Help me deliver that message.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=51882faa4f894096b31e06930425251a&_e=6Y0FTHmCI7GLOtHCsY2pemXCbrzyVoNRMbCSxaQ7uTGvPkFmsjTkZS12lfadDm_BtPcuw1OHv7DtOdXiJZo9c9o0V8JADWRwGI-tmuhY7BmKVyBSlwBtvbLVT6tBOSJWetkONkx5q4czW7rXRxRvLhMCuR4wbX-zprJuKQZYPRN-MfRY7Sc9QrA6jwl8g8dwpX1xOLzMPHP8SZo7q2FhSin1PJh0xAfRitUBqA3p_hqnH-tAyadfuIWVh8WSW0VX6B0FFtPsAOspE0MUr-JVaxZ5bhtaXhtQXB1mCY1H3K4j-vFixQhXttygsjIo58C21sKa3rM1FzW4ZJ_NJua3PxMkU5Ppjs85TlkG0j6wNRoyGkN3HEKZdIbW_hLQZe7hTllUE-gbfNVt9UU0ac51ofLAZXwkWRUs1xXicHb-ZgnbSCYUbWMScPfwXuXMLDFa)**
Sincerely, __
---

name: Senator Rob Portman
subject: Ted Budd for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
will put America First

| [](http://links.tedbudd.co/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=c48f258454ae4843bddbece6694004fd&_e=pdPlPWVlu3coEkcijOBCOXOLFvpGPYs6tt4n7YqpKuK-JgpW25PGMOIk6e7Q93kYM1IVWLrFm-7u4fj0kQXqjodIVf-anja6183vxiIEaAXdBMFVteXKSoHy1givahvTMu4hjtU0JsFi3Xh03WBdnQEGXObiozA62-KLqiAeFu7ukqE2eus11foQE6r2Jeydo_gRuJgQCOrRRj08Kf0Wx3rYQS3F1ldraa41fyN-mZ4hpPSmZjT30X2KroGQX6T4zvJVQLwyqPhZ1Y2ate-kS8rkQaiOPuyCw7P3QcP1WQGBd266qr4j2dVFxUResajwSg9iGYBBqasp6bt-tQKjSPpmUFZxqeSGqrOnSC7H0OUyeNpmdgcjNR_3v4KyZY0om_hmzo0PHcsxNZ8oJxScyXVRGQGeUyNa9_OSngQEt-wUc5VazZXpWSWclD1PJHgniYzxk_RZF543xs0uWPJZYIWy6n6BHYd2bhBANK2hXHc2PMP0tEbh94pZIIX_S1Iuj5KGyifubalrhwucDQIkpg%3D%3D)
---
Dear friends,

subject: An update on the state of our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Hello Derek,

In a moment, we’re going to show you all the great work we’ve been doing
to spread Stacey’s message to every corner of Georgia — powered by
grassroots supporters
like you.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220723_B1_CampaignUpdate_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1123%2E1862389%2EDtOBRT ]But first, we’re asking for $5 to help us reach every
Georgia voter possible and keep our momentum going strong. Can you chip in
now?

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220723_B1_CampaignUpdate_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=1123%2E1862389%2EDtOBRT ]DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ Stacey ]Stacey sitting down at a table with supporter

Derek, we
started off last week by going down to Macon, where we spoke with teachers
and administrators about the state of education in Georgia.

Stacey believes that every child in Georgia deserves a high-quality
education that gives them opportunities to reach their dreams, regardless
of their zip code. That’s why, when elected, Stacey will be Georgia’s
public education governor — putting the needs of the state’s students and
teachers first.

Stacey is in this fight for our children. They deserve a future that
shines as bright as they do.

[ Stacey ]Stacey hugging a young supporter.

Then, we headed to Baconton, where Stacey heard from community members
about the issues that mattered most to them.

Conversations like these are how we will win this campaign and get to work
for Georgians — by making sure folks across the state know that Stacey
will not leave them behind or take them for granted.

From expanding Medicaid to investing in children’s education — we have a
plan to fight for every rural Georgian, and every family across our state.

[ Stacey ]Stacey standing in front of a large crowd.

Finally, we visited Albany to spread our vision for One Georgia, where
opportunity and success in Georgia aren’t determined by your zip code,
background or access to power.

Whether we’re in Albany, Baconton or Macon, Stacey is traveling across our
state to be with the people — because she will be a governor for all of
us.

To keep our momentum strong, we need to keep powering Stacey’s travel,
getting our message out as wide as we can and mobilizing volunteers all
across the state.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220723_B1_CampaignUpdate_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=1123%2E1862389%2EDtOBRT ]But we need help from grassroots
supporters to do
this work. Can you chip in $5 now?

Thank you for all you do,
Abrams HQ

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=1123%2E1862389%2EDtOBRT ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1123%2E1862389%2EDtOBRT

name: Team Welch
subject: What do you want to see get done in Washington?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Tell Peter what issues matter most to you

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=695%2E61531%2E7C1YIr)
Hello,
This week, there were heat warnings and advisories in 28 states. Across the globe, people are facing higher temperatures and deadly heat waves—one of many ways climate change is impacting us right now.
Climate change may be the issue that fires you up the most right now. Or maybe it’s abortion rights, gun control, the opioid crisis, health care costs, or voting rights that you want Congress to prioritize. (It could even be all of these!)
[**Whatever issues matter most to you, we want to hear about them. Will you take a minute and fill out this survey?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey-2022/?source=em_20220723_s_t_natlsurvey&t=3&akid=695%2E61531%2E7C1YIr)
Peter is running for Senate to represent the people, not interest groups or deep-pocketed donors. That’s why on the campaign trail and through surveys like this, he’s listening and finding out what people like you want done in Washington.
[**Please share what you want to see from the next senator from Vermont here:**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey-2022/?source=em_20220723_s_t_natlsurvey&t=4&akid=695%2E61531%2E7C1YIr)
[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey-2022/?source=em_20220723_s_t_natlsurvey&t=7&t=8&akid=695%2E61531%2E7C1YIr)
---
What matters to you also matters to Peter—that’s the job he’s running for.
Thanks for sharing,
Team Welch

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227132/357419126/934264986?refcode=220723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlMTIzNS1iYzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4uVatSAAEWCGPqE0Jnu1Tc3wzC32vDJwKAmvnV-xvI=)
Hi, it's John. So uh Nate Silver’s 538 analysts released their 2022 Senate Election forecast and... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227133/357419127/934264986?refcode=220723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlMTIzNS1iYzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4uVatSAAEWCGPqE0Jnu1Tc3wzC32vDJwKAmvnV-xvI=) Their model named us the closest Senate race in the country. [**We can’t leave anything up to chance. Will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and Seth Moulton and help us pull ahead of Dr. Oz? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227134/357419128/934264986?refcode=220723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlMTIzNS1iYzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4uVatSAAEWCGPqE0Jnu1Tc3wzC32vDJwKAmvnV-xvI=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227135/357419129/-1896278260?refcode=220723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlMTIzNS1iYzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4uVatSAAEWCGPqE0Jnu1Tc3wzC32vDJwKAmvnV-xvI=)
Let me first say I’m so grateful for this team. We just had a killer end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising push, all thanks to yinz guys. 🥰 So I hate to come right back to your inbox with another ask. Seriously. But here are three reasons why, as soon I saw Nate’s new forecast, I knew I didn’t have a choice:
1. 538 has the entire Senate rated as a toss-up!!! Yep, Dems staying in control of the Senate could come down to a single race (ours).
2. They’re projecting a vote margin of just 0.3% in our race. Doing the math, that’s like, a few thousand PA voters at most. That’s the kind of *tiny* margin that could tip either way purely based on how hard we campaign.
3. Dr. Oz is primed to spend TONS of money attacking me. My dude is so rich, the limit basically does not exist.

So if we don’t want Dr. Oz and his buddies Trump + McConnell to tip the scales against us with massive, MAGA-y ad campaigns, we can’t skip a beat with our online fundraising. [**Please, if you’re ready to defeat Dr. Oz, flip this seat, and keep the Senate blue, consider splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Seth Moulton today so we aren’t outspent.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227136/357419130/934264986?refcode=220723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlMTIzNS1iYzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4uVatSAAEWCGPqE0Jnu1Tc3wzC32vDJwKAmvnV-xvI=) With your help, I know that we’ll be able to keep up with Dr. Oz and his MAGA money through donations of $5, $25, or whatever yinz can pitch in. It’s how we’ve run this campaign so far, and how it’s going to stay. Thank you for fighting back today. TBH, I’m really hoping our team will see your name pop up on ActBlue when you make your first-ever (!) donation. John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227137/357419131/-1896278260?refcode=220723&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWFlMTIzNS1iYzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4uVatSAAEWCGPqE0Jnu1Tc3wzC32vDJwKAmvnV-xvI=)

| | Dear friend, Mike Flood couldn’t even make it through his first day without bending to the “one-party-rule” he so strongly railed against. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48217420/357386637/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220723_floodsfirstday&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220723_floodsfirstday&refcode2=eeb62e4b-9c0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWI2MmU0Yi05YzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tnpl4i0D8Q2cXDHQH5SqGrCIOE2PFOanpdJHZUY7gpk=) Folks, this was a _bipartisan bill_ supported by **43 Republicans** and endorsed by the National Sheriff’s Association, the Major Cities Chiefs Associations, the National Association of Police Organizations, the Fraternal Order of Police (FOP), the National Police Foundation, _**and**_ the National District Attorneys Association. As the candidate endorsed by the police union, Flood’s vote should’ve been a no-brainer. Instead, he chose to turn his back on the people of our nation so he could get a few brownie points with his D.C. party bosses. **In this epidemic of mass shootings, it is unimaginable that anyone would oppose legislation to alert people about an active shooter in their vicinity. But friend, this vote perfectly illustrates the difference between Mike Flood and Patty Pansing Brooks.** In his first day of office, our congressman has already proven that he is emblematic of exactly everything wrong with our district’s previous leadership. **[If you’re ready to put power back into the hands of Nebraska voters, please chip in today to support Patty’s campaign for Congress:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48217421/357386638/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220723_floodsfirstday&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220723_floodsfirstday&refcode2=eeb62e4b-9c0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWI2MmU0Yi05YzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tnpl4i0D8Q2cXDHQH5SqGrCIOE2PFOanpdJHZUY7gpk=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed instantly._ | | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48217422/357386639/333259033?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_220723_floodsfirstday&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220723_floodsfirstday&refcode2=eeb62e4b-9c0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWI2MmU0Yi05YzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tnpl4i0D8Q2cXDHQH5SqGrCIOE2PFOanpdJHZUY7gpk=)

clean_body: He couldn’t even make it through his first day without bending to the “one-party-rule” he so strongly railed against. | = | | Dear friend, Mike Flood couldn’t even make it through his first day without bending to the “one-party-rule” he so strongly railed against. Take a look: = Folks, this was a bipartisan bill supported by 43 Republicans and endorsed by the National Sheriff’s Association, the Major Cities Chiefs Associations, the National Association of Police Organizations, the Fraternal Order of Police (FOP), the National Police Foundation, and the National District Attorneys Association. As the candidate endorsed by the police union, Flood’s vote should’ve been a no-brainer. Instead, he chose to turn his back on the people of our nation so he could get a few brownie points with his D.C. party bosses. In this epidemic of mass shootings, it is unimaginable that anyone would oppose legislation to alert people about an active shooter in their vicinity. But friend, this vote perfectly illustrates the difference between Mike Flood and Patty Pansing Brooks. In his first day of office, our congressman has already proven that he is emblematic of exactly everything wrong with our district’s previous leadership. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed instantly. | | = = | = = | = = Together, we will put our state on a better, brighter path to progress. name: Beto HQ
subject: The next phase of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need to go above and beyond what’s ever been done in the state of Texas.
#
July 31st marks our next end-of-month fundraising deadline.
**It also marks just 100 days until Election Day.**
You already know how much work we’re putting in to win this. Beto is on a 49-day, more than 5,600 mile drive to reach communities in every part of the state. Our organizing team is opening new offices, hiring more organizers, and contacting millions of voters. And we’re preparing ads to reach even more.
But in these final 100 days, we need our entire team to step it up. To win against Greg Abbott and the corporate mega-donors in his corner, we need to go above and beyond what’s ever been done in the state of Texas. There’s no other option.
**[We’re setting a straightforward but critical goal: raise $1,000,000 in grassroots donations by the 100-day mark. Can Beto count on you to contribute? We need these resources to scale up work in the last 100 days — and win.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220723-1.VlxZT-&refcode=ema20220723-199726&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=199726%2E444211%2ExA04SK)**
**[Donate Now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220723-1.VlxZT-&refcode=ema20220723-199726&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=199726%2E444211%2ExA04SK)**
Together, we're running a truly historic campaign to get Texas on the right track. Thanks to the hard work that our 79,000+ volunteers have put into knocking on doors and making calls at record levels, we have an opportunity to end Greg Abbott’s extremism and corruption — and to elect Beto as our next governor. We can’t let this opportunity pass us by.
This election isn’t about Democrats versus Republicans. Texans overwhelmingly reject Greg Abbott’s extreme positions on abortion and guns, and a majority of Texans think we’re going in the wrong direction under Abbott. **The people of Texas are ready for a positive, unifying vision — the vision Beto’s running on.**
In these next 100 days, we need to significantly increase the number of voters we’re contacting. We’ll need our volunteers to step up and lead more block walks and phone banks than ever before. It’s the only way we’ll reach all the Texas voters we need to win.
We’re confident, because we’ve already seen this team do extraordinary things — including outraising Greg Abbott’s mega-donors for the very first time in the last TEC reporting period. But if we’re going to defeat Abbott in November, we have to give it everything we’ve got.
**[$1,000,000 by the 100-day mark on July 31st. That’s what we need to do if we’re going to step things up. Will you be one of the donors who helps us reach this critical end-of-month goal?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220723-1.VlxZT-&refcode=ema20220723-199726&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=199726%2E444211%2ExA04SK)**
We’re so grateful you’re on this team.
Thank you,
Beto HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220723-199726-footer&t=22&refcode2=199726_444211_xA04SK&akid=199726%2E444211%2ExA04SK)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=199726%2E444211%2ExA04SK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=199726%2E444211%2ExA04SK)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.
