name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Battle for Missouri
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsrXUtbhN6

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osrXUtbhN6

Fellow
Conservative:

The fight
for the U.S. Senate in 2022 may come down to Missouri, and it's
starting to look like everyone knows it. The Democrats, RINOs,
and the Washington Establishment are pouring resources into the
Show Me State. Now, conservatives must answer, and win.

Conservatives in Missouri and around the country are rallying to
support state Attorney General Eric Schmitt (R-MO). He is a
proven conservative fighter - one of the most principled and
aggressive attorneys general in America.

Please
support Eric Schmitt for U.S. Senate today!

Schmitt
has demonstrated leadership for years. As a state senator, he
wrote the largest tax cut in Missouri's history. As Attorney
General he has cracked down on violent crime and led the fights
to rescue the Keystone XL pipeline, Missouri's energy and farming
sectors, and working families from Joe Biden's illegal, predatory
regulations.

And after
the Supreme Court's landmark Dobbs decision overturning Roe v.
Wade, Schmitt made Missouri the first state in the country to end
legalized abortion.

That's
why SCF and leading conservatives around the country have
endorsed Eric Schmitt. And it's why woke elites are scrambling to
defeat him. They know the one thing that can beat The Swamp is
principled, fighting conservatives who aren't afraid of them.

Eric
Schmitt is not afraid of the woke socialist Left. Please support
this campaign and help save our great country!

Polls
show Schmitt is in a close primary race against two weaker
candidates, including an anti-gun, ex-governor who resigned from
office amidst multiple scandals. Democrats know that they can
beat him - but not Schmitt.

The
elites' campaign against Eric Schmitt is going to be nasty,
underhanded, and incredibly well funded. Eric needs to fight
every hour between now and the August 2nd primary - and then
every day until November 8th.

He will
have SCF's help along with an army of conservative leaders,
including Ted Cruz, Mike Lee, Dana Loesch, and more.

Now he
needs you.

Schmitt
needs to show his primary rivals and the GOP establishment that
he can answer their attacks blow for blow and dollar for dollar.
He has the best ideas and the best campaign - but he needs our
support to fuel them to victory.

Please
join SCF in helping Eric Schmitt become Missouri's next Senator,
and the Senate's next conservative warrior.

SCF will
pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution
directly to his campaign.

Thank you
for supporting our efforts to build a conservative Senate.

Sincerely,

Matt
Hoskins
Senior
Advisor
Senate
Conservatives Fund

PRIORITY
SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF
THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate
Conservatives Fund
300
Independence Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

Senate
Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes
conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to
the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to
help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible
as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing
address, occupation and employer for each individual whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not
paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR
BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

Democrats know that they can beat him - but not Schmitt. The elites' campaign against Eric Schmitt is going to be nasty, underhanded, and incredibly well funded. Eric needs to fight every hour between now and the August 2nd primary - and then every day until November 8th. He will have SCF's help along with an army of conservative leaders, including Ted Cruz, Mike Lee, Dana Loesch, and more. Now he needs you. Schmitt needs to show his primary rivals and the GOP establishment that he can answer their attacks blow for blow and dollar for dollar. He has the best ideas and the best campaign - but he needs our support to fuel them to victory. Please join SCF in helping Eric Schmitt become Missouri's next Senator, and the Senate's next conservative warrior. SCF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. Thank you for supporting our efforts to build a conservative Senate. Sincerely, Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES END OF THE MONTH COUNTDOWN DONATE Senate Conservatives Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. subject: FWD: we’re falling behind

body:
Earlier today I set a goal to raise $40,000 in 24 hours
| |
---
Team, earlier today I set a goal to raise $40,000 in 24 hours because our fundraising is falling short.
While Republicans are spending more than $21 million on attack ads against me, my team might have to make critical budget cuts if we don't close this gap.
As of now, we still need to raise $19,783, but we don’t have much time, and I need your help to get us over the finish line. **[So please, chip in $3 or whatever you can, to help me and my team hit our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227213/357419623/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMwYWQ4Ny1iZTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njtnVQaGzoPcrCLRQSQKDqiBw9T7Mzd4kgnfcLf8rck=)**
I know that we can get back to where we need to be, but only if we all pull together.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Maggie Hassan**
Subject: our 24hr goal
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227214/357419624/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMwYWQ4Ny1iZTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njtnVQaGzoPcrCLRQSQKDqiBw9T7Mzd4kgnfcLf8rck=)
---
Folks, I’ll be blunt – our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be.
**[(If that’s all you need to hear, you can rush a donation to our team now, right here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227215/357419625/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMwYWQ4Ny1iZTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njtnVQaGzoPcrCLRQSQKDqiBw9T7Mzd4kgnfcLf8rck=)**
With control of the Senate in the balance, we knew that Republicans would use every trick in the book to try to flip this seat. But thanks to people like you we’ve been able to stay in this fight and push back at every turn.
But now, just a week away from the end of the month, we are falling short. To make up some ground I’m setting a one day $40,000 fundraising goal.
I know $40,000 in 24 hours seems tough, but with the GOP spending over over $21 million attacking my record, we can’t afford not to fight back. Falling behind this close to the election would mean cutting back in places where we need to ramp up. **[That’s why I’m asking if you can rush $3 or more to help us reach our 24 hour goal and keep our campaign on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227216/357419626/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMwYWQ4Ny1iZTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njtnVQaGzoPcrCLRQSQKDqiBw9T7Mzd4kgnfcLf8rck=)**
| | [RUSH $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227217/357419627/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMwYWQ4Ny1iZTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njtnVQaGzoPcrCLRQSQKDqiBw9T7Mzd4kgnfcLf8rck=)
---
The outcome of this race will rest on our ability to fight back against GOP smears and deliver our message to Granite Staters. We can’t do either if we don’t make up some ground, so I hope that I can count on you to help me close the gap.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

body:
Last night, Donald Trump sent a message we cannot ignore.
#

Friends —
Last night, Donald Trump sent a message we cannot ignore.
He called Arizona "critically important" — and he made it crystal clear that Mark Kelly is one of his top targets. He'll stop at nothing to kick Mark out of office this November, and replace him with his hand-picked candidate: "hardcore MAGA" Blake Masters.
So, what does that mean for us?
It probably means more attack ads. It means more smears and misinformation on social media. It means more far-right dark money poured into this race against Mark.
It means Mark’s re-election just got that much harder — and the polls were already razor-thin.
It also means Mark needs your help. One day — everything we have — to prove we can defend Mark from these attacks and defend Arizona’s Senate seat. Together.
[**Please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today — especially today — after Trump’s attacks at his Arizona rally last night. There is only one way we win: Together.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july22.t8IncZ&refcode=em220723-1-7&t=1&akid=3354%2E6688874%2EnBov9G)

body:
|
| | | Oh no, Peter!

How did you leave this exclusive Platinum membership upgrade offer in your cart?!?

Your order is _incomplete_ AND you have _missed_ the deadline to upgrade!

Do not fear, though! House Republican Leadership has something special to offer you.

Now, they usually don't do this... but because you are one of our top patriots, _**[they have decided to offer you an exclusive extended deadline till 11:59pm tonight to upgrade your membership to Platinum!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60862066:6SuBhsVxN:m:1:3317145305:94CFA999438A09A0D7E73F9CB230C897:r "they have decided to offer you an exclusive extended deadline till 11:59pm tonight to upgrade your
membership to Platinum!")**_

upgrading your membership to Platinum status before midnight tonight.")**_

Thank you,

Platinum Membership Services (via House GOP)

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Campaign Update from Matt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Check out what we’ve been up to on the campaign trail recently.| | |
---
[](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=271ce02548ad423580d4b9436d9a5314&_e=Z_k-0sl-5G_IFVPhikp5WsF50RJMQc7DDnD4VprdXUs2v4CfH76v0ukkoNMxoQ_1L4c_w1aBf-Qcj7LN1GajWIKoXphcyJ-oPB_tfWHtwWSakNcARUDKrwq_hR33p8kvnZp_4fmh6OreYp59HQ0Ixgl7mBHm1r617JLFpcuKo2GC2dZo3IzdDzvx-illfzRfI6-8Or_YPHpWiiThtSUxIOR-sMpOkzeL3jkSBwYJ7rujLiXDl6Hyh11TTitDUIjXc-o1DELbJqheZC0F0IKbBQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Happy weekend, Peter! I wanted to share some quick updates from the campaign trail. Super Saturday was a blast. Thank you to our AMAZING volunteers for coming out to our Thousand Oaks HQ and knocking doors throughout the district!
---
| |
---
|
---
| | This Tuesday, I laced up the old cleats and volunteered as a coach at the Oxnard Police Department’s annual Free Youth Soccer Clinic. The kids were FANTASTIC (and ran me ragged)! Thank you to the Oxnard PD for all you do for our community.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Endorsements continue to roll in. This week, Congressman Steve Scalise – the second highest ranking Republican in the House – endorsed our campaign! As did the Republican Jewish Coalition.
---
| |
---
| | It was great seeing old friends and meeting new ones recently at Godspeak Calvary Chapel in Newbury Park. Thank you to Pastor Rick Brown for the warm welcome!
---
| |
---
| | Small businesses are vital to our local economy. At the Westlake Village Sunday Farmers’ Market, the kids enjoyed honey sticks from Blue Ridge Honey – a family-run Ventura County business going strong for nearly 40 years now. (And this time, slightly more honey wound up in Abby’s belly than in her hair.)
---
| |
---
| | Thanks to your generous support, we continue breaking fundraising records! Campaign finance reports released last week show that we AGAIN outraised incumbent Democrat Julia Brownley – both last quarter and cycle-to-date.
---
| |
---
| | If you follow us on social media, you know that we’ve been holding Brownley accountable for her disastrous voting record. (And if you’re not following us, what are you waiting for!? clean_body: Check out what we’ve been up to on the campaign trail recently.| | | | | Happy weekend, Peter! I wanted to share some quick updates from the campaign trail. Super Saturday was a blast. Thank you to our AMAZING volunteers for coming out to our Thousand Oaks HQ and knocking doors throughout the district! | | | | | This Tuesday, I laced up the old cleats and volunteered as a coach at the Oxnard Police Department’s annual Free Youth Soccer Clinic. The kids were FANTASTIC (and ran me ragged)! Thank you to the Oxnard PD for all you do for our community. | | | | | Endorsements continue to roll in. This week, Congressman Steve Scalise – the second highest ranking Republican in the House – endorsed our campaign! As did the Republican Jewish Coalition. | | | | It was great seeing old friends and meeting new ones recently at Godspeak Calvary Chapel in Newbury Park. Thank you to Pastor Rick Brown for the warm welcome! | | | | Small businesses are vital to our local economy. At the Westlake Village Sunday Farmers’ Market, the kids enjoyed honey sticks from Blue Ridge Honey – a family-run Ventura County business going strong for nearly 40 years now. (And this time, slightly more honey wound up in Abby’s belly than in her hair.) | | | | Thanks to your generous support, we continue breaking fundraising records! Campaign finance reports released last week show that we AGAIN outraised incumbent Democrat Julia Brownley – both last quarter and cycle-to-date. | | | | If you follow us on social media, you know that we’ve been holding Brownley accountable for her disastrous voting record. (And if you’re not following us, what are you waiting for!? Click here: , , .) Brownley’s public statements on inflation are particularly detached from reality – like her false claim that “President Biden delivered on his promise to...combat inflation.” Seriously, she said that. Check out the chart below, and decide for yourself whether Brownley is being honest with voters. | | | | Our digital storefront is up and running. Go online and grab some campaign gear to stay cool this summer! (Or feel free to stop by our campaign office at 1362 Thousand Oaks Blvd. anytime for FREE signs.) | | | | Speaking of campaign offices, we're almost ready for the Grand Opening of our new Simi Valley HQ! Stay tuned for details on that. Please feel free to email me anytime if you’d like any additional information about the campaign. Thanks for reading and enjoy the rest of your weekend! Sincerely, Matt | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals or federal government contractors are prohibited. We must use our best efforts to obtain and maintain the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per calendar year. body:
I am truly humbled that the voters selected me as the Democratic candidate to represent Colorado’s 3rd District and the person who will defeat Lauren | | | [](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=3708f3d1336c4f28a2fb42fc43232640&_e=L3XDJRehzTtpXvet1LHGenvC3JytuE7yZralRnrUwkOCe6-TnpNUYGOeR5xDueLhTcGsuhMpuGkKssi2E5NuNvyCzncUGYFk4jfju76SGOAZhx4PiTQRsqih9xi_hJVPQOxDBbyIsYCrHZmsao0RJx7l-Wge19IBzXAChzjUUV2GxGF790aEX4svypkgc4RmEi_Czot9WbYWm-UMpM23muEIxLaZDJkx6MT_aPrrNO4xV6gRaGRTuVCA7X_j2EbdcGKaitCUwV5Z2kjgQQLUjGVfyndyAsD_v445xglMeW-zcSTZ-4jn_BEI_6el35WUifS3liIEJ9H_-7UyK84_J886_SWqfr1rKm7wUUzog8qIR9vM8-_GI0zuTIYlCPhviy-Ol7X46IImog8wqMqpLtTNh8k4T4wPNX4WHBhybFJPYHaOQsIKjyNxrhJI-Pna3QnSnPrdGByn4HSBnp_q7A%3D%3D)We did it, folks!I am truly humbled that the voters selected me as **the Democratic candidate to represent Colorado’s 3rd District and the person who will defeat Lauren Boebert in November.**We’ve worked hard over the past several months, reaching out to voters, touring the district, and now our hard work has paid off.I am so grateful for all the people I’ve met and the supporters that I have gathered. The voters of the 3rd district heard my message, and my ideas resonated with them. They saw that I am the strongest Democrat to defeat Lauren Boebert, and I give everyone my word that we will, in fact, defeat her.Between both Republicans and Democrats, over 55% of voters selected someone other than Boebert in the primary. I’ll build that same coalition to beat Boebert in November. **[Join me and let's bring decency back to Colorado.](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=3708f3d1336c4f28a2fb42fc43232640&_e=L3XDJRehzTtpXvet1LHGenvC3JytuE7yZralRnrUwkOCe6-TnpNUYGOeR5xDueLhTcGsuhMpuGkKssi2E5NuNvyCzncUGYFk4jfju76SGOAZhx4PiTQRsqih9xi_hJVPQOxDBbyIsYCrHZmsao0RJx7l-Wge19IBzXAChzjUUV2GxGF790aEX4svypkgc4RmEi_Czot9WbYWm-UMpM23muEIxLaZDJkx6MT_aPrrNO4xV6gRaGRTuVCA7X_j2EbdqYj8vvL8gBuL_nFRj856IyOLsjSrfdjbFtmy2_xjGNT_QKNBxwU2zLjYIOIehDLib-Pgpn08wj7ovde80DMQdpqF5Egj3r_M-ZOtop0WPJi3DbWSnjzA_M-6c7enG9HR4l0w8vQmVCEIB4xsXjRGmP7bs-HTDdavAAM0M5vfbop6p7U15u8UkM94WUSLRoWcKKExrz5KOY3EexKPtEWuIA%3D%3D)**_If clean_body: I am truly humbled that the voters selected me as the Democratic candidate to represent Colorado’s 3rd District and the person who will defeat Lauren | | | did it, folks!I am truly humbled that the voters selected me as the Democratic candidate to represent Colorado’s 3rd District and the person who will defeat Lauren Boebert in November.We’ve worked hard over the past several months, reaching out to voters, touring the district, and now our hard work has paid off.I am so grateful for all the people I’ve met and the supporters that I have gathered. The voters of the 3rd district heard my message, and my ideas resonated with them. They saw that I am the strongest Democrat to defeat Lauren Boebert, and I give everyone my word that we will, in fact, defeat her.Between both Republicans and Democrats, over 55% of voters selected someone other than Boebert in the primary. I’ll build that same coalition to beat Boebert in November. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | I am so grateful for all your support, and I can’t wait to get to work fighting against Boebert in November. – Adam Adam Frisch is a Democrat running for Congress in Colorado’s 3rd District. The Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ has been devastating. As abortion bans go into effect across the country, **I’m heartbroken to see abortion patients turned away and go without care because of the reckless actions of a few power-hungry people.**

It’s why we must now ensure all of these critical rights are enshrined into law so they can not be easily stripped away. **And that’s why I voted YES on the Right to Contraception Act yesterday.**

_The right to birth control is fundamental to women and other people who can get pregnant._ We cannot let the extremist Republican Party take this away too.

But sadly, with November’s election approaching, the far-right is going overboard to energize their extremist base. That’s why we have to fight back to win this re-election race.

[**Peter, can you help me meet our $3,000 goal so I can win my re-election campaign and keep fighting to protect our rights in Congress? name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: A simple request

body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=J4oRyCASV6Z%2BI%2Bod3Q2fy2fxoVxkRpxj&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back Senate control. Michael Steele, the former Chair of the RNC, says if McConnell succeeds his first action will be to eliminate the filibuster. That will allow the GOP to unleash an unrestrained, radical, dangerous agenda - likely including a national ban on abortion - that is drastically out of touch with our fundamental values as Americans.
Today, I'm making a simple request that will help stop him: a $5 donation.
I know it doesn't sound like much, Friend, but you have my word - grassroots contributions like yours are what enable campaigns like this to protect must-win seats and keep Democratic control of the Senate.
And the honest to God truth is this: With such a dangerous GOP eyeing recapturing the Senate majority - and only a single Senate seat standing in the way of them succeeding - not one supporter of our democracy can stay on the sidelines right now.
The fallout from _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned is proof enough. Republicans worked for decades to gain enough political power - from the states to Congress to the Supreme Court - to demolish _Roe_ , and they aren't stopping there. They are scheming to prosecute women who travel to other states seeking abortion care. They are hellbent on prosecuting doctors providing abortion care. They are determined to pass a national ban on abortion altogether.
**Senate Republicans have more than $30 million sitting in the bank with which to achieve all of this.**
I will go toe-to-toe with this band of extremists on the campaign trail and in the Senate. I'm already leading the fight to pass legislation that will prevent the GOP's sickening attempts to prosecute women who cross state lines for an abortion. **But I cannot - Democrats cannot - win this fight alone. **
It's your $5 that will enable us to win. Because when you donate $5, and someone else donates $5, and thousands of others follow suit, it adds up to a powerful grassroots movement that's able to fight and win against the GOP's mega-money machine. **So before my next fundraising deadline, I am asking you:[Will you donate $5 or more to help me protect this seat and ensure we keep control of the Senate and stop the GOP's dangerous agenda?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1219-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
With so much gratitude,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1219-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CKzTDbzTQwzVqScEAwKNb2fxoVxkRpxj&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=384955b6b9944ca48bbeb68d2f6ae596&_e=7cHB1dOSS8KEp4f2EolmftnfZ4RMJEE1I2koC4XOdyvPtYuNaJFwUdpkMyE6GxYc_zUAGPTvaem7qpqUtz1phVDFU3PJaugnpa7w4RcETmt5gVQFQ_0n3-wG1IDbjfpCnUxg2Wjik9NqQOp8Z9bP6tji7yNaxr4CyUP4fsO-jAGE4XYmx50e-2a6jLdpVody8KscwTanv6c_QfPoUkZhcCCjAJRmd5bfcH-KcMF7b3OSuhPwgrnd9yOXRDCPxpGIcc55bMb0kas7rhHk21e_pj34-WIwQ9Vw_0Zy_dz02JzR-kqowAvTuPwpzvaFVMMHupS4o1LF98rIHlf6ds3YV7j59CRmgmO572QhgiodOFhv-8_4GoP4boEKzIUNZXnG865M973l0WPyT6JPui_EcbaPNpGzxI_1BqiDFQYIIvnGoUnkrK-AvLv5VxWhIOEB)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=384955b6b9944ca48bbeb68d2f6ae596&_e=7cHB1dOSS8KEp4f2EolmftnfZ4RMJEE1I2koC4XOdyvPtYuNaJFwUdpkMyE6GxYc_zUAGPTvaem7qpqUtz1phVDFU3PJaugnpa7w4RcETmt5gVQFQ_0n3-wG1IDbjfpCnUxg2Wjik9NqQOp8Z9bP6tji7yNaxr4CyUP4fsO-jAGE4XYmx50e-2a6jLdpVody8KscwTanv6c_QfPoUkZhcCCjAJRmd5bfcH-KcMF7b3PG4sNZwsDCk2BQoq6eN26ZYxsGMOsML-h4NRbhKRxyZpH-JTYZJ2Vtaxb9Gb652oZXGSuEt7IqZqvWqTe7UU1mtWDt_gvhcn5KddmX_UE-lq5FJHUFR4UB8ITTzMd6N4S1MNNtKcLXLAX4_lbSIrxd97oaJ0NelRM98celst6PFA9csv6lVu3Jsx0mT5ktAa2K8JrHBo5gd5C5uzh5JguI)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=384955b6b9944ca48bbeb68d2f6ae596&_e=7cHB1dOSS8KEp4f2EolmftnfZ4RMJEE1I2koC4XOdyvPtYuNaJFwUdpkMyE6GxYc_zUAGPTvaem7qpqUtz1phVDFU3PJaugnpa7w4RcETmt5gVQFQ_0n3-wG1IDbjfpCnUxg2Wjik9NqQOp8Z9bP6tji7yNaxr4CyUP4fsO-jAGE4XYmx50e-2a6jLdpVody8KscwTanv6c_QfPoUkZhcCCjAJRmd5bfcH-KcMF7b3OD5-4jntTOuYSmKj9uWS0e6AVGwSRPuUaZi3WHRNneDg3WbKml-uJFfSupW2A2iPZAauVmp25UsAHIfaaZnf6wHmmxHIQiAIycTWYgEZlGOh8ojWY98V_krEh5Vh3T2L9USt4Iem2r-3Ql7eBGxSV3du_hVAI0heNVGLGOmf3w-92ZXOsF5nwee8bm5CXqags0oyYQ9R70XVeWHx-UFX5I)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
“Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment.” |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=094a655584364fcaa0d73f009fe6a6d2&_e=cPjlgTbUbj-UBfR1R2YxszPTBKboTTJPSPCIyCm4C61U0jNQkA6-AkBJFRoKTllX-WBBujYY2h7HILrM6p8Qb17On6YfHKbE96ETMWN_7lmdvcVjszIOICtj4GQizTHXGjtX3mG4tjBmpdfyf-USoFrcmytg5mCyxENyp8Dh4uFuBM3Xcehmz_gUUQxEQG7BGEJiSAu3Mty33UHBA0hC4QevUIe7qesPUBvbMp5NQ25kKlOeNRp_hNerHxLJCGUl24ZvPeaIaHk5lVZugxDoxHnr_P9bYDkIBf2ATDJL6-IdsO6Rr_qInv4-Tx676reN6lroCIjgfYgOmzPfhbmGvRydobWkx4THXUtIGP23KqQ6_TDz5fq15BzVkqADSkcBkFidsIABgNgxWrkQZ8sg_a22hpbAnPfhdjRwpML-ngUa_3feszdtMn18dVQp79tMRC3sTz5NhZvmV_PVN32fLXhfDhcd_BIU1gAFAy1aRcg%3D)

---
Fellow American,

A new article from _Axios_ , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation:

| _**"Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment."**_
---

You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins.

The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say:

_**"Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side."**_
---

clean_body: “Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment.” | Fellow American, A new article from Axios , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation: | "Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment." You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins. The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say: "Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side." While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧 If YOU want to personally stop Democrats from keeping control of the Senate and causing our economy further turmoil, then I need you to step up and help us close the fundraising gap. Fellow American, our opponent breaks a new fundraising record every single quarter. From April to June, he raised more than $17,000,000, which is 300% more than what we were able to raise. All of those millions are funding non-stop attack ads against me. We're now slightly down in the polls (within the margin of error), but we need your help to fight back on the airwaves. 'Losing' is not in my vocabulary, so I'm ready to work hard to win this critical race. If you are committed to building the "Red Wave" and stopping a potential Senate debacle, Thanks for your support, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Send Liz Cheney packing
body:
Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-a
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb76jaqb34t4uof7h0sd8hajjfgdkvvtn7mabo8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcoli6mqbcclj6op62ppkchpn2cphe1orepdjchhr0tjledh76o34m9qm6stgssrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8o6cs9n6dhmfchicoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This will be the most important race in the entire country... |
Friend,

Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to "bring it."

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign to FIRE Liz Cheney.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fc9n7lg91g059vmvel1qkp3ntmikajdlsribf8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0c4hgsk555j8281lrtpj5kmvakuakcoakdcblng_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise millions for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a 60 Minutes interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney.

[**Will you help me stand up with an urgently needed donation today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8s5akkouotc6lo6lmkpf11tja9ec66111o6h6rg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, **let me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his socialists hate – they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party... and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know – like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was duped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today? I'll be honest, her LIBERAL big money backers are putting millions of dollars into her campaign right. Without your help, I don't stand a chance.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvvicu8f8j6ckgv70a13nsd88hh7aoi37s0p2ibo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkq197vi78jmiocj0vkgn95mb4usd95gded7kj7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming – and the _American_ people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need: yours.**

[**Will you make an donation today to show President Trump that you're still a part of his MAGA-America First Movement?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ho0qp7h9muqpe2nahdnvhq8lqb17aftndt7neg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeh02l7sob1jcqa039tm3v1vaspt23its2jhkkmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something – this will be the most important race in the entire country – but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing for good.**

[**So please, won't you ensure that Liz Cheney bury me, a true conservative, with money from her swampy elite friends?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgpb0ogvfs4d0moedle43iisdn2sbmucr8tl0to_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkqb2np2mtl8aoddvp22ujqioll3tj4lfkmoitn0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsb6cfngkjqk6ima6orlc37nsd361kst0u7kjnd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

P.S. It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

[**No more – will you make an urgent donation to my campaign to defeat her in the Republican primary?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq9e6cg4hlua0ho6bjl1ccpq3iemm64bqoktt4fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs) [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeg46cuj3scetj779l2o44kmr5buuk3r9ends430_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs)
---
| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zevd4hr1driltffita3a1gdqlc8gba60p1caus78_rp22sh2s8i66pb0sdg66ob2c5h2bs)
---
| Paid for by:
Hageman For Wyoming
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyenne, WY 82003
---

Friend,
---
In just over 2 weeks, the people of Wisconsin will select their GOP nominee for governor to go toe-to-toe with radical liberal Tony Evers.
---
But Evers isn’t wasting any time.**_He just reported having raised more than $20 MILLION to date for his reelection campaign._**
---
With a war chest like that, it’s clear Evers is preparing for the fight of his life.
---
_As the ONLY candidate polling within the margin of error of beating him this November, there’s no other way to say it, the fate of this battleground state rests on our August 9 primary._
---
**That’s why I have to ask for your urgent help with just over 2 WEEKS to go.**
---

clean_body: I’m the only candidate who can stop him. | Friend, In just over 2 weeks, the people of Wisconsin will select their GOP nominee for governor to go toe-to-toe with radical liberal Tony Evers. But Evers isn’t wasting any time.He just reported having raised more than $20 MILLION to date for his reelection campaign. With a war chest like that, it’s clear Evers is preparing for the fight of his life. As the ONLY candidate polling within the margin of error of beating him this November, there’s no other way to say it, the fate of this battleground state rests on our August 9 primary. That’s why I have to ask for your urgent help with just over 2 WEEKS to go. With Election Day right around the corner, we can’t take our foot off the gas. This is our ONE SHOT at taking down Evers. And if we fall short on August 9, we’ll be paving the way for his reelection. With Biden’s approval rating having fallen to an abysmal 33% in a recent poll, Evers has never been more vulnerable. But polls also show that I’m the only one who can finish the job and FLIP Wisconsin. And Evers knows it. It’s why he’s gone on an all-out fundraising blitz over the last few months. His record-breaking $10 million raised in just the first six months of 2022 is nearly double what Governor Walker raised during the first half of 2018. But with conservative patriots like YOU fighting by my side, I know we can and WILL win the nomination and FIRE Evers. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: You can’t make this up. | | Peter, Pennsylvania Democrats want you to know: they’re the Party of “Non-Men!” | This isn’t a random fringe loon on Twitter, Peter. This is the Pennsylvania Democratic Party...redefining our words, erasing women, anddestroying universal truths. On November 8, Pennsylvania voters will either vote for the Party of Non-Men ... or for the Party of American Values. Josh Shapiro and the rest of the Far-Left PA Dems know they have an insane, unpopular agenda. Their job is to do everything they can to make Pennsylvanians forget what they’re really voting for. The bigger financial advantage they have over us, the more successful they’ll be at pulling this off. | | | | Thanks, Doug | | | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO

Fellow American - There's no other way to say it ... **this is an emergency.**

We're being outraised by Senator Raphael Warnock by millions, and it's allowed him to run a barrage of misleading attack ads against us. To make matters worse - _**a new poll shows Senator Warnock is now leading slightly.**_

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs are flooding the airwaves in Georgia. The only way we can counter their attacks is by raising enough money to keep our ads on the air and set the record straight. **[Fellow American, we're counting on your help to pick up the pace and win this critical Georgia Senate race.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=9fa10f8ddfa84803890a1e34c34f2b98&_e=8j9Lx6hV8d4L18iGfygcOqUPvfnZa9Vy04fMaZnVCpy25Oq1eQMIQwsKkWNtt9R_K2_OluGZ1cL8QOWe3vBzQ2u0lry-a2ixAnxn4CqydffBzgYfkrB_UPF6qsBJ225h-1YlTiHELRFdYQ7J7W62g9SGJ4agmYHDNGuY9Hr4Jzvk_ghUM5lQUvJWZYUdrLpPq43ca5TjS57FJgsAD14Jszg_5Q5HJ9saIgM-LmC47qivIAzeCMwb4LFB_0vZcslVqHVqGKMoSLpV4vsBtjiqg0nf2ud_3DXotumq5y6egk-hL1_6xHDmwsFJdzzEHvJkqlNz2K7urCxsmvrjvqvWUcyn7rDuJVsshZjCkpgvOAEOxF6mhD5k9tU_q-m1WJZV_wxpGV1zmIqLu1NaOysbKgvosgj0onuif2RD25EybnWcnXSkmuYHWQshhMG_LfQT-ElqIIgEcj3MkXaTAsCeyxwVHn7X9cv09gRA7r5LNoc%3D)**

clean_body: We’re being outraised by millions, and a new poll shows we’re slightly behind. We need your support to beat our far-Left opponent. Raphael Warnock will have enough cash to run the very best campaign money can buy. | Fellow American - There's no other way to say it ... this is an emergency. We're being outraised by Senator Raphael Warnock by millions, and it's allowed him to run a barrage of misleading attack ads against us. To make matters worse - a new poll shows Senator Warnock is now leading slightly. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs are flooding the airwaves in Georgia. The only way we can counter their attacks is by raising enough money to keep our ads on the air and set the record straight. Our team made it clear - raise $50,000 by midnight or risk falling even farther behind. We must keep our ads on the air to counter the lies that Democrats are pushing out to the voters of Georgia. We know $50,000 by midnight is a lot - but here's the deal... If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | Fellow American, this is the most closely watched Senate race this year because the Senate majority will be determined by what happens in Georgia. We're being attacked by misleading ads, being outraised by millions, and dropping slightly in a new poll. BUT WE CAN STILL WIN. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Working Families Party
subject: An inside look
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
As always, there's a lot to cover. | | | **We're back with the July WFP update, Peter.** These monthly updates are an inside look at what’s happening in our party, including key primary elections and all the organizing WFP members are doing to build a better future for our country.
* * *
**_THE WFP WINNING STREAK CONTINUES_** In last month’s newsletter, we covered some major WFP wins out of Oregon, Pennsylvania, and Texas. We’re thrilled to share that our winning streak has continued in states including California, New York, Illinois and Colorado: In case you missed it, **Delia Ramirez won an overwhelming victory in her run for Illinois’ newly drawn 3rd Congressional District!** Like many of our progressive candidates, she was up against an onslaught of outside spending from corporate Super PACs and special interest groups. Ramirez would be the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest and is almost sure to represent this solidly blue district. As Delia said in her victory speech, **_[“We just broke a thick-ass glass ceiling.”](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/AmCPGAa5TKCV0Ya3nRaidPSf20kmhsiHUyz5KvxWQr6CARNH_jXZcpHZh2gdCZE1Hi6wEl7RrqhmjbXyhxGZZyUQnLRH6hNYSs4oaPUCN6mNMHx8km8xQS6HwM_izYYpCNILm6CaAFRwNFbq75wOzEZdcL2tICR_VNLGgk0kzGHKzw7JAq2LaxAEoQpXaZ_Sue3re34pkO-m9eQ95TCFRMBQmd6g_j_D84EAroCbtDHhS7olxgfBVWQ8gvTgBOhCNqY9u023aiEux2FGRNMhLFlcfhs4t7m96ZBsioo5MsVX2U1i_8bT39bf3Qx10Q4f/3nz/901oMlZDTCypgYsmkUn4ow/h0/cYlk0nVzZTXJ2OqMyNqfZQpkd04wtX9-Kew9QKnYedw)_** In Colorado, CO WFP Executive Committeemember Elisabeth Epps faced $300,000 in big business spending in her race for the state legislature – but that couldn’t stop us. **Epps decisively won her race for State House District 6 in Denver.** It’s likely Epps will go on to win this solidly blue district and we can’t wait to see her progressive leadership. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: Building a Working Families Majority in states across the country and in Congress is not just a goal of ours for the future. It’s not something we plan to do down the line. **It’s what we are doing in Congress and statehouses across the nation — _right now._** **But powerful forces will not stop trying to defeat us.** Our people-powered candidates continue to face an unprecedented amount of spending from right-wing Super PACs and billionaires who are terrified by the idea of more champions for working families taking seats in Congress and state legislatures. These dark money forces have tried to stop our movement before, but we’re **showing up and doing the work to out-organize** the special interests. **[Can you contribute $6 or any amount today to our Working Families Majority Fund? Primaries for WFP champions like Mandela Barnes (WI-Sen), Andy Levin (MI-11), Rashida Tlaib (MI-12), and Cori Bush (MO-01) are coming up in just a matter of days, and we have to be prepared for anything.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUdxlkB5z0EbTeCNTa2JvGxohQeV8M9I5uF5wJAWTasgYhvCLjfbb5Rbn1yypGcF96ows9qIBO2I9cZbmY3BdTXpJqwiD1bcabqYpQK410tClkApGaGLH47HZEThCpu3F_B-Ywz-ftjKf9dK6vWzIE5eY38WrM1X9fscM56En7kas_CwRu6KUPtRc4HvUuk3CSyoHqHE_4GTrSqMHGRIQSbk9uenpjPSKRdv_mwDm6qVf9KGH2K0X-KT5C5Z52j5BuOvlugE1nOQSNQBx0lMtQRPQLjru2hynVPWnM_B-p7KM/3nz/901oMlZDTCypgYsmkUn4ow/h1/bnV-8iml1VrXU0NC-ZEbBJpgHCLldwJBwglrJe7arsA)**
* * *

clean_body: As always, there's a lot to cover. | | | We're back with the July WFP update, Peter. These monthly updates are an inside look at what’s happening in our party, including key primary elections and all the organizing WFP members are doing to build a better future for our country. THE WFP WINNING STREAK CONTINUES In last month’s newsletter, we covered some major WFP wins out of Oregon, Pennsylvania, and Texas. We’re thrilled to share that our winning streak has continued in states including California, New York, Illinois and Colorado: In case you missed it, Delia Ramirez won an overwhelming victory in her run for Illinois’ newly drawn 3rd Congressional District! Like many of our progressive candidates, she was up against an onslaught of outside spending from corporate Super PACs and special interest groups. Ramirez would be the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest and is almost sure to represent this solidly blue district. As Delia said in her victory speech, In Colorado, CO WFP Executive Committeemember Elisabeth Epps faced $300,000 in big business spending in her race for the state legislature – but that couldn’t stop us. Epps decisively won her race for State House District 6 in Denver. It’s likely Epps will go on to win this solidly blue district and we can’t wait to see her progressive leadership. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: Building a Working Families Majority in states across the country and in Congress is not just a goal of ours for the future. It’s not something we plan to do down the line. It’s what we are doing in Congress and statehouses across the nation — right now. But powerful forces will not stop trying to defeat us. Our people-powered candidates continue to face an unprecedented amount of spending from right-wing Super PACs and billionaires who are terrified by the idea of more champions for working families taking seats in Congress and state legislatures. These dark money forces have tried to stop our movement before, but we’re showing up and doing the work to out-organize the special interests. UPCOMING PRIMARY ELECTION CALENDAR August 2: Arizona August 2: Kansas August 2: Michigan August 2: Missouri August 2: Washington August 4: Tennessee August 9: Connecticut August 9: Minnesota August 9: Vermont August 9: Wisconsin August 13: Alaska August 13: Wyoming August 23: Florida August 23: New York – Congressional and State Senate UPCOMING EVENTS (Sunday, July 31, 8 - 9pm ET) Join us Sunday, 7/31, for a special WFP Assembly with U.S. Senate candidate for Wisconsin Mandela Barnes. During this assembly you'll get to know Mandela, hear what issues he'll champion including how he intends to tackle gun violence and defend abortion rights, and why we need to go all out for one of the highest stakes Senate races in the country. (Thursdays, 7-9pm ET and Saturdays, 12-1pm ET) Join us to talk to voters about Mandela Barnes and why he's the best choice for the Senate! We'll provide training, scripts and the folks to call and make it easy for you to get involved. (Thursdays, 6-8pm CT, Saturdays, 11am-1pm CT, and Sundays, 1-3pm CT) One of the best ways we can fight back against the right-wing Supreme Court is to elect pro-choice candidates to Congress and the Senate who will stand up for reproductive rights. Sign up to join us for a phone bank to elect pro-choice candidates to public office who will fight to codify Roe v Wade into law. (Tuesday, July 26, 6-8pm ET) We need you! Corporate PACs and billionaire donors are shelling out big bucks to attack our elected leaders who support working people! Join us to support members of The Squad as we identify supporters and persuade voters who are on the fence! (Wednesday, July 27, 7:30-8:30pm ET) This WFP community conversation and training will help activists and candidates understand the current political moment in 2022, crafting their story of self/short rap within that context, and how to leverage circles of influence to share and create connection within local communities. OTHER WFP UPDATES AND CLIPS New York WFP has made two new endorsements in upcoming August federal primaries including and . An exciting shows Yuh-Line tied for first place in her crowded primary. WFP has stepped up in response to the Supreme Court’s attack on abortion rights. Our activists and elected leaders helped to organize a mass civil disobedience in Washington DC, with coverage in the Rhode Island WFP Organizing Director Zack Mezera makes the case for a number of reforms — including fusion voting — in his Thanks for taking the time to read more about WFP's work, Peter. This newsletter is our way of keeping our movement informed about the work we're doing. If you have thoughts on the kind of content you'd like to see in the future, just reply directly to this email and let us know! This rundown is just a tiny summary of everything our movement is doing in this critical election year. In solidarity, All of us at the Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We need to help Patty Murray fight back.
#
Peter,
This week, we told you about the attack ads on Facebook funded by Patty’s GOP opponent.
Well, those attacks are still coming — and right now, Republicans are banking on these negative tactics to shore up the support they need to flip this seat and take back control of the Senate.
**[Team Patty is stepping up in a big way to fight back — but we’re still $9,209 short of our flash fundraising goal that we need to reach to respond. Will you pitch in $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227842/357425704/-1586137196?refcode=pm_em_220723_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWRhNWIxOC1jNzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHK0zu9PhOx8_-JXG5H291_QVPXcpNrGLE8iQ7ios24=)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: He called a 10-year-old rape victim a liar, and is responsible for enforcing Ohio’s abortion access laws in a post-Roe world. If that sounds awful to you, too, help the Democratic Attorneys General Association put good AGs in every state.
body:
Our frontline against creeping fascism
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **They're our last line of defense against creeping fascism.** Right Wing Arizona AG Mark Brnovich---Republican, of course--is petitioning an Arizona court to allow an abortion ban from 1901 to go into effect, banning abortion for every woman in Arizona, except when her life is at risk. Women who will suffer bodily trauma from pregnancies with severe complications, 10 yr old rape victims, 12 yr olds molested by a member of the family, **_this soulless cretin wants to force every one of them to give control of their bodies, mental health, economic well-being--THEIR LIVES, to the state. _** Luckily, we have just the answer for Brnovich's evil, electing Kris Mayes the next Arizona Attorney General, a dedicated public servant who has won statewide office in Arizona in the past and, most importantly, an abortion rights fighter who will ensure that office is occupied by someone who will _always_ protect the right to choose. Sadly, the story in Arizona is not unique. **_In Ohio, Attorney General David Yost called the 10 yr old girl who was raped and, in a what became a national story, had to flee to Indiana to get an abortion, a "liar." _**This craven zealot said a 10 yr old girl just made it up...until the rapist was arrested in Columbus and Yost had to retreat to the safety of (for once) shutting up.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf1780d8-e607-4db1-b859-7778ea289898/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_The Democratic Attorneys General Association takes on the Yosts and Brnovichs in every state across the country, electing Democrats like Kris Mays who will protect our control over our bodies, our right to vote, our right to breathe air that doesn't give us cancer and many other things we don't even think about._** **_We must help them prevent Republicans from rigging our elections, taking over women's bodies and handing out AR-15s to criminals and terrorists wihtout so much as a background check._** **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Attorneys General Association?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T529e5654-5837-480b-89fd-6604edde58a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** Thank you so much for protecting our democracy and our bodily autonomy. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: HELP THE DAGA FIGHT CREEPING FASCISM IN STATE COURTS!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T150a8f06-5b3a-44b3-9f53-c6d57327dacb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Our Revolution
subject: Bernie v. Manchin - climate can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Bernie vs. Manchin | Climate Rally w/Jane Fonda + Andy Levin |
Ruth Leads & Elrich Leading in MD! | VT Endorsements - Welch + Balint |
Climate Survey | Squad Arrested for Abortion Rights | M4A Resolutions | &
MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1011&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

Join our LIVE [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]National Organize-to-Win Call with US Rep. Ilhan Omar on
reproductive rights, student debt cancellation, and the future of the
progressive movement — this Monday at 8:30p ET/5:30 PT!

We’ll also hear from NY State Senate candidate Sarah Blas on her race and
Charly Carter of Democracy Initiative on filibuster reform.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5972?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_90DO_20220723_1_1.Ag0NEv&t=1014&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]Become a recurring monthly donor to Our Revolution to maximize our
collective action against far-right authoritarians and mega-corporations.
Now is the time to fight.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1015&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

BERNIE vs MANCHIN

Bernie Sanders [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6147?t=1016&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]called out Joe Manchin by name on live TV for
“sabotaging the Democratic agenda” again this week – killing a package to
address climate, tax the rich, and cut child poverty and drug prices.

Party leaders would be wise to follow Bernie’s lead, stand up to this
literal coal baron, and actually deliver for folks ahead of November —
when fascism will be on the ballot.

We can’t afford the weakness of Democratic leadership, pretending that
Manchin is negotiating in good faith or representing the people of West
Virginia who actually want and need these critical common sense measures.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1017&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]Get active in Our Revolution now to demand action from the party in
power and elect progressives to make Manchin irrelevant!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1018&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1019&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

DEL. SHEILA RUTH LEADS!

Progressive Del. Sheila Ruth is in the lead to be elected to serve her
first full term on the Maryland State Assembly (District 44B)!

Serving on the Environment and Transit Committee, Sheila is working hard
to achieve the positive economic and equity impacts that a well-planned
transportation system would make in the Baltimore region.

Sheila is championing state-based universal healthcare and told us on our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6089?t=1020&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]LIVE Broadcast last week how fossil fuel companies must pay for the
climate crisis — “taxpayers shouldn’t be on the hook for that!”

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1021&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]Sign-up as a sustaining member of Our Revolution to help elect more
candidates like Sheila up and down the ballot!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1022&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

Also in Maryland, ballots are still being counted in a very [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6148?t=1023&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]tight race
between incumbent Montgomery County Executive Marc Elrich, and healthcare
CEO David Blair.

Like Sheila Ruth, Elrich is a long-time progressive champion and Our
Revolution Maryland member.

Since his election in 2018, Marc has worked hard to make strides on key
priorities of housing, environment, public education, healthcare, and
economic justice.

“I like doing the work. The most important thing someone can do with their
lives is to be purposeful and make a difference,” Marc told us on our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6089?t=1024&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]National Organizing Call.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1025&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]SIGN-UP HERE to help Our Revolution get out the vote for other great
progressive candidates ready to partner with our movement for change.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1026&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

In Vermont, Our Revolution joins Bernie in backing Peter Welch in his run
for U.S. Senate!

Peter fought housing discrimination in Chicago, was a public defender in
the Upper Valley and has represented Vermont in Congress since 2007.

In the US House, Peter co-sponsored the Green New Deal and is a leader for
lower drug costs, affordable childcare, rural broadband, and protecting
democracy.

Peter is committed to unions, frontline workers, veterans, reproductive
rights, and rebuilding the middle class.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1027&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

Becca Balint is also endorsed by both Our Revolution and Bernie Sanders,
and she’s running to represent all of Vermont in Congress!

As a parent and public school teacher, Becca won her seat on the State
Senate in 2014. She became the first openly gay Majority Leader and passed
the first gun safety laws in Vermont history.

Becca also delivered the largest investment in affordable housing in a
generation, and passed the strongest reproductive rights in the nation.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1028&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

CLIMATE RALLY w/ JANE FONDA & ANDY LEVIN

We have no time to waste on climate. Our Revolution invites you to rally
with Jane Fonda and US Rep. Andy Levin, one of our best climate champions,
running for re-election in MI-11.

The event kicks off at 4 pm Monday in Royal Oak, MI, and Jane Fonda will
speak alongside OR Michigan leader and DNC Climate Council Michelle
Deatrick and others.

A climate canvass will follow, and Our Revolution volunteers will be on
hand with free T-shirts — let’s knock on every door ahead of Election Day
Aug. 2nd!

While Big Oil and rightwing billionaires fund ads for Andy’s opponent,
we’re reaching voters directly! An original cosponsor of the Green New
Deal, Andy is dedicated to ending the climate crisis through a prosperous
green economy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6137?t=1029&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]RALLY WITH JANE & ANDY!

Last week, Andy was arrested two days in a row: on Tuesday as the only man
from the US House to be detained demonstrating for women’s rights outside
the Supreme Court and on Wednesday with unionizing [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6149?t=1030&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]cafeteria workers
at the US Senate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5529?t=1031&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]Andy is the REAL DEAL. Join our call team to GOTV for Andy! Bernie
sounded the alarm on the far-right money targeting this race and called on
all of us to make sure we re-elect this critical ally in Congress.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1032&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

We’re halfway through the 2022 primaries — and we’re still stacking up
major progressive wins for Congress: Greg Casar (TX-35), Summer Lee
(PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Andrea
Salinas (OR-6), Delia Ramirez (IL-3) and Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), and
others!

As corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms, we’re
growing progressive power at every level of government so eventually,
we’ll outnumber them — and can override their complacency and complicity
in blocking progress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5967?t=1033&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]Become a recurring donor TODAY to help us take down the worst
corporate Dems in these primaries and give voters the most electable AND
progressive candidates in November!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6146?t=1034&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ][IMG]

This 2022 primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made more
than 500,000 phone calls to voters across the country! We’re recruiting as
many folks as possible to hit that one-million mark and beyond!

Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like
Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), Andy Levin (MI-11), David Segal (RI-2),
Melanie D’Arrigo (NY-3), and many others!

Our Revolution is part of a large chorus of progressives and
environmentalists demanding President Biden declare a Climate Emergency
and take executive action.

As we see unprecedented, record heat waves across this country — and the
globe — oil companies, Republican puppets, and corporate Dems are
preventing Congress from saving lives.

We want to hear from you! How many yachts for Joe Manchin are worth the
millions of deaths from impending climate catastrophe? What will future
generations curse us for the most?

On Tuesday, progressive House members were arrested outside of the Supreme
Court protesting for abortion rights.

US Reps. Ilhan Omar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and a total of
17 members were [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6150?t=1040&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]arrested — including Rep. Andy Levin, the only male
House member there in solidarity.

Ilhan also wrote an op-ed in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6151?t=1041&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]The Nation this week, laying out actions
to rein in a rightwing court that has gone rogue, such as term limits for
SCOTUS judges, expanding the court, and ending the filibuster.

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1042&akid=3180%2E5885482%2EGd7jvb ]Our Revolution activists have been in the streets in rapid response
for abortion rights. Join us to demand Democratic leadership bring the
same energy to this fight.

BRING ANTITRUST BILLS TO A VOTE!

Caucus leaders calling on Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer to bring
key antitrust bills for a vote ASAP.

The Verge reports.

The sooner the Senate votes, the better — put it on the floor and dare
suddenly “undecided” Dems like Sen. Jon Ossoff (D-GA) to vote it down.
There are even some Republicans ready to vote yes.

Revolution in getting more than 100 resolutions passed by local
governments in support of Medicare for All.

Our activists have worked to pressure cities and counties across the
country to adopt these resolutions — including the latest one in Denton,
TX! — generating media coverage and a groundswell for M4A.

“Denton’s victory brought the most social media presence so far with
dozens expressing pride that theirs was the first city in Texas to declare
support for Medicare for All,” Public Citizen writes.

Sheila Ruth is in the lead to be elected to serve her first full term on the Maryland State Assembly (District 44B)! We have some good and bad news for keeping Colorado blue:**We just officially launched the first statewide TV ad of the general election. But, the Michael Bennet Ad Fund is running short and we could use a surge of support to keep the ad on the airwaves.** Michael fights hard for Coloradans, and this ad shares his record of standing up for what’s right for our state. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48228068/357426487/1469002558?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220723_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2I3MmExNy1jYTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d73tNidhMao6IT7Jz2bKTqs4KtRRfgk-YCjM_R3qZkw=) Folks like you made launching this ad possible by chipping in what you could to the Michael Bennet Ad Fund, but the Fund is running short and we need to keep this ad on the air. If the Michael Bennet Ad Fund runs short, that means we’ll have to cut back on ads, and put a stop to the future ads that will showcase Michael’s fight for Colorado’s families. He secured funds to repair our bridges and roads which will create good-paying jobs; is working to hold Big Oil accountable for high prices at the pump; and he’s fighting for reproductive freedom. It’s important that voters know Michael’s track record, especially against his far-right opponent, who would be a rubber-stamp for Mitch McConnell (who even called our opponent his “perfect candidate”). Not only has our opponent promised to waste taxpayer dollars on Trump’s medieval border wall and wants to restrict reproductive rights, but he would support Trump if he was the Republican president nominee in 2024 despite his role in the January 6th insurrection. clean_body: Running out of $$$ to keep our ad up. | = We have some good and bad news for keeping Colorado blue:We just officially launched the first statewide TV ad of the general election. But, the Michael Bennet Ad Fund is running short and we could use a surge of support to keep the ad on the airwaves. Michael fights hard for Coloradans, and this ad shares his record of standing up for what’s right for our state. = Folks like you made launching this ad possible by chipping in what you could to the Michael Bennet Ad Fund, but the Fund is running short and we need to keep this ad on the air. If the Michael Bennet Ad Fund runs short, that means we’ll have to cut back on ads, and put a stop to the future ads that will showcase Michael’s fight for Colorado’s families. He secured funds to repair our bridges and roads which will create good-paying jobs; is working to hold Big Oil accountable for high prices at the pump; and he’s fighting for reproductive freedom. It’s important that voters know Michael’s track record, especially against his far-right opponent, who would be a rubber-stamp for Mitch McConnell (who even called our opponent his “perfect candidate”). Not only has our opponent promised to waste taxpayer dollars on Trump’s medieval border wall and wants to restrict reproductive rights, but he would support Trump if he was the Republican president nominee in 2024 despite his role in the January 6th insurrection. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Donations to emails like this one power the television, radio, and online ads that will mobilize voters across Colorado. = — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Team Seth
subject: 13 years since the minimum wage was increased
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Tomorrow marks 13 years since the federal minimum wage last increased, to just $7.25 an hour. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed, and too many families are struggling to keep up.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48228086/357427076/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjI1MjY2Ny1jYTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqrjyPC0OEpZse892y4Sgg_ylGv7JY4nY6Kk9BxdgiE=&emci=44061079-d609-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=d6252667-ca0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Tomorrow marks 13 years since the federal minimum wage last increased, to just $7.25 an hour. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed, and too many families are struggling to keep up.

This year in Rhode Island, our minimum wage was increased to $12.25. This is a step in the right direction, but we can't stop there. We must ensure families in Rhode Island and across the country earn wages that allow them to keep up with rising costs.

It's time Congress take action to raise the federal minimum wage. Seth supports raising the minimum wage and will work to pass legislation to ensure workers in every state are paid a living wage. Meanwhile, his Republican opponent, Allan Fung, has consistently opposed raising the minimum wage for Rhode Islanders.

Peter – no one who works 40 hours a week should struggle to put food on the table. Families can't afford to wait any longer for a minimum wage increase.

**[Do you agree it's time to raise the federal minimum wage? Take our one-question poll now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48228087/357427077/1464378872?ms=em22_220723_minwag_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220723_minwag_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220723_minwag_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220723_minwag_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=g1aM2QaeJheazVIaW5tmX07peK%2BooCxEgNKKHVevbN28J69ezTxv%2Btmc001uyr2WCMrIuU8JS7h3DlEy3l5V2W93XWQsBO3imI0P9FVOWbapOxWkvPVL4da4irdTczcyMrj4i5ajT4SAXDBPvuMAbZKJebR0HKEnmDRVsqr3tIk%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjI1MjY2Ny1jYTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqrjyPC0OEpZse892y4Sgg_ylGv7JY4nY6Kk9BxdgiE=&emci=44061079-d609-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=d6252667-ca0a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)**

Thanks,

Team Seth

Seth Magaziner is a father, husband, and proud Democrat. He’s running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Seth will protect Social Security and Medicare and work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate with drug companies. He will defend a woman’s right to choose, stand up to the gun lobby to pass common sense gun safety measures, and make Rhode Island a leader in the clean energy economy - creating good jobs while combating the climate crisis. Seth is running for Congress in the competitive open Second District. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue?

clean_body: Tomorrow marks 13 years since the federal minimum wage last increased, to just $7.25 an hour. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed, and too many families are struggling to keep up. Peter, Tomorrow marks 13 years since the federal minimum wage last increased, to just $7.25 an hour. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed, and too many families are struggling to keep up. This year in Rhode Island, our minimum wage was increased to $12.25. This is a step in the right direction, but we can't stop there. We must ensure families in Rhode Island and across the country earn wages that allow them to keep up with rising costs. It's time Congress take action to raise the federal minimum wage. Seth supports raising the minimum wage and will work to pass legislation to ensure workers in every state are paid a living wage. Meanwhile, his Republican opponent, Allan Fung, has consistently opposed raising the minimum wage for Rhode Islanders. Peter – no one who works 40 hours a week should struggle to put food on the table. Families can't afford to wait any longer for a minimum wage increase. | Thanks, Team Seth Seth Magaziner is a father, husband, and proud Democrat. He’s running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Seth will protect Social Security and Medicare and work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate with drug companies. He will defend a woman’s right to choose, stand up to the gun lobby to pass common sense gun safety measures, and make Rhode Island a leader in the clean energy economy - creating good jobs while combating the climate crisis. Seth is running for Congress in the competitive open Second District. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue? = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States
