Friend,

I don’t know about you, but I’m sick of failed career politicians like Biden, Pelosi, and my opponent, Bill Foster, who’ve been in office for decades.

_All they have done is make America poorer and less safe_.

**It’s time for fresh faces — new ideas. **

I’m Catalina Lauf, and I’m running for Congress in the 11th District of Illinois.

_**[](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9da720a04e34a239f7334a41925b079&_e=WORYwqOirbgBZwn1p_MdTxa7D4ghRNsBTKyMwJnjNkFEzVcLwFXib8qo5UqjidQiZCayTkZSCtiuwmKlFMwBc1Dxm4_p1ewvSEZ5M6C7bdxm2wm7FVz7MP4sZJzxFnJIMUHlrk8rffTsHXkKyZKqZime9kltQClWfQkY1Q2YkhHfhFO78Opu_6NfqwtfDElJeqMP9vC7_rce0h8hdQmrJ0dGVzT55CCk1EnaPvbU46MpjzQDftMt1O1U1cD6jjZi5ngLvrddwKn1iuvC2iwA6lN5iXBGSNIRmU5tZ5a2JIIxEQVyRHSCQQtcswyhmbLpiIt7NEweCloh0ulGjQ0uwg%3D%3D)**_
Because of our campaign’s grassroots support, I won the primary election! But now, the real work begins.

Getting an early start is critical to our success. I’ve set a goal to raise $30,000 before the end of July to jumpstart our campaign into action!

[_**This election will determine whether Republicans can take back Congress or not.**__**Can you help conservatives WIN in 2022?**__**Click here to rush your support today >>>**_](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9da720a04e34a239f7334a41925b079&_e=WORYwqOirbgBZwn1p_MdTxa7D4ghRNsBTKyMwJnjNkFEzVcLwFXib8qo5UqjidQiZCayTkZSCtiuwmKlFMwBc1Dxm4_p1ewvSEZ5M6C7bdxm2wm7FVz7MP4sZJzxFnJIISkIjXooTtp27m0XYlo3-ecXO-aRwVgCUQUxLTu4jmY-sZvrJI4msU7Qsqx_rf54Dct5ColvLl3Un2iUH2CjABA84s_Ci__J3K7FmmEH2JZss-4VotgR7BdrAYgj1phJFnirpoZF23Sw05S4eHAEldRzb8Q0AIDAkw8h2WhtMKImcea4zhbRFhtcq5rvXXaDsvKy83qQ5I9fX9-pTZSsCQ%3D%3D)

The election will be here sooner than you think, and there’s a lot at stake.

_In just two years of the radical Left controlling Congress_ , they have caused out-of-control inflation, a gas crisis, supply-chain issues, and the death of small businesses.

They have allowed illegal immigrants to flood our borders, Big tech to censor conservative voices, and radical Leftist teachers to indoctrinate our children.

It’s going to take a new generation of strong, conservative American leadership will save this country from the radical left.

_Unlike my opponent, I don’t rely on the DC money machine, woke corporations, or corrupt special interests to fund my campaign. _

**I’m counting on outsiders - everyday Americans - to help me turn this country around.**

[_**Will you join the fight? Please click here to donate $10, $25, or even $100 and take back America from the radical Left >>>**_](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9da720a04e34a239f7334a41925b079&_e=WORYwqOirbgBZwn1p_MdTxa7D4ghRNsBTKyMwJnjNkFEzVcLwFXib8qo5UqjidQiZCayTkZSCtiuwmKlFMwBc1Dxm4_p1ewvSEZ5M6C7bdxm2wm7FVz7MP4sZJzxFnJIvG92_CKDBp73i6wqUHJNTMrlfqBTuP7DtWp-rTxNJNDn_huuEk7Ooye3XuLm03WzWflpG0nGACVX0-NvWlBoOsnzh1rLm6vIoU1VdZVtx9vaDWCzNOFVzGWLGXVFer9mG_nMSRIvkMxXDyJGG1bNgAKQPBavoKytMTi017mGWpnjhEg08nyf3ZaoBFxttHi8RaXojxahOqO4TYGIblYMxw%3D%3D)

Failed Bill Foster is nothing more than Nancy Pelosi’s puppet. He won’t lift a finger unless she tells him to. Do you want a weak Democrat in Congress who always votes in favor of the Biden/Pelosi agenda?

The patriots of this country have him figured out and aren’t going to settle for it any longer.

**It’s time for a new generation of Republicans to take back Congress.**

Can I count on your support? This is a key district that we can flip from blue to red.

_**With your support and action, we’re at the cusp of victory. I am continually humbled and overwhelmed by the support I have received. I can tell that all our efforts weren’t in vain this month.**_

Our campaign is making up ground to End the Quarter strong because of your commitment to ensuring that this campaign has the fuel it needs to carry on towards the general election.

**Thank you for everything.**
We’ve seen a surge in support over the past 24 hours, and we’re so close to making this the best End-of-Quarter deadline EVER.

This is why I hate to ask you for your support, but if you’re able and willing, could you please rush a donation below so our campaign has the resources to make up the last $2,500 needed to meet our June projections?

clean_body: READ | Folks, With your support and action, we’re at the cusp of victory. I am continually humbled and overwhelmed by the support I have received. I can tell that all our efforts weren’t in vain this month. Our campaign is making up ground to End the Quarter strong because of your commitment to ensuring that this campaign has the fuel it needs to carry on towards the general election. Thank you for everything. We’ve seen a surge in support over the past 24 hours, and we’re so close to making this the best End-of-Quarter deadline EVER. This is why I hate to ask you for your support, but if you’re able and willing, could you please rush a donation below so our campaign has the resources to make up the last $2,500 needed to meet our June projections? I’M HUMBLY ASKING FOR YOUR HELP. | I am so grateful for each and every one of you. Thank you in advance for your support. God Bless, John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Live Democratic Poll
subject: what grade would you give the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
We've launched a live approval poll, but your response is still missing.
| | |

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: BERNIE ENDORSED: Cori, Jamaal and Rashida
body:
This is the momentum we needed heading into three big primaries.
#
Peter,
**Bernie Sanders just endorsed Justice Democrats** AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Pramila Jayapal, and Ilhan Omar for re-election this year. That’s along with an earlier endorsement of another JD, Rashida Tlaib.
Here’s why this is so important: Cori, Jamaal, and Rashida face tough primaries against corporate Democrats in the next few weeks. If we don’t provide enough support to our progressive JD champions in Congress, we could lose the power we’ve been building to enact real, meaningful change.
**Bernie’s in, are you?** [Peter, please split a donation today between Cori, Rashida, and Jamaal to fuel their primary campaigns. They’re relying on your grassroots support to defeat the corporate Democrats in their races.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112303?refcode=em20220723-24411&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=24411%2E1203867%2El7KZmQ)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112303?refcode=em20220723-24411&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=24411%2E1203867%2El7KZmQ)**
When Bernie endorsed yesterday, he said that our candidates, “are working every day to build a nation that works for all of us.” And that’s at the core of why Cori, Rashida, and Jamaal need your support — Justice Democrats don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money. JDs legislate for the people, not corporations. When we’re up against massive corporate spending, we need the help of our small-dollar donors.
Justice Democrats was started by a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers and super volunteers. A group of us got together and thought: what if we could take all the lessons we learned from Bernie 2016 and run to replace all the members of Congress who were standing in the way of real change?
**By helping to elect Cori, Jamaal, Rashida, AOC, and others, we are pushing forward a progressive vision for America and shaking up the political status quo.**
We need to make sure we continue on in our mission, re-elect the Squad, and grow our JD bloc in Congress. So, we need to help Cori, Jamaal, and Rashida win their upcoming competitive primaries.
[Chip in $3 right now to Cori, Rashida, and Jamaal to ensure we re-elect the Squad. The Democratic establishment and its corporate donors will not defeat us.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112303?refcode=em20220723-24411&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=24411%2E1203867%2El7KZmQ)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/112303?refcode=em20220723-24411&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=24411%2E1203867%2El7KZmQ)**
Thank you for supporting our candidates, Peter.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=24411%2E1203867%2El7KZmQ) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=24411%2E1203867%2El7KZmQ) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220723-24411-footer&t=25&refcode2=24411_1203867_l7KZmQ&akid=24411%2E1203867%2El7KZmQ)**

clean_body: This is the momentum we needed heading into three big primaries. Peter, Bernie Sanders just endorsed Justice Democrats AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Pramila Jayapal, and Ilhan Omar for re-election this year. That’s along with an earlier endorsement of another JD, Rashida Tlaib. Here’s why this is so important: Cori, Jamaal, and Rashida face tough primaries against corporate Democrats in the next few weeks. If we don’t provide enough support to our progressive JD champions in Congress, we could lose the power we’ve been building to enact real, meaningful change. Bernie’s in, are you? When Bernie endorsed yesterday, he said that our candidates, “are working every day to build a nation that works for all of us.” And that’s at the core of why Cori, Rashida, and Jamaal need your support — Justice Democrats don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money. JDs legislate for the people, not corporations. When we’re up against massive corporate spending, we need the help of our small-dollar donors. Justice Democrats was started by a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers and super volunteers. A group of us got together and thought: what if we could take all the lessons we learned from Bernie 2016 and run to replace all the members of Congress who were standing in the way of real change? By helping to elect Cori, Jamaal, Rashida, AOC, and others, we are pushing forward a progressive vision for America and shaking up the political status quo. We need to make sure we continue on in our mission, re-elect the Squad, and grow our JD bloc in Congress. So, we need to help Cori, Jamaal, and Rashida win their upcoming competitive primaries. Thank you for supporting our candidates, Peter. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 96% of Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
This week, the U.S. House passed a bill codifying the right to contraception in America. I was proud to vote in favor of ensuring people can access contraception, as an extreme right-wing Supreme Court rolls back our rights and protections.
195 Republicans voted against protecting the right to contraception. That’s 96% of the House GOP caucus. It is very clear that the right-wing on the Court, in the House, and the Senate want to go beyond overturning _Roe_. We must keep fighting back by organizing, legislating in Congress, and ensuring Democrats hold our majorities in Congress.
[**Can you chip in $3, $20.22, or anything at all to support my advocacy for reproductive rights AND our work to hold the Democratic majority? If we’re going to protect our most basic rights and our democracy, we must defeat the GOP.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14582?refcode=em20220723-1452&t=1&akid=1452%2E420207%2EHYikZr)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14582?refcode=em20220723-1452&t=20&akid=1452%2E420207%2EHYikZr)**
Being able to easily access contraception is fundamental to our health and well-being. It is one of the most essential tools of reproductive freedom.
That’s why it’s outrageous that the GOP opposes access to contraception. It’s outrageous that the Supreme Court would hint at a willingness to overturn precedent protecting the right to contraception.
We know the GOP will continue its attempts to destroy our democracy, our reproductive rights, our environment, our gun safety laws, and our social safety net. It’s why we must redouble our advocacy, our organizing, and our electoral work.
[**Peter, can you make a donation to support my advocacy, organizing, and re-election campaign? My own must-win primary is in just 10 days and our work won’t stop to protect the Democratic majority in November.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14582?refcode=em20220723-1452&t=21&akid=1452%2E420207%2EHYikZr)
Thank you for fighting for a better future.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220723-1452-footer&t=22&refcode2=1452_420207_HYikZr&akid=1452%2E420207%2EHYikZr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Kierra Newton
subject: the results are in!

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wyfgHOAnxHt7Tpy8sX6h3y-rmw3t67mBixx4yD8l48o=/KjKtyrOZQEmi5Qoj8ggKO_W53fe0A6-nX8Quu0xet5w=?refcode=E17138-20220721-FundraisingUpdate-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hey Peter, We just got a hold of our opponent Tom Patti's fundraising report, and wow - the results speak for themselves. Our grassroots team is clobbering him with $5 or $10 donations. _We are proud to fuel this campaign with over 15,000 individual donations so far! name: Team Brown
subject: Michelle Obama: “everything our democracy is facing”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Our right to vote is being undermined, and Michelle Obama needs you to do something about it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48228751/357430008/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220723MichelleObama_Turnout_TB_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjMzNzliMC1kMDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71xehi5roeXTyPeGkcfZycwazP_i8EDEnA9XVA_Zc68=) We’re downright inspired by Michelle Obama, Peter.

Since leaving the White House, Michelle hasn’t stopped fighting for our country. Instead, she’s made it her mission to expand voting rights for EVERY American. She’s touring the country to explain why your voice is so vital in these midterm elections.

Her work couldn’t come at a more critical time, Peter. The GOP is working at every turn to stifle our progress and break our Democratic majority. **That’s why Michelle is urging every voter to get involved:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48228752/357430009/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_220723MichelleObama_Turnout_TB_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjMzNzliMC1kMDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71xehi5roeXTyPeGkcfZycwazP_i8EDEnA9XVA_Zc68=) Shontel and her Democratic colleagues in the House have made groundbreaking progress toward expanding our right to vote, passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the Freedom to Vote Act, but at every step of the way the GOP has blocked our progress in the Senate.

We can’t afford to let Republicans across the country enact their anti-voting agenda. **It’s up to us to answer the call to fight back.**

This won’t be easy, Peter. With every barrier Republicans have put in place to suppress our voice, it’s going to take a lot of resources to reach out to voters across Ohio and give them the tools they need to vote in this upcoming election. That’s where your support comes in.

[**_Will you join our movement right now to save our voting rights? Your $5 donation will fund critical voter outreach programs in OH-11 and across the entire state. clean_body: Our right to vote is being undermined, and Michelle Obama needs you to do something about it. = We’re downright inspired by Michelle Obama, Peter. Since leaving the White House, Michelle hasn’t stopped fighting for our country. Instead, she’s made it her mission to expand voting rights for EVERY American. She’s touring the country to explain why your voice is so vital in these midterm elections. Her work couldn’t come at a more critical time, Peter. The GOP is working at every turn to stifle our progress and break our Democratic majority. That’s why Michelle is urging every voter to get involved: = Shontel and her Democratic colleagues in the House have made groundbreaking progress toward expanding our right to vote, passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the Freedom to Vote Act, but at every step of the way the GOP has blocked our progress in the Senate. We can’t afford to let Republicans across the country enact their anti-voting agenda. It’s up to us to answer the call to fight back. This won’t be easy, Peter. You see, George’s parents left Guatemala and came to America to grow a family and build a better life. George has never lost sight of this - that is why I am proud to endorse his race for Congress. | George’s American Dream is to leave this country a better place for the next generation, which starts with electing men and women to Congress who will spark change and shake up the status quo. clean_body: “Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment.” | Fellow American, A new article from Axios , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation: | "Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment." You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins. The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say: "Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side." While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧 If YOU want to personally stop Democrats from keeping control of the Senate and causing our economy further turmoil, then I need you to step up and help us close the fundraising gap. Fellow American, our opponent breaks a new fundraising record every single quarter. From April to June, he raised more than $17,000,000, which is 300% more than what we were able to raise. All of those millions are funding non-stop attack ads against me. We're now slightly down in the polls (within the margin of error), but we need your help to fight back on the airwaves. 'Losing' is not in my vocabulary, so I'm ready to work hard to win this critical race. If you are committed to building the "Red Wave" and stopping a potential Senate debacle, Thanks for your support, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9412%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=WK1UvqJry3y4nBe5W7Mgeg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2b6LwPFALm%2b8d1gsmUa0pg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V0nspyEOfbk2NbmyhCUiCg&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c38498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V0nspyEOfbk2NbmyhCUiCg&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9412%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=WK1UvqJry3y4nBe5W7Mgeg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9412%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=WK1UvqJry3y4nBe5W7Mgeg&sysid=1)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
No government body and no politician should have control over who we love or how we control our reproductive futures.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226017/357413663/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzk5Zjg1OS1iMzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYCvPJpD6ywAL0UcJRybYAAp-0laZFsOlgX9cBXbohY=) This week, the House of Representatives voted to codify the rights to same-sex marriage, interracial marriage, and contraception access. Republicans went on the record with where they stand.

Only ONE Republican legislator from Wisconsin voted for marriage equality. NONE voted to secure contraception access.

_No government body and no politician should have control over who we love or how we control our reproductive futures._

**In Congress, I’ll stand up for the fundamental rights of women, LGBTQ+ Americans, and all those who face attack at the hands of the far right.[Can you help me get to Washington by donating right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226019/357413665/-174114498?amount=5&refcode=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzk5Zjg1OS1iMzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYCvPJpD6ywAL0UcJRybYAAp-0laZFsOlgX9cBXbohY=)**

Peter, one of my sons, Kevin, is gay. I am furious that Republicans and right-wing judges would deny his right to marry whoever he loves.

I also have an adult daughter and a young granddaughter. They deserve the ability to plan if and when they want to have children - but if Republican legislators start banning contraception, that part of their future could be out of their hands. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226021/357413667/-174114498?amount=5&refcode=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzk5Zjg1OS1iMzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYCvPJpD6ywAL0UcJRybYAAp-0laZFsOlgX9cBXbohY=) _My son KP (Kevin) and my daughter Jackie_ **So much is on the line in our midterm elections, and Wisconsinites deserve a representative they can count on to vote to DEFEND our rights.** My insurrectionist GOP opponent, Derrick Van Orden, is anti-woman, anti-LGBTQ+, and wrong for our state. He would support Republicans’ most radical policies - including attacking marriage equality and contraception access.

[Please, make your first contribution today to help me defeat him and stand up for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226023/357413669/-174114498?amount=5&refcode=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.fc99f859-b30a-ed11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzk5Zjg1OS1iMzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYCvPJpD6ywAL0UcJRybYAAp-0laZFsOlgX9cBXbohY=) clean_body: No government body and no politician should have control over who we love or how we control our reproductive futures. | = This week, the House of Representatives voted to codify the rights to same-sex marriage, interracial marriage, and contraception access. Republicans went on the record with where they stand. Only ONE Republican legislator from Wisconsin voted for marriage equality. NONE voted to secure contraception access. No government body and no politician should have control over who we love or how we control our reproductive futures. In Congress, I’ll stand up for the fundamental rights of women, LGBTQ+ Americans, and all those who face attack at the hands of the far right.= Peter, one of my sons, Kevin, is gay. I am furious that Republicans and right-wing judges would deny his right to marry whoever he loves. I also have an adult daughter and a young granddaughter. They deserve the ability to plan if and when they want to have children - but if Republican legislators start banning contraception, that part of their future could be out of their hands. = My son KP (Kevin) and my daughter Jackie So much is on the line in our midterm elections, and Wisconsinites deserve a representative they can count on to vote to DEFEND our rights. My insurrectionist GOP opponent, Derrick Van Orden, is anti-woman, anti-LGBTQ+, and wrong for our state. He would support Republicans’ most radical policies - including attacking marriage equality and contraception access. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Onward! Deb McGrath | Deb Baldus McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. body:
The ink had barely dried on the Supreme Court’s decision overturning Roe v. Wade when Republicans went into overdrive to ban abortion care in Ohio.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226039/357413687/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk5Zjg1OS1iMzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q0BUua-Zf8jPdGjRVlgY7qyTtoqG1AWHsZt1AIbpf30=)

Team,
The ink had barely dried on the Supreme Court’s decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ when Republicans went into overdrive to ban abortion care in Ohio.
**Ohio is a pro-choice state. That’s why Nan is running to defeat anti-choice Mike DeWine and be the voice Ohioans need to protect reproductive rights at the state level. But to fight back against right-wing spending, she needs a surge of grassroots support to stay on track to win.**
[**This is urgent: Will you pitch in to our fight to defeat Mike DeWine?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226040/357413688/1508168901?refcode=nw_em_220723_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk5Zjg1OS1iMzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q0BUua-Zf8jPdGjRVlgY7qyTtoqG1AWHsZt1AIbpf30=)
The right to access legal abortion care isn’t the only thing on the ballot this year. Ending the corruption in Columbus, investing in clean energy, strengthening our schools – all of it is at stake in this election.
This will not be an easy fight. Mike DeWine has millions of his own dollars to pour into this race in addition to the backing of wealthy friends who would love to keep their hand-picked candidate in office. We have to be ready for the attacks that are coming.
[**To make sure we’re staying on track to fight back against Mike DeWine, we need grassroots supporters to step up right now – and we’re in danger of falling short. Please, pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226041/357413689/1508168901?refcode=nw_em_220723_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk5Zjg1OS1iMzBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q0BUua-Zf8jPdGjRVlgY7qyTtoqG1AWHsZt1AIbpf30=)
Thank you,
Team Nan

subject: We need to fight for the Texas public school system. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: paid for by The Real Texas PAC
body:
please weigh in now | | |
---
Our public schools are in trouble. See below, and please share your thoughts.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/48229356/357433021/-1240381122?refcode=051622&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4OTE5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMzU2YjEyLWQ5MGEtZWQxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oAoAtUnZFYWWayUlm6NsUYM6biJ889ibXkVdldFhKWM=)

Texas Republicans are hellbent on destroying public education as we know it. They're against funding our schools. Against raising the pay rate of our hard-working teachers. Against doing away with the standardized testing that harms our students. And now, _they're even politicizing our schools,_ aiming to teach children that life begins at conception and that abortion is evil. Enough is enough. **Do you believe we should protect, rather than destroy, our public school system?**
---

body:
Stay up to date with Team LaTurner! 🇺🇸 | | | |
---
| | | Hi Friend,

It's Jake here. It has been a busy week in DC fighting back against Nancy Pelosi and her radical policy agenda. Here are some updates from our campaign and a few stories I thought you'd be interested in.

Thank you so much for your support.
---
|
---
| This week I had the opportunity to join KVOE Newswatch Radio to talk about the historic inflation impacting Kansans across our state and the importance of folks getting out to support the Value Them Both Amendment on August 2nd.
---
|
---
| [LISTEN TO THE INTERVIEW HERE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=37492a2b7d&e=1050d051da "LISTEN TO THE INTERVIEW HERE")
---
|
---
| Democrats continue to push their extreme pro-abortion agenda in Congress. Nancy Pelosi and the far-left liberals in the Democrat party will not stop until they have taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up until birth.

Pro-life Kansans have the chance to make their voices heard at the ballot box on August 2nd. It's vital that we pass Value Them Both and protect the most vulnerable among us—the unborn.

I recently took on my Democrat colleagues in the Oversight Committee and stood up for the millions of pro-life Americans across our country.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=5f52030c02&e=1050d051da)
---
| [CLICK TO WATCH](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=12eb122017&e=1050d051da "CLICK TO WATCH")
---
|
---
| This week, I received the 2021 Club for Growth Defender of Economic Freedom Award for my voting record in Congress.

I will always fight for a pro-growth agenda that lowers taxes, gets rid of burdensome government regulations, and puts Kansas families & businesses first.
---
|
---
| [READ MORE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6523cb6356&e=1050d051da "READ MORE")
---
|
---
| The invasion at our southern border continues. Another 200,000+ illegal immigrants were caught trying to cross into America last month. Joe Biden has completely failed in his duty to secure our nation's borders.

Democrats have ignored this humanitarian and national security crisis for far too long. When Republicans take back the House in November, we WILL secure the border.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=de91447e46&e=1050d051da)
---
| [READ MORE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f7ecda3e6a&e=1050d051da "READ MORE")
---
|
---
| For months, Kansans faced the highest gas prices in American history, and Joe Biden refused to take action. Now, Joe is bragging about gas being $4.45 per gallon.

Gas prices are high because Democrats made it harder to produce oil here at home. On Joe Biden's first day in office, he canceled the Keystone XL Pipeline and suspended all oil and gas leasing on federal lands.

Kansans are still struggling to fill up their tanks. It's time to unleash American energy.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=292d5d3e3d&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| [READ MORE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9a6c7c4a73&e=1050d051da "READ MORE")
---
|
---
| _Want to FIRE Pelosi? Text WIN to ‪(785) 289-8749‬ to Take Back the House!_
Faith in God, the importance of family, and love of country are what guide Jake LaTurner's work in Congress. He has been fighting tirelessly to put America First and save our nation from far-left liberals.

Jake is counting on grassroots conservatives across Kansas to **WIN** in November. Will you endorse Jake right now?
---
| [ENDORSE JAKE LATURNER NOW >>](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4afe6f89d6&e=1050d051da "ENDORSE JAKE LATURNER NOW >>")

— Begin Forwarded Message — Peter, Last week, we launched **our brand-new GOTV Fund** , the best way to support our on-the-ground organizing efforts in the final days of the primary. Ensuring we have the resources to re-elect Andy to Congress is a full-time operation. Here are just some of the ways your contributions make a difference for our field program:
* $5 will fund an organizer's entire shift — from the clipboard to the literature, to the snacks and water, they need to knock dozens of doors.
* A $10 contribution can help us print 100 more campaign literature packets, giving voters the information they need to make an informed decision (and hear about Andy’s accomplishments!) upon Primary Day.
* A $50 contribution funds an entire canvass for a field organizer and their volunteers — from securing a staging location to training (and feeding!) volunteers, our grind doesn’t stop!

_**[Peter, it’s crunch time on Team Levin, and we need all hands on deck in the final 12 days of this primary — if it works for you right now, can you make a $5 donation to our GOTV Fund and fuel the campaign’s organizing efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226376/357416041/311786575?refcode=em_20220723_e_p_fund2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGE2ZTVhNC1iOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMj_M09eOZO_gWXXGVR37RC2BPDrrRUqfGA22l3TPOQ=)**_ | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: We’re knocking every door we can in MI-11 in the last 11 days of this primary. | | | | | Peter, It’s Paul, Andy Levin’s Field Director on the campaign. I wanted to follow up from our note yesterday and ask you to = I cannot overstate just how important field organizing is in a campaign like this. This primary is going to come down to the wire. After running Bernie Sanders’ field program here in Michigan in 2016, I know that interactions with voters in these final days can make all the difference. That’s why we’re knocking every door we can in MI-11 in the last 11 days of this primary. = Thanks, and as Andy likes to say, let’s go! Paul Fellows Field Director, Andy Levin for Congress — Begin Forwarded Message — Peter, Last week, we launched our brand-new GOTV Fund , the best way to support our on-the-ground organizing efforts in the final days of the primary. Ensuring we have the resources to re-elect Andy to Congress is a full-time operation. Here are just some of the ways your contributions make a difference for our field program: $5 will fund an organizer's entire shift — from the clipboard to the literature, to the snacks and water, they need to knock dozens of doors. A $10 contribution can help us print 100 more campaign literature packets, giving voters the information they need to make an informed decision (and hear about Andy’s accomplishments!) upon Primary Day. A $50 contribution funds an entire canvass for a field organizer and their volunteers — from securing a staging location to training (and feeding!) volunteers, our grind doesn’t stop! =** | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = = = = = = Peter, our primary win will be close — and the other side has corporate special-interest cash propping it up. That means we have to leave our hearts out on the field and reach every single potential voter in MI-11. As the union organizer-in-chief of Congress, Andy lives and breathes field work. Let’s do all we can to make him proud of our operation and finish this race strong. Let’s go win this thing! Team Levin = | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Box 1050 Birmingham, MI 48012 United States | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, .

Chuck Edwards doesn’t represent Western North Carolina values. He refuses to condemn the insurrection on January 6th, he voted to pass North Carolina’s "Don’t Say Gay" bill, and he won’t codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law.
After the recent slate of extreme, right-wing Supreme Court decisions, Edwards didn’t look to build bridges, or stand up for the rights of so many Americans that have been taken away, or are under threat. Instead, he hailed that “Christian Conservatives are on the verge of taking our country back.”
**To be perfectly clear:** Edwards is a right-wing politician who listens to the special interests funding his campaign more than NC-11’s constituents. I don’t accept a dime from corporate PACs because I’m funding this campaign the right way – from grassroots supporters like you.
It’s time to elect someone who actually cares about our families and our future. Our campaign is the best opportunity we have at implementing real change and protecting our rights across the district.
I know there’s a path forward for all of us together, but I need your help. We need to reach our end-of-month goal so we can bring our vision of love, hope, and empathy to every corner of the district.
**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 or more today to help us close the gap before our fast approaching end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48226530/357416371/-1606295236?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220723_FR_HearFromMe_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmE2ZTVhNC1iOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nx8fl2eZQXIKuYXLmcTXMYlAkFG0ik95d5OtI682mxs=)**

clean_body: | | = Peter, You’ve heard from my team about how important it is that we reach our monthly fundraising goal, and how we are building the infrastructure and momentum on the ground that we need to win, but now I want you to hear directly from me. Right now is our chance to show Chuck Edwards and the dark money funding his campaign that our grassroots team is not to be underestimated. = | | | = Chuck Edwards doesn’t represent Western North Carolina values. He refuses to condemn the insurrection on January 6th, he voted to pass North Carolina’s "Don’t Say Gay" bill, and he won’t codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. After the recent slate of extreme, right-wing Supreme Court decisions, Edwards didn’t look to build bridges, or stand up for the rights of so many Americans that have been taken away, or are under threat. Instead, he hailed that “Christian Conservatives are on the verge of taking our country back.” To be perfectly clear: Edwards is a right-wing politician who listens to the special interests funding his campaign more than NC-11’s constituents. I don’t accept a dime from corporate PACs because I’m funding this campaign the right way – from grassroots supporters like you. It’s time to elect someone who actually cares about our families and our future. Our campaign is the best opportunity we have at implementing real change and protecting our rights across the district. I know there’s a path forward for all of us together, but I need your help. We need to reach our end-of-month goal so we can bring our vision of love, hope, and empathy to every corner of the district. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = In this together, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

clean_body: 4 times $$$ | Wait for it....... | We are only 4 months away from the November elections... That’s only a quarter of a year; 17 weeks; 121 days; 2920 hours; a little over 10 million seconds... 🤯 Remember when we were back in March this year? Does it seem like it was yesterday? Well, that’s the same amount of time that we have before the November elections! So, in a way... the elections are tomorrow?! Although that may not be true, it sure feels like they’re creeping up on us. So, to stay ahead and celebrate the 4 months leading up to the elections, You’re a Team Budd WINNER. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to donate and become a celebrity in our ranks. 🙌🏻 Team Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. body:
The Democrat mega-donors and super PACs are teaming up with the media to hurt myreelection chances so I need your support more than ever RIGHT NOW. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/the-real-truth-about-jan-6?e=645b3b1338)

| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=386dfd592d&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Unsurprisingly, the TV ratings for the January 6th Committee hearings have been incredibly low.

**This is because __Americans are fed up__ with the fake news media _CONSTANTLY_ shoving Leftist talking points down our throats.**

They will never stop talking about Donald Trump or Republican patriots like myself, Lauren Boebert, Matt Gaetz, and Marjorie Taylor Greene because they are **_SCARED_** of us.

**The media is dramatizing January 6th to hurt Republicans in the midterms.**

Let’s not forget - this is the **_SAME_** mainstream media that talked for years about the _Trump Russiagate hoax_. **They will never stop making things up to hurt Conservatives nationwide.**

Help me get re-elected so I can continue to push **TRUTH** and **CONSERVATIVE** values in Washington, despite all the FAKE NEWS media attacks.

[**Stand with me and all other America-First patriots by donating to help me fight AGAINST the Left’s fake witch hunts. >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f24077e07f&e=645b3b1338)
[**_< < CONTRIBUTE $250 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=a7473ce7ed&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < CONTRIBUTE $100 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=04f6dad589&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < CONTRIBUTE $50 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b4adb393c2&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < CONTRIBUTE $25 >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=29762ca712&e=645b3b1338)

[**_< < CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5e97823115&e=645b3b1338)
The Democrat mega-donors and super PACs are teaming up with the media to hurt my reelection chances so **_I need your support more than ever RIGHT NOW_**.

I will always keep fighting for you and your family in Washington, but I need your grassroots support to ensure I can fend off the Left’s misinformation and propaganda.

[**Can I rely on you? >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=28d539406e&e=645b3b1338)

Thank you in advance for your generosity.

Respectfully,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c7cb01b852&e=645b3b1338) Paul Gosar, D.D.S. Currently Serving Arizona’s 4th CD
Candidate for Arizona’s 9th CD

P.S.: The Jan. 6th committee witch hunt has had absolutely terrible ratings because Americans are TIRED of the fake news attacks. subject: We’re faltering nationally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
“Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment.” |
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5e35e7f170b34ef890dba9038089ee76&_e=p_7jEPLCMGFNaiVvPp8al5zbPj-G95Y0Z_qncsd25xR_vFjjISjhBU86OOF0nEwe-GPctmJpgrRoHvf-FxzcW5u3-PIoHvL7GUB4HDLLTxdVw9wFf8deIgDjI-wsC1P0CjGiImyoEilnzxzOLH6ucnlRNSMSp4JjZs68PSYobDw81EMA3Ye4GWvQDxxPdRmmRUdxP-n6VMDcVkC8uYd5r4QUTgt0bYC36lkl2tuziVwMuqlM4ABL_O--Jr7zZY-kKfv19MXjB5Dkm2FZu3-UAvQJz3MbmyS3UAeLz0ozYsTV6iHQJWqpZ-g8eayG1unvSO9vO5G83Oyq8AQ8TpKu-Nswg1dKahocJSxRNN9mpbjA5Gm9Kp_KklFy5IhM9Q77WzCv54u_kbfEL8Hj_hydybyE65-h7yrI8L17rb5L9FxPpCDjz6sW1BqWjBltGb-LFdAoHqP66PUdqQ-OKT49ol1TAmNjoqc-NsRu4fiYhP4%3D)

---
Peter,

A new article from _Axios_ , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation:

| _**"Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment."**_
---

You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins.

The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say:

_**"Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side."**_
---

While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧

[** Help Close the Fundraising Gap
Chip in $4 -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5e35e7f170b34ef890dba9038089ee76&_e=p_7jEPLCMGFNaiVvPp8al5zbPj-G95Y0Z_qncsd25xR_vFjjISjhBU86OOF0nEwe-GPctmJpgrRoHvf-FxzcW5u3-PIoHvL7GUB4HDLLTxdVw9wFf8deIgDjI-wsC1P0CjGiImyoEilnzxzOLH6ucnlRNSMSp4JjZs68PSYobDw81EMA3Ye4GWvQDxxPdRmmRUdxP-n6VMDcVkC8uYd5r4QUTgt0bYC36lkl2tuziVwMuqlM4ABL_O--Jr7zZY-kKfv19MXjB5Dkm2FZu3-UApGtwM8QSjE5IOnsr5Q3wxM7IMbrZTVcP_sKlvU5XbNcSWXeHL583qaiW3_PRGFG_kCbwFCxc6z_gco6MShLVCvRvyfQLd4uvrGKVhnHQv9dswEb5POtiJpOG4T0n-i37IyGUJsoHn6Erw-IDWYIF6cYvnQKrQpSpj0oB9GpaMtTfE3Wna7dZlS5gEsb-GLdI8FSw0bCOKME8PG5qvChGfc%3D)
**If YOU want to personally stop Democrats from keeping control of the Senate and causing our economy further turmoil, then I need you to step up and help us close the fundraising gap.**

Peter, our opponent breaks a new fundraising record every single quarter. **From April to June, he raised more than $17,000,000, which is 300% more than what we were able to raise.**

All of those millions are funding non-stop attack ads against me. We're now slightly down in the polls (within the margin of error), but we need your help to fight back on the airwaves.

'Losing' is not in my vocabulary, so I'm ready to work hard to win this critical race. If you are committed to building the "Red Wave" and stopping a potential Senate debacle, **[please contribute any amount right now so we can flip the Senate.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5e35e7f170b34ef890dba9038089ee76&_e=p_7jEPLCMGFNaiVvPp8al5zbPj-G95Y0Z_qncsd25xR_vFjjISjhBU86OOF0nEwe-GPctmJpgrRoHvf-FxzcW5u3-PIoHvL7GUB4HDLLTxdVw9wFf8deIgDjI-wsC1P0CjGiImyoEilnzxzOLH6ucnlRNSMSp4JjZs68PSYobDw81EMA3Ye4GWvQDxxPdRmmRUdxP-n6VMDcVkC8uYd5r4QUTgt0bYC36lkl2tuziVwMuqlM4ABL_O--Jr7zZY-kKfv19MXjB5Dkm2FZu3-UAtNUuE94jlJfrZCy-39wQkcn7uI2Zz5kxReeBICTZ1dIBkVpHgWH2R3q79Zjkco2AXNkDYBtI0qKdSKM1vBrZMNhMmVl0eHh6HOyGy1qGnY432Lv9dvpkawgjc5ct2Ew5IRsQVcH_IeCS-2iyU3nrH2jCzZBVs2pycCibouFAo8qBuPRWZeNKqDivDAM3zTNvaUwPlJu22L4Qh6ipZpcXEI%3D)**

Thanks for your support,

clean_body: “Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment.” | Peter, A new article from Axios , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation: | "Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment." You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins. The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say: "Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side." While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧 If YOU want to personally stop Democrats from keeping control of the Senate and causing our economy further turmoil, then I need you to step up and help us close the fundraising gap. Peter, our opponent breaks a new fundraising record every single quarter. From April to June, he raised more than $17,000,000, which is 300% more than what we were able to raise. All of those millions are funding non-stop attack ads against me. We're now slightly down in the polls (within the margin of error), but we need your help to fight back on the airwaves. 'Losing' is not in my vocabulary, so I'm ready to work hard to win this critical race. If you are committed to building the "Red Wave" and stopping a potential Senate debacle, Thanks for your support, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. subject: Resisting activist judges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwab for SOS, Matthew Goddard, Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

Yesterday, liberal activist judges on the intermediate Court of Appeals reversed a district court decision and will order the Secretary of State's office to grant public access to personal ballot information.

As your Secretary of State, I have always been committed to defending your constitutional rights - especially your right to cast a private ballot.

However, this fight is not over. I am running for a second term to continue pushing back against the liberal activist agenda that wishes to make private and personal ballot information public.

I will continue working for you as Secretary of State, and humbly ask for your vote on August 2.

All my best,
---
|
---
| Scott Schwab
Kansas Secretary of State

name: Team Vallejo
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
No parent should ever be afraid to send their child to school, but, right now, that is the reality in Texas and nationwide after the devastating shooting that occurred in Uvalde at Robb Elementary 2 months ago. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03d5BKi5y4Uj1VbmIbpHT2NJS_BMOg9A0UdOf2FakLClPS1cBQIiyQeVEljjvPC7ELxpVeXujvmMXZy2ItYZrWxg-heItiLC3iBDsSEZby46OsYKJEBs7Ge-rsMx5VwbfrX/3nz/awSQjsUlQhCujravcIlUpA/h0/IrJY_ugzJwZF9rCVN9h8gmiZfWrx2JIn-nMboEg_p88)
---
Peter, we are so honored to have received support from Moms Demand Action, a group demanding reasonable solutions to address our nation’s culture of gun violence. No parent should ever be afraid to send their child to school, but, right now, that is the reality in Texas and nationwide after the devastating shooting that occurred in Uvalde at Robb Elementary 2 months ago. It’s a travesty. Michelle knows we have to push Congress to do something and finally say, ‘enough is enough’ because it’s clear the status quo has failed us. Together, we will fight for common sense gun legislation and keep our families safe. Michelle is ready to be a voice for our families in Congress. Texas has had 8 mass shootings in the past 13 years. According to a poll done by The Texas Politics Project at UT-Austin in June 2022, 52% of Texans want gun laws to be more strict.
Yet, so many leaders in Texas are acting against us.
After these tragedies, Republicans offer thoughts and prayers, seem open to talking about gun restrictions in the wake, wait until enough time has passed, then pass more legislation to loosen gun laws.
We cannot have a safer, better future for Texas families if we don’t have fighters like Michelle leading the charge against them.
Michelle is ready to get to Congress and work with groups like Moms Demand Action for the people of Texas and their safety — because that is her #1 priority.

name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: What could we say to convince you to make a contribution to Cheri Beasley today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Your contribution can make a world of difference
#

Friends —
Is there anything we can say to convince you to [**make a contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign today?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220723-2-MA&t=1&akid=1289%2E357359%2ELQgXnQ)
What if we told you that Cheri’s race was named by _FiveThirtyEight_ as **one of seven** races that could decide control of the Senate, and that CNN has named North Carolina’s Senate seat as **one of the top three** seats “most likely to flip” to Democrats.
What if we told you that our fundraising has slowed down **significantly** this month, and that we need to pick up the pace to reach our July goal?
And what if we told you that the GOP is flooding **tens of millions** of dollars of dark money into this race to prop up Cheri’s far-right opponent and buy this seat?
**The truth is this:** Cheri has the momentum to win this thing, but it’s going to take as many people as possible chipping in when they can to get her across the finish line this November. That’s why your $3 contribution matters.
So what do you say?
[**Will you pitch in a $3 donation or any amount you can today to send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate? Your contribution means a lot to Cheri and can make a world of difference to this campaign.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220723-2-MA&t=2&akid=1289%2E357359%2ELQgXnQ)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220723-2-MA&t=3&akid=1289%2E357359%2ELQgXnQ)**
Thank you. We appreciate all that you do.
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1289%2E357359%2ELQgXnQ). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1289_357359_LQgXnQ&akid=1289%2E357359%2ELQgXnQ) today to help us make history.

# Help Firebrand Fight to Win
[Donate Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nlrjyul-ihhjkhtyud-r/) | **New Episode**
# The Biden Doctrine: Human Sacrifices For Open Borders
**July 22nd **The recent story of a young Ohio girl--a rape victim who received an abortion--has taken on a new horrifying dimension. The revelation that the alleged rapist is an illegal immigrant now raises questions about how far the Biden administration and their allies are willing to go to protect the open borders experiment from scrutiny and accountability, no matter the human toll. [Listen on Spotify](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nlrjyul-ihhjkhtyud-y/) [Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nlrjyul-ihhjkhtyud-j/)
---

**New Episode**
# Climate, Leftist Policies, and Ukraine
**July 19th** Molly discusses the ESG Score that acts as a social credit system for American corporations, and the ongoing corruption in and between American officials and Ukraine that has destabilized the Western world and has left Europe facing an energy crisis as winter approaches. [Listen on Spotify](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nlrjyul-ihhjkhtyud-t/) [Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nlrjyul-ihhjkhtyud-i/)

name: Tom Cotton
subject: He has what it takes to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS

Fellow American,

Tom Cotton here, reaching out to you today about my friend and fellow conservative veteran, **Tyler Kistner**.

Tyler served on active duty for nine years, including four overseas tours. He stepped up to run for Congress in 2020 because he saw the radical agenda Democrats have for America. He lost one of the closest races in the country, but now he’s running again because too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines.

**But Democrats also know how important this seat is, so Tyler is once again one of their top targets.** Right now, he’s being outraised and outspent. **This Marine needs your help if we’re going to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi.**

name: Wes Moore
subject: We WON the Democratic primary for governor!
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227616/357424824/2127943747?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220723primary_wm_odpf30ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDFkYzkyYi1jNDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGNlHJykOX6A6Odbxhz11KO4OXBMee67i2ig0ifvZgA=)
---
Team Moore — It’s now official. I am proud to report – with humility and pride – that I am the Democratic nominee to be Maryland’s next Governor. I want to commend the incredibly talented field of leaders who sought the Democratic nomination alongside me. I've spoken to them over the course of the last few days, and thanked them for their commitment to public service, and to bettering our state. When we first began this improbable journey, I announced that our administration would lead our state to become a place where we will leave no one behind. And in order to get there, we would run the most organized, most energetic and most effective grassroots campaign this state has ever seen. And thanks to your tireless work, we’ve done just that. We competed not just in one region of the state, but in all regions of the state - from the Eastern Shore to the Western mountains, and everywhere in between. Ensuring that **every Marylander** was both seen and heard. **[Now, we march to November. With the same mindset.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227617/357424825/2127943747?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220723primary_wm_odpf30ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDFkYzkyYi1jNDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGNlHJykOX6A6Odbxhz11KO4OXBMee67i2ig0ifvZgA=)** **And, when you consider the Republican nominee Dan Cox, the stakes have quite literally never been higher.** Marylanders will face a very clear choice this November. A choice between unity and division. A choice between a future built on hope and optimism vs. the cynical politics of conspiracy theories and fear. A choice between the values we embrace as Marylanders and Donald Trump’s divisive and dangerous MAGA movement. When I led soldiers in combat in Afghanistan as a Captain in the U.S. Army, we lived by a principle: leave no one behind. It’s a value that I embraced in my work as CEO of one of the nation’s largest antipoverty organizations, where we brought leaders in government, the non profit sector, and in the private sector together to find what works, fund it, and scale it and move people into jobs they can raise a family with. **Leave no one behind.** The principle that drives this campaign — leave no one behind — is not a slogan. It’s a value. It’s a value that will guide me as Governor of Maryland. Right now, too many Marylanders _are_ being left behind. Unable to fill the gas tank or keep up with monthly bills. Feeling unsafe in their own communities, or with their children trapped in schools that are not preparing their children for the jobs of today or tomorrow. That all must change. We get there with new ideas, and a new spirit of togetherness – working across party lines and regional lines, through civility and collaboration. That’s an approach my opponent, Dan Cox, doesn’t believe in. Cox has pledged his unwavering allegiance to Donald Trump. Cox personally organized buses of insurrectionists to the U.S. Capitol on January 6. He spread Trump’s lies about the 2020 election and fought to have it overturned. He traffics in conspiracy theories. He tried to impeach Governor Hogan. Cox represents the most extreme fringe of American politics. Simply put, Dan Cox is so far outside the mainstream that I believe he’d be dangerous in the Governor's office. And it’s not just about Donald Trump – abortion access is on the ballot. Public school funding is on the ballot. A $15 minimum wage is on the ballot. The future of our environment is on the ballot. **I believe Maryland is the best state in America to live and raise a family, but to fulfill our potential, we must make sure all Marylanders have that opportunity at success.** So that’s what’s at stake this November. **We’ve got work to do, and aren’t taking our opponent lightly for even a minute.** We’ve got more voters to talk to about our message, and our campaign is going to have to grow. **_[If you can help us kick off this general election campaign with a contribution, chip in here, and together, we’re going to get this done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227618/357424826/2127943747?refcode= fl_email_fr_20220723primary_wm_odpf30ds_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDFkYzkyYi1jNDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGNlHJykOX6A6Odbxhz11KO4OXBMee67i2ig0ifvZgA=)_** With that, I close with again saying: thank you! From the bottom of my heart, on behalf of my family and my amazing running mate, Delegate Aruna Miller, I thank you for the opportunity to serve. Onward to victory, Wes **** | | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading nonprofit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
---
| [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48227619/357424827/2127943747?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220723primary_wm_odpf30ds_xx_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDFkYzkyYi1jNDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGNlHJykOX6A6Odbxhz11KO4OXBMee67i2ig0ifvZgA=)

clean_body: | = Team Moore — It’s now official. I am proud to report – with humility and pride – that I am the Democratic nominee to be Maryland’s next Governor. I want to commend the incredibly talented field of leaders who sought the Democratic nomination alongside me. I've spoken to them over the course of the last few days, and thanked them for their commitment to public service, and to bettering our state. When we first began this improbable journey, I announced that our administration would lead our state to become a place where we will leave no one behind. And in order to get there, we would run the most organized, most energetic and most effective grassroots campaign this state has ever seen. And thanks to your tireless work, we’ve done just that. We competed not just in one region of the state, but in all regions of the state - from the Eastern Shore to the Western mountains, and everywhere in between. Ensuring that every Marylander was both seen and heard. = And, when you consider the Republican nominee Dan Cox, the stakes have quite literally never been higher. Marylanders will face a very clear choice this November. A choice between unity and division. A choice between a future built on hope and optimism vs. the cynical politics of conspiracy theories and fear. A choice between the values we embrace as Marylanders and Donald Trump’s divisive and dangerous MAGA movement. When I led soldiers in combat in Afghanistan as a Captain in the U.S. Army, we lived by a principle: leave no one behind. It’s a value that I embraced in my work as CEO of one of the nation’s largest antipoverty organizations, where we brought leaders in government, the non profit sector, and in the private sector together to find what works, fund it, and scale it and move people into jobs they can raise a family with. Leave no one behind. The principle that drives this campaign — leave no one behind — is not a slogan. It’s a value. It’s a value that will guide me as Governor of Maryland. Right now, too many Marylanders are being left behind. Unable to fill the gas tank or keep up with monthly bills. Feeling unsafe in their own communities, or with their children trapped in schools that are not preparing their children for the jobs of today or tomorrow. That all must change. We get there with new ideas, and a new spirit of togetherness – working across party lines and regional lines, through civility and collaboration. That’s an approach my opponent, Dan Cox, doesn’t believe in. Cox has pledged his unwavering allegiance to Donald Trump. Cox personally organized buses of insurrectionists to the U.S. Capitol on January 6. He spread Trump’s lies about the 2020 election and fought to have it overturned. He traffics in conspiracy theories. He tried to impeach Governor Hogan. Cox represents the most extreme fringe of American politics. Simply put, Dan Cox is so far outside the mainstream that I believe he’d be dangerous in the Governor's office. And it’s not just about Donald Trump – abortion access is on the ballot. Public school funding is on the ballot. A $15 minimum wage is on the ballot. The future of our environment is on the ballot. I believe Maryland is the best state in America to live and raise a family, but to fulfill our potential, we must make sure all Marylanders have that opportunity at success. So that’s what’s at stake this November. We’ve got work to do, and aren’t taking our opponent lightly for even a minute. We’ve got more voters to talk to about our message, and our campaign is going to have to grow. = flemailfr20220723primarywmodpf30dsxxl2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDFkYzkyYi1jNDBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGNlHJykOX6A6Odbxhz11KO4OXBMee67i2ig0ifvZgA= With that, I close with again saying: thank you! From the bottom of my heart, on behalf of my family and my amazing running mate, Delegate Aruna Miller, I thank you for the opportunity to serve. Onward to victory, Wes ** | | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading nonprofit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . **

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Save the Date: 8/2 Participate PA: Philly’s Campaign for Public Banking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Participate PA is returning on Aug. 2 to fuel necessary discussions on key progressive issues and efforts in the Keystone State.

Sign up today to join us on August 2, 2022, for Participate PA: Philly’s Campaign for Public Banking [https://www.kpef.info/kpef-events/publicbanking] .

Tuesday, August 2, 2022
5:30 PM 8:00 PM

The Philadelphia Public Banking Coalition (PPBC) will explore how members built its successful campaign to establish local public banking — the first in the U.S. This 10-year effort involved education, recruitment, strategy, publicity, and collaboration.

In addition to moderator Conni Billé, the original organizer of the Philadelphia Public Banking Coalition. all other panelists are PPBC nominees to the Philadelphia Public Finance Authority Board and include:

Nicole Levy , a consumer financial protection advocate, regulator, and fair lending practitioner.

Beth Finn , currently serves on the boards of Americans for Democratic Action SE PA Chapter, the Female Hebrew Benevolent Society, and on the steering committees for Philly for Change and the PPBC.

Peter Winslow , represented the PPBC on the city’s Public Bank Feasibility Study Working Group and other discussions related to the establishment of the Philadelphia Public Financial Authority.

Stan Shapiro, co-founder of Philly Neighborhood Networks and has served as PNN’s vice-chair since its inception in 2005.

They will explore:

- why the PPBC is motivated to advance public banking;
- what it has accomplished so far;
- how it organized, grew, determined its strategy, and divided roles;
- how they kept focus for 10 years and succeeded in reaching a major goal; andthe work ahead.

Don't forget to RSVP today for this fascinating event! Participate PA: Philly’s Campaign for Public Banking [https://www.kpef.info/kpef-events/publicbanking]

See you there!

Laura Nevitt
Executive Director
Keystone Progress

P.S. We will be announcing more Participate PA discussions soon! Make sure to stay in-the-know by bookmarking: https://www.kpef.info/kpef-events [https://www.kpef.info/kpef-events]
https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info [http://www.kpef.info/] . Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224
United States

| | Eddie Geller here! I want to write you a long(ish) note about Punk Rock. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230567/357452361/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=) Punk Rock made me who I am today. [ I’m about to tell you my whole punk story — and why it matters in this election — but first,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230568/357452362/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=) [ can you chip in just $5 to this old punk’s campaign to flip FL-15 and defeat my out-of-touch MAGA opponents?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230569/357452363/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=) | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230570/357452364/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=)
