| | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230571/357452365/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=)
---
When I was a kid, my first real job was working at the Chuck E. Cheese off of U.S. 19 in Clearwater.

One day while I was counting tokens my boss, Jeff, overheard me listening to some...pretty embarrassing music. The next day, he handed me a mix CD (Remember, this was the early 2000s) and he said “listen to this”.

It had bands I’d never heard of — like Alkaline Trio, Jimmy Eat World, and Jawbreaker. [I didn’t know it yet, but Punk Rock would change my life and make me the person I am today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230572/357452366/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=)

As I listened to that CD (over and over and over), a whole new world opened up. Because Punk Rock wasn’t just about the great music — it was political, self-reliant, emotional, and cathartic.

[And while my clothes are a little more conventional these days, I still hold on to the lessons I learned from punk.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230573/357452367/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=)

[Resist Greed:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230574/357452368/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=) From corporations to career politicians, there’s always someone looking to get ahead by exploiting someone else (or even our planet!!). We need to stick together!

[Fight Injustice:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230575/357452369/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=) I learned to fight for what you care about, even if it’s unpopular — and ALWAYS stand up for the underdog.

[Think Outside the Box:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230576/357452370/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=) Through punk, I learned there’s a HUGE world out there to be explored. No one person has all the answers. We ALL need to get more comfortable thinking outside the box and looking for solutions everywhere.

[DIY - Do It Yourself:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/48230577/357452371/1031471839?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220723_FR_PUNK_A0_NA_U1_X11_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJmYzJkNS1lOTBhLWVkMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YFbNH0v5utxTFFw2rpvPKSSxIvAexP880aUl7SdOvXg=) Punk taught me that if you wanted to do something, you didn't need to wait around until someone gave you permission. You could roll up your sleeves and do it yourself.

The lessons Punk Rock taught me are the reason I’m here today. I believe that good people need to run for office — because we need good people in Congress who are willing to step up, take risks, and do good things.

clean_body: I still hold on to the lessons I learned from punk as I run for office | = | | Eddie Geller here! I want to write you a long(ish) note about Punk Rock. = Punk Rock made me who I am today. = = | | | = | | = When I was a kid, my first real job was working at the Chuck E. Cheese off of U.S. 19 in Clearwater. One day while I was counting tokens my boss, Jeff, overheard me listening to some...pretty embarrassing music. The next day, he handed me a mix CD (Remember, this was the early 2000s) and he said “listen to this”. It had bands I’d never heard of — like Alkaline Trio, Jimmy Eat World, and Jawbreaker. = As I listened to that CD (over and over and over), a whole new world opened up. Because Punk Rock wasn’t just about the great music — it was political, self-reliant, emotional, and cathartic. = = From corporations to career politicians, there’s always someone looking to get ahead by exploiting someone else (or even our planet!!). We need to stick together! = I learned to fight for what you care about, even if it’s unpopular — and ALWAYS stand up for the underdog. = Through punk, I learned there’s a HUGE world out there to be explored. No one person has all the answers. We ALL need to get more comfortable thinking outside the box and looking for solutions everywhere. = Punk taught me that if you wanted to do something, you didn't need to wait around until someone gave you permission. You could roll up your sleeves and do it yourself. The lessons Punk Rock taught me are the reason I’m here today. I believe that good people need to run for office — because we need good people in Congress who are willing to step up, take risks, and do good things. | | = | | = But a funny thing happened to me when I first started exploring a run for office: People actually told me I might have to hide my love of punk rock. = I think Americans are ready for a different kind of politician, one that doesn’t shy away from acknowledging their humanity. Punk rock changed my life and I’m proud of the lessons it taught me. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for reading about my punk story. Eddie Geller P.S. If any of you out there are screaming, “Those bands are technically emo!” Well, I can’t argue with you on that. | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: re: defending the majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220723-SenMaggieHassan-HassanSignedTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220723-SenMaggieHassan-HassanSignedTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5469%2E9716520%2EYmnhM0)
The majority makes all the difference.

When Democrats are in control, we deliver results for the American people -- like confirming Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court or passing the most significant gun safety reforms in nearly 30 years.

But if Republicans retake the majority, they’ll block all progress -- Sen. McConnell has made that clear, many times.

**Here's the big problem: The GOP is a single seat away from regaining power -- and _multiple_ Democratic seats are on the brink of flipping red -- including this one!**

**[So I'm writing to ask you: Will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC to ensure that we win in November and defend our razor-thin, history-making majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220723-SenMaggieHassan-HassanSignedTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220723-SenMaggieHassan-HassanSignedTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5469%2E9716520%2EYmnhM0)**

Look, experts are saying there's a 53% chance that Republicans win the Senate -- that's essentially a coin flip.

I can tell you exactly what that's like, because I won this seat by just 1,017 votes. And what I learned from that race is that everything we do matters -- every door we knock on, every dollar we raise, every goal we hit.

If we fall short of **_tonight's_** must-hit goal, it won't just be my race in trouble -- polls are tied in _multiple_ key Senate races across the country. We could lose them ALL if the Republicans outraise us, and then Sen. McConnell will control the Senate. **We can't afford to let that happen.**

**[I'm doing everything I can to keep Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate, but I can’t do it without you: Please, split a donation of $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC before midnight >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/4728?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220723-SenMaggieHassan-HassanSignedTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220723-SenMaggieHassan-HassanSignedTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=5469%2E9716520%2EYmnhM0)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Maggie Hassan and the DSCC.

clean_body: | | | The majority makes all the difference. When Democrats are in control, we deliver results for the American people -- like confirming Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court or passing the most significant gun safety reforms in nearly 30 years. But if Republicans retake the majority, they’ll block all progress -- Sen. McConnell has made that clear, many times. Here's the big problem: The GOP is a single seat away from regaining power -- and multiple Democratic seats are on the brink of flipping red -- including this one! Look, experts are saying there's a 53% chance that Republicans win the Senate -- that's essentially a coin flip. I can tell you exactly what that's like, because I won this seat by just 1,017 votes. And what I learned from that race is that everything we do matters -- every door we knock on, every dollar we raise, every goal we hit. If we fall short of tonight's must-hit goal, it won't just be my race in trouble -- polls are tied in multiple key Senate races across the country. We could lose them ALL if the Republicans outraise us, and then Sen. McConnell will control the Senate. We can't afford to let that happen. You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins.

The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say:

_**"Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side."**_
---

While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧

clean_body: “Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment.” | Peter, A new article from Axios , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation: | "Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment." You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins. The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say: "Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side." While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧 If YOU want to personally stop Democrats from keeping control of the Senate and causing our economy further turmoil, then I need you to step up and help us close the fundraising gap. Peter, our opponent breaks a new fundraising record every single quarter. From April to June, he raised more than $17,000,000, which is 300% more than what we were able to raise. All of those millions are funding non-stop attack ads against me. We're now slightly down in the polls (within the margin of error), but we need your help to fight back on the airwaves. 'Losing' is not in my vocabulary, so I'm ready to work hard to win this critical race. If you are committed to building the "Red Wave" and stopping a potential Senate debacle, Thanks for your support, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republican Attorneys General are on a rampage against abortion care, and the women and girls who need it. Protect abortion access in the states by helping the Democratic Attorneys General Association put good AGs in every state.
body:
State AGs should protect women’s rights, not destroy them.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **State Attorneys General are our last line of defense against creeping fascism.** Right Wing Arizona AG Mark Brnovich---Republican, of course--is petitioning an Arizona court to allow an abortion ban from 1901 to go into effect, banning abortion for every woman in Arizona, except when her life is at risk. Women who will suffer bodily trauma from pregnancies with severe complications, 10 yr old rape victims, 12 yr olds molested by a member of the family, **_this soulless cretin wants to force every one of them to give control of their bodies, mental health, economic well-being--THEIR LIVES, to the state. _** Luckily, we have just the answer for Brnovich's evil, electing Kris Mayes the next Arizona Attorney General, a dedicated public servant who has won statewide office in Arizona in the past and, most importantly, an abortion rights fighter who will ensure that office is occupied by someone who will _always_ protect the right to choose. Sadly, the story in Arizona is not unique. **_In Ohio, Attorney General David Yost called the 10 yr old girl who was raped and, in a what became a national story, had to flee to Indiana to get an abortion, a "liar." _**This craven zealot said a 10 yr old girl just made it up...until the rapist was arrested in Columbus and Yost had to retreat to the safety of (for once) shutting up.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5086f24-5b10-424e-adc4-7e802bce89e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_The Democratic Attorneys General Association takes on the Yosts and Brnovichs in every state across the country, electing Democrats like Kris Mays who will protect our control over our bodies, our right to vote, our right to breathe air that doesn't give us cancer and many other things we don't even think about._** **_We must help them prevent Republicans from rigging our elections, taking over women's bodies and handing out AR-15s to criminals and terrorists wihtout so much as a background check._** **[Will you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Attorneys General Association?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T344963f7-9aa9-4330-b55b-c5a6bc22da1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** Thank you so much for protecting our democracy and our bodily autonomy. Cliff

clean_body: State AGs should protect women’s rights, not destroy them. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, State Attorneys General are our last line of defense against creeping fascism. Right Wing Arizona AG Mark Brnovich---Republican, of course--is petitioning an Arizona court to allow an abortion ban from 1901 to go into effect, banning abortion for every woman in Arizona, except when her life is at risk. Women who will suffer bodily trauma from pregnancies with severe complications, 10 yr old rape victims, 12 yr olds molested by a member of the family, this soulless cretin wants to force every one of them to give control of their bodies, mental health, economic well-being--THEIR LIVES, to the state. Luckily, we have just the answer for Brnovich's evil, electing Kris Mayes the next Arizona Attorney General, a dedicated public servant who has won statewide office in Arizona in the past and, most importantly, an abortion rights fighter who will ensure that office is occupied by someone who will always protect the right to choose. Sadly, the story in Arizona is not unique. In Ohio, Attorney General David Yost called the 10 yr old girl who was raped and, in a what became a national story, had to flee to Indiana to get an abortion, a "liar." This craven zealot said a 10 yr old girl just made it up...until the rapist was arrested in Columbus and Yost had to retreat to the safety of (for once) shutting up. | | | | | | The Democratic Attorneys General Association takes on the Yosts and Brnovichs in every state across the country, electing Democrats like Kris Mays who will protect our control over our bodies, our right to vote, our right to breathe air that doesn't give us cancer and many other things we don't even think about. We must help them prevent Republicans from rigging our elections, taking over women's bodies and handing out AR-15s to criminals and terrorists wihtout so much as a background check. Thank you so much for protecting our democracy and our bodily autonomy. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Charles Booker
subject: re: January 6 hearings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

This week, the House concluded their final hearing this summer seeking
answers about the GOP’s involvement in the January 6 insurrection and who
is responsible for this act of white supremacy.

These hearings have made one thing crystal clear: There are members of
Congress who violated their oath to protect our democracy. Specifically,
Rand Paul.

The violent mob of insurrectionists stormed our capitol, beat, tased and
degraded capitol police, and sought to kill the Vice President and members
of Congress. But for Rand Paul, these recent hearings to seek
accountability for this shameful day are nothing but a “partisan witch
hunt.” Rand voted against conducting an investigation and still stands by
his claims of a “stolen” election.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18420?refcode=em20220723-2261&t=1001&akid=2261%2E346206%2Exbwco5 ][IMG]

It’s shameful — but it is nothing new,
Peter. For years, Rand Paul has
been working to suppress our votes to keep his own seat. Kentucky has one
of the worst records of voter disenfranchisement in our country’s history.
For too long, massive groups of people, especially Black and brown
communities, have been excluded and discouraged from voting. As a result,
the number of people in Kentucky who don’t vote outnumbers those who do.

We know that a different type of politics is possible — and that’s what
our movement is fighting for. Together, we have the power to replace Rand
Paul and every politician who betrayed our democracy last January.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18420?refcode=em20220723-2261&t=1002&akid=2261%2E346206%2Exbwco5 ]If you’re ready to join me in this work, will you chip
in $5 or anything you can today to our people-powered
campaign? We must send a loud and clear message today to Rand Paul that
this movement remembers and that we are rising up to hold him accountable
at the ballot box on Election Day.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18420?refcode=em20220723-2261&t=1021&akid=2261%2E346206%2Exbwco5 ]Contribute $5

Together, we can save our Democracy,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220723-2261-footer&t=1022&refcode2=2261_346206_xbwco5&akid=2261%2E346206%2Exbwco5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2261%2E346206%2Exbwco5

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Peter,

A new article from _Axios_ , discussing recent financial reports filed by Senate candidates across the country, is setting off alarms. This line from the article summarizes the situation:

| _**"Fundraising issues...are contributing to the chance of a Republican Senate debacle despite the enviable political environment."**_
---

You read that correctly. The "Red Wave" we've all been hearing about may turn out to be a "debacle" in the Senate because Democrats are outraising Republicans by such huge margins.

The article mentions OUR CAMPAIGN and has this to say:

_**"Even the GOP's best small-dollar performers are being swamped by huge grassroots backing on the other side."**_
---

While we've raised $8 million in small dollar donations since we launched our campaign 11 months ago, our Democrat opponent has raised $28 million. 😧

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6f57c6b76474316bdeff850fd20f3f8&_e=t8IAj20DD-GOoOt6Nfs-YBEedpUeTwLoKYX0DUYvH7enYadh-oBBy5IVHNlYkG7SkvH5OYJusRSXLs8Z6x3_TvGwmj_8v6jaoZK4eZS-Qm9Lobtr-1pqjVP6jZekUH2VmntBN_yRAGA0GdXTJp_QEb1u0MbTP-kfr1D1QrAwt7p0BWQuzGe-KfPIgEYAF38mEOwNKRzCNsC82lViQK7IYC0ijnH0UdfBJQ5QNz2rXGNunzrCs6KB4kYvo64ZA1A-T7UFL5DPEmyfnyaos2MicgVwKFbGn8AEz6HjpxC-JPgVtI9fOij2ijhmkhuGbnXm8WN19Np4Va8yCMZs15Z9M0qb6dPNHJ6W1uRY-s-4ISdAYR4RRd8dgkcWNJ62FsgNuGRe6xSQguKHKJvLoLIMhq7lJD3CTSsrSxMWfYFzKNNWeV76yXbCGgBWh92_sHLSMaSDwDDqsQqVQht_OaqPGjLVwrg8PouUxg9M6TmFBpGkwheo5cJpk7a4hRn_DqumpQaPUGwa9Pm5hEdzAs5cUQ%3D%3D)

**Fellow American, what does the American Dream mean to you?**

To my good friend, [**George Logan**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6f57c6b76474316bdeff850fd20f3f8&_e=t8IAj20DD-GOoOt6Nfs-YBEedpUeTwLoKYX0DUYvH7enYadh-oBBy5IVHNlYkG7SkvH5OYJusRSXLs8Z6x3_TvGwmj_8v6jaoZK4eZS-Qm9Lobtr-1pqjVP6jZekUH2VmntBN_yRAGA0GdXTJp_QEb1u0MbTP-kfr1D1QrAwt7p0BWQuzGe-KfPIgEYAF38mEOwNKRzCNsC82lViQK7IYC0ijnH0UdfBJQ5QNz2rXGNunzrCs6KB4kYvo64ZA1A-T7UFL5DPEmyfnyaos2MicgVwKFbGn8AEz6HjpxC-JPiF95WNrOd8MLMyLYhWAOViikuJ9Xesp0_HN5ig0kAIN_MgmBVBwcJh_228IoZkEEX6ppQd7s8AUPk6XbOUFvl_3vdARgi5PKfJwoKW61WmZlBcMAURJ_wJKD-dAafVoGlHLVlfYDjEnvCnmFwwlZPX1Zwy-jNRHsFn8V-zaYkN5xtuLPlu6GcsThFaOlkwApOec2Z3Tu0ED-uecm71vS1rptLvk8r-1xXgwEtS1Y5Tgg%3D%3D), it means having the ability to accomplish anything you set your mind to in a country that praises freedom and opportunity.

You see, George’s parents left Guatemala and came to America to grow a family and build a better life. His parents wanted to ensure he had every chance of success to accomplish anything he wanted, and now George wants this same thing for his children and all future generations.

George has never lost sight of this - **that is why I am proud to endorse his race for Congress.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6f57c6b76474316bdeff850fd20f3f8&_e=t8IAj20DD-GOoOt6Nfs-YBEedpUeTwLoKYX0DUYvH7enYadh-oBBy5IVHNlYkG7SkvH5OYJusRSXLs8Z6x3_TvGwmj_8v6jaoZK4eZS-Qm9Lobtr-1pqjVP6jZekUH2VmntBN_yRAGA0GdXTJp_QEb1u0MbTP-kfr1D1QrAwt7p0BWQuzGe-KfPIgEYAF38mEOwNKRzCNsC82lViQK7IYC0ijnH0UdfBJQ5QNz2rXGNunzrCs6KB4kYvo64ZA1A-T7UFL5DPEmyfnyaos2MicgVwKFbGn8AEz6HjpxC-JPi3QgR1mqNYyT4r1Qjb5pnrqmuc9yGecwh1ajxVBWVu7XJ2t4R7Pnor4vAwFyggOJS2t-ZxDLe9qB_H5JGbTS1JWHtbkEpbvdunfokkwrMDZRNphg04xKP2WqiKLrUfHrUcmZ5COIVrZcgRJBf5zAphcahGq8hV1L5PNV8XSARoZVhtZjWewNLNZBqptCaIn_-tXSHX3xC29_zT9c1tyJ8oDxbaod3qUGz0P_HP4ziNjg%3D%3D)
| [**🇺🇸 SUPPORT GEORGE’S AMERICAN DREAM 🇺🇸**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6f57c6b76474316bdeff850fd20f3f8&_e=t8IAj20DD-GOoOt6Nfs-YBEedpUeTwLoKYX0DUYvH7enYadh-oBBy5IVHNlYkG7SkvH5OYJusRSXLs8Z6x3_TvGwmj_8v6jaoZK4eZS-Qm9Lobtr-1pqjVP6jZekUH2VmntBN_yRAGA0GdXTJp_QEb1u0MbTP-kfr1D1QrAwt7p0BWQuzGe-KfPIgEYAF38mEOwNKRzCNsC82lViQK7IYC0ijnH0UdfBJQ5QNz2rXGNunzrCs6KB4kYvo64ZA1A-T7UFL5DPEmyfnyaos2MicgVwKFbGn8AEz6HjpxC-JPgf1y7S3_7aDZp-xZIiE_0CnByew2XKlsmk9-MHskaGorJHQXb_HrI9cjWSpdCHeudgz0UFWjlEOyXo_W3R-VArX9bvIWWyHDVfYHjsPW5TbxOmpMYm5YhaLBzrka-6DMlI8cmUicZgRIAAiNS_XDZL_M8NbHhGV6WDpNVHgdtvewhZfs4eqXoR_5jx7CoE9uahDNYy0ZSVhFTbRHVh6676n2tBF5s_i-yP4okWaCnSWw%3D%3D)
---

George’s American Dream is to leave this country a better place for the next generation, which starts with electing men and women to Congress who will spark change and shake up the status quo. **I have no doubt that George will make this nation something for our future to be proud of.**

_But what is stopping George from accomplishing his dream?_ **JV ‘Squad’ member Jahana Hayes.**

Hayes is a member of Pelosi’s well-known ‘Squad,’ which means she never has to worry about campaign finances. **She receives funding from high-profile radicals like AOC and Super PACs that are FLUSHED with cash.**

Did you know Hayes’ votes align with Pelosi 100% of the time and with Biden 98%?! It’s clear she is _**OUT-OF-TOUCH**_ with her constituents and **is just another vote for the Democrats’ agenda.**

Dr. Oz is fighting every day to flip Pennsylvania RED, but he is LOSING the fundraising race. He needs our help to fight back! | Dr. Oz has my support, and he should have yours too! We have a chance to take back the Senate, but if we fail to defeat Radical Socialist John Fetterman, we can kiss that chance goodbye! The Radical Democrats will do everything they can to win this race. We must have your support to continue the red wave into November! We will stop the Radical Left from destroying Pennsylvania and take back the US Senate in November! Thanks for your support! Chairwoman Elise Stefanik Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is: Doctor Oz For Senate PO Box 576 Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006

body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We realize
that we send you a lot of emails.

But we have a really good reason for it. Every month, donations to emails
just like this one make up a significant portion of our fundraising. And
with the future of Texas on the line, we have to do everything we can to
win and elect Beto as the next governor.

With just over three months until Election Day, we’re ramping up our
hiring of organizers, putting together plans to run TV ads, and traveling
to over 75+ communities over the span of our 49-day Drive for Texas.

According to our records, you haven’t yet chipped in to help elect Beto.
We understand if you haven’t been in a position to contribute yet, but
we’re hoping you’ll dig deep and make your first $3 contribution to help
elect Beto in November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220723-2.z2vPWw&refcode=ema20220723-199777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=199777%2E444211%2E6sBBfl ]Will you contribute $3 right now to defeat Abbott? By making your first
donation today, you will help us reach voters across Texas and move this
state forward under new leadership.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220723-2.z2vPWw&refcode=ema20220723-199777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=199777%2E444211%2E6sBBfl ]Contribute $3

Beto believes in running a people-powered campaign. Here's what that
actually means: We don't accept a cent from corporate PACs or their
special interests — our donations come from folks like you who believe in
our vision for a bigger, bolder Texas.

With just over three months until Election Day, it’s time to really press
the pedal to the metal and give this campaign 110% of everything we’ve
got. We’re working overtime and leaving it all on the field.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220723-2.z2vPWw&refcode=ema20220723-199777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=199777%2E444211%2E6sBBfl ]Please do your part in this to stop Abbott’s cruelty and extremism in
Texas by chipping in $3 today.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220723-2.z2vPWw&refcode=ema20220723-199777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=199777%2E444211%2E6sBBfl ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your support,

Team Beto

Every month, donations to emails just like this one make up a significant portion of our fundraising. And with the future of Texas on the line, we have to do everything we can to win and elect Beto as the next governor. With just over three months until Election Day, we’re ramping up our hiring of organizers, putting together plans to run TV ads, and traveling to over 75+ communities over the span of our 49-day Drive for Texas. According to our records, you haven’t yet chipped in to help elect Beto. We understand if you haven’t been in a position to contribute yet, but we’re hoping you’ll dig deep and make your first $3 contribution to help elect Beto in November. [ ]Will you contribute $3 right now to defeat Abbott? By making your first donation today, you will help us reach voters across Texas and move this state forward under new leadership. [ ]Contribute $3 Beto believes in running a people-powered campaign. Here's what that actually means: We don't accept a cent from corporate PACs or their special interests — our donations come from folks like you who believe in our vision for a bigger, bolder Texas. With just over three months until Election Day, it’s time to really press the pedal to the metal and give this campaign 110% of everything we’ve got. We’re working overtime and leaving it all on the field. [ ]Please do your part in this to stop Abbott’s cruelty and extremism in Texas by chipping in $3 today. [ ]Contribute $3 Thank you for your support, Team Beto

name: Tim Ryan
subject: why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1007&amount=25&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ][IMG]

Folks, this email is a little longer than usual, so I hope
you’ll bear with me—I feel it’s important I tell you a bit about why I
chose to run for Senate in the first place.

Having spent my entire life in Ohio, I’ve seen firsthand what happens when
politics doesn’t work for hardworking families: jobs are sent out of state
or out of the country, extremist politicians focus on whatever culture war
is trending that day, and the costs of things like education, health care,
and housing continue to rise while wages remain stagnant.

That’s why I chose a life of public service: I want to help working
families because I’m part of one. My wife is a public school teacher and
we’re raising a family while paying off a mortgage and student loans.

So many families face these same challenges and more—but there are too
many elected officials in the pockets of special interests, so it’s really
no wonder why things aren’t improving for everyday people.

And that’s why I’m running for Senate—because hardworking folks in Ohio
and around the country deserve elected officials who will go to the mat
fighting for them, and I promise you, that’s exactly what you’ll get from
me.

I know we can win, folks, because we’ve got the grassroots
support of more than 150,000 people that are ready to flip Ohio blue and
fight for representation that actually represents them, and puts people
over politics.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1008&amount=25&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ]That’s why I’m hoping you’ll contribute $25 to my campaign to win in
Ohio and expand our Democratic Senate majority. Can I count on you to have
my back?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1010&amount=50&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1011&amount=100&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1012&amount=200&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1013&amount=250&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/17676?t=1014&amount=30&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ]Other Amount

Thanks for taking the time to read this, folks—I really do
appreciate it.

Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=4724%2E3611125%2EEVwR_W ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Brenda?=
subject: You’re invited: Celebrate The Train!
body:
On Friday July 29th for the first time since 1953.... | | |
---
| | Join Brenda Siegel, Democratic nominee for Governor, on Friday July 29th at 12 noon at Royal Oak Coffee as we celebrate the expansion of Amtrak into Burlington, Vergennes, and Middlebury! [Join us for Pastries, Coffee and Celebration.](https://brendaforvermont.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224771580cedf68826482245c&id=7c8be6438f&e=eb0e94ee98)

The Ethan Allen Express route will now connect Burlington to New York City with several stops within Vermont for the first time since 1953. This expanded service allows Vermonters to get to more areas of the state in a low-cost, environmentally friendly manner.
---
| [ ](https://brendaforvermont.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224771580cedf68826482245c&id=f0fb844377&e=eb0e94ee98)
---
| [All Aboard!](https://brendaforvermont.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224771580cedf68826482245c&id=16810994be&e=eb0e94ee98 "All Aboard!")
---
| The expanded service is just one step in moving towards lower cost, more environmentally friendly means of transportation for Vermonters. Brenda has sat on the Public Transit Advisory Commission for the past several years. She has had a front row seat to what is possible in our state and is so excited to celebrate with all of you.

Brenda has been endorsed by the leading environmental organizations in the state including **Vermont Conservation Voters** and the **Vermont Sierra Club** because of her plan for Bold Climate Action, including the development of public transit statewide.

As Governor, Brenda will work with our communities and out legislature to pass (t)railblazing legislation that will lower carbon emissions, protect clean water, and increase renewable energy.

[Celebrate this momentous event with us as we work towards building a Vermont that works for all of us. Pastries and coffee are included with the purchase of your ticket.](https://brendaforvermont.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224771580cedf68826482245c&id=85999be5ea&e=eb0e94ee98) Stay tuned for a list of speakers, we are so excited to share this moment with you!
---
| [Don't Miss Out On This Chance To Celebrate Trains with Brenda!](https://brendaforvermont.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224771580cedf68826482245c&id=c0bdc6b097&e=eb0e94ee98 "Don't Miss Out On This Chance To Celebrate Trains with Brenda!")
---
| We hope to see you there!

_\- Team Brenda_
---
| | | | | | [](https://brendaforvermont.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224771580cedf68826482245c&id=9d3c43a0b8&e=eb0e94ee98)
---
| | [](https://brendaforvermont.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224771580cedf68826482245c&id=130bd9fcc6&e=eb0e94ee98)
---
